```text
    18→const fallbackSansFont =
    19→  "var(--app-font-sans, system-ui), -apple-system, 'PingFang SC', 'Microsoft YaHei', 'Segoe UI', Roboto, Helvetica, 'noto sans sc', 'hiragino sans gb', sans-serif, Apple Color Emoji, Segoe UI Emoji, Not Color Emoji"
    20→const fallbackSerifFont =
    21→  "'Noto Serif CJK SC', 'Noto Serif SC', var(--app-font-serif, 'Source Han Serif SC'), 'Source Han Serif SC', 'Source Han Serif', source-han-serif-sc, SongTi SC, SimSum, 'Hiragino Sans GB', system-ui, -apple-system, Segoe UI, Roboto, Helvetica, 'Microsoft YaHei', 'WenQuanYi Micro Hei', sans-serif"
    22→const fallbackMonoFont =
    23→  "'OperatorMonoSSmLig Nerd Font', 'Cascadia Code PL', 'FantasqueSansMono Nerd Font', 'operator mono', JetBrainsMono, 'Fira code Retina', 'Fira code', Consolas, Monaco, 'Hannotate SC', monospace, -apple-system"
    24→
    25→const linkCardFetchContext: LinkCardFetchContext = {
    26→  adapters: {
    27→    github: {
    28→      request: fetchGitHubApi,
    29→    },
    30→    tmdb: {
    31→      request: (url) => {
    32→        const u = new URL(url)
    33→        const path = u.pathname.replace(/^\/3\//, '')
    34→        return fetch(`/api/tmdb/${path}${u.search}`).then((r) => r.json())
    35→      },
    36→    },
    37→    bangumi: {
    38→      request: (url) => {
    39→        const u = new URL(url)
    40→        const path = u.pathname.replace(/^\/v0\//, '')
    41→        return fetch(`/api/bangumi/${path}`).then((r) => r.json())
    42→      },
    43→    },
    44→    leetcode: {
    45→      request: (_url, init) => {
    46→        return fetch('/api/leetcode', init).then((r) => r.json())
    47→      },
    48→    },
    49→    'netease-music': {
    50→      request: (url) => {
    51→        const songId = new URL(url).pathname.split('/').pop()
    52→        return fetch('/api/music/netease', {
    53→          method: 'POST',
    54→          headers: { 'Content-Type': 'application/json' },
    55→          body: JSON.stringify({ songId }),
    56→        }).then((r) => r.json())
    57→      },
    58→    },
    59→    'qq-music': {
    60→      request: (url) => {
    61→        const songId = new URL(url).pathname.split('/').pop()
    62→        return fetch('/api/music/tencent', {
    63→          method: 'POST',
    64→          headers: { 'Content-Type': 'application/json' },
    65→          body: JSON.stringify({ songId }),
    66→        }).then((r) => r.json())
    67→      },
    68→    },
    69→    'mx-space': {
    70→      request: (path) => {
    71→        return fetch(`/api/v2/${path}`).then((r) => r.json())
    72→      },
    73→    },
    74→  },
    75→}
    76→
    77→export interface LexicalContentProps {
    78→  content: string
    79→  variant?: RichEditorVariant
    80→  className?: string
    81→}
    82→
    83→export function LexicalContent({
    84→  content,
    85→  variant,
    86→  className,
    87→}: LexicalContentProps) {
    88→  const editorState = useMemo<SerializedEditorState | null>(() => {
    89→    try {
    90→      return JSON.parse(content)
    91→    } catch {
    92→      return null
    93→    }
    94→  }, [content])
    95→
    96→  const isDark = useIsDark()
    97→
    98→  const baseVarStyle = useMemo(
    99→    () =>
   100→      ({
   101→        '--font-sans': fallbackSansFont,
   102→        '--font-serif': fallbackSerifFont,
   103→        '--font-mono': fallbackMonoFont,
   104→      }) as React.CSSProperties,
   105→    [],
   106→  )
   107→
   108→  const editorOverrideStyle = useMemo(
   109→    () =>
   110→      createThemeStyle({
   111→        color: {
   112→          accent: 'var(--color-accent, var(--color-primary, #33a6b8))',
   113→          link: 'var(--color-accent, var(--color-primary, #33a6b8))',
   114→          accentLight:
   115→            'color-mix(in srgb, var(--color-accent, var(--color-primary, #33a6b8)) 20%, transparent)',
   116→          quoteBorder: 'var(--color-accent, var(--color-primary, #33a6b8))',
   117→        },
   118→        layout: { maxWidth: '100%' },
   119→        typography: {
   120→          fontFamily:
   121→            variant === 'note'
   122→              ? `var(--note-font-override, ${fallbackSerifFont})`
   123→              : fallbackSansFont,
   124→          fontFamilySerif: fallbackSerifFont,
   125→          fontMono: fallbackMonoFont,
   126→        },
   127→      }),
   128→    [variant],
   129→  )
   130→
   131→  if (!editorState) return null
   132→
   133→  return (
   134→    <LinkCardFetchProvider value={linkCardFetchContext}>
   135→      <ShiroRenderer
   136→        value={editorState}
   137→        variant={variant}
   138→        theme={isDark ? 'dark' : 'light'}
   139→        className={clsx(className, 'bg-transparent!')}
   140→        style={{ ...baseVarStyle, ...editorOverrideStyle }}
   141→      />
   142→    </LinkCardFetchProvider>
   143→  )
   144→}
   145→
```

```text
    19→export const PageLoading: Component = ({ children }) => {

    22→  if (!id) {
    23→    return <FullPageLoading />
    24→  }
    25→
    26→  return children
    27→}

    35→  props: PropsWithChildren,
    36→) => {

    39→  )

    41→
    42→  return (
    43→    <MarkdownImageRecordProvider images={images}>
    44→      {props.children}
    45→    </MarkdownImageRecordProvider>
    46→  )
    47→}

    49→export const PageSubTitle = () => {
    50→  const subtitle = useCurrentPageDataSelector((data) => data?.subtitle)
    51→  return (
    52→    <p className="text-center text-lg text-zinc-600/70 dark:text-neutral-400 lg:text-left">
    53→      {subtitle}
    54→    </p>
    55→  )
    56→}
    57→export const PageTitle = () => {
    58→  const title = useCurrentPageDataSelector((data) => data?.title)
    59→  const id = useCurrentPageDataSelector((data) => data?.id)
    60→  return (
    61→    <>
    62→      <h1 className="text-balance text-center lg:text-left">{title}</h1>
    63→      <GoToAdminEditingButton
    64→        id={id!}
    65→        type="pages"
    66→        className="absolute -top-6 right-0"
    67→      />
    68→    </>
    69→  )
    70→}
    71→
    72→export const PagePaginator = () => {
    73→  const t = useTranslations('note')
    74→  const currentPageTitle = useCurrentPageDataSelector((d) => d?.title)
    75→  const pageMeta = useAggregationSelector((d) => d.pageMeta)
    76→  const pages = useMemo(() => pageMeta || [], [pageMeta])
    77→  const indexInPages = pages.findIndex((i) => i.title === currentPageTitle)
    78→  const n = pages.length
    79→  const hasNext = indexInPages + 1 < n
    80→  const hasPrev = indexInPages - 1 >= 0
    81→  return (
    82→    <div
    83→      className="relative mt-8 grid h-20 select-none grid-cols-2"
    84→      data-hide-print
    85→    >
    86→      <div className="justify-start">
    87→        {hasPrev && (
    88→          <Fragment>
    89→            <Link
    90→              href={`/${pages[indexInPages - 1].slug}`}
    91→              className="flex flex-col justify-end text-left leading-loose"
    92→            >
    93→              <span className="text-accent">{t('look_back')}</span>
    94→              <span>{pages[indexInPages - 1].title}</span>
    95→            </Link>
    96→          </Fragment>
    97→        )}
    98→      </div>
    99→      <div className="justify-end">
   100→        {hasNext && (
   101→          <Fragment>
   102→            <Link
   103→              href={`/${pages[indexInPages + 1].slug}`}
   104→              className="flex flex-col justify-end text-right leading-loose"
   105→            >
   106→              <span className="text-accent">{t('continue_reading')}</span>
   107→              <span>{pages[indexInPages + 1].title}</span>
   108→            </Link>
   109→          </Fragment>
   110→        )}
   111→      </div>
   112→    </div>
   113→  )
   114→}
   115→
   116→export const MarkdownSelection: Component = (props) => {
   117→  const id = useCurrentPageDataSelector((data) => data?.id)!
   118→  const title = useCurrentPageDataSelector((data) => data?.title)!
   119→  const canComment = useCurrentPageDataSelector((data) => data?.allowComment)!
   120→  return (
   121→    <WithArticleSelectionAction
   122→      refId={id}
   123→      title={title}
   124→      canComment={canComment}
   125→    >
   126→      {props.children}
   127→    </WithArticleSelectionAction>
   128→  )
   129→}
   130→
```

```typescript
import type { BlockAnchor, RangeAnchor } from '@haklex/rich-editor'

export interface BlockInfo {
  index: number
  blockId: string
  type: string
  textContent: string
  fingerprint: string
}

export function computeBlockFingerprint(text: string): string {
  const input = text.slice(0, 200) + String(text.length)
  let hash = 5381
  for (let i = 0; i < input.length; i++) {
    hash = ((hash << 5) + hash + (input.codePointAt(i) ?? 0)) | 0
  }
  return (hash >>> 0).toString(16)
}

function getNodeType(node: Record<string, any>): string {
  const t = node.type as string
  if (t === 'heading') {
    const tag = node.tag as string | undefined
    return tag ? `heading-${tag}` : 'heading'
  }
  return t
}

function getTextContent(node: Record<string, any>): string {
  if (typeof node.text === 'string') return node.text
  if (node.type === 'linebreak') return '\n'
  if (Array.isArray(node.children)) {
    return (node.children as Record<string, any>[]).map(getTextContent).join('')
  }
  return ''
}

export function extractBlockInfos(content: string): BlockInfo[] {
  let parsed: Record<string, any>
  try {
    parsed = JSON.parse(content)
  } catch {
    return []
  }

  const rootChildren = parsed.root?.children as
    | Record<string, any>[]
    | undefined
  if (!rootChildren) return []

  return rootChildren.map((child, index) => {
    const blockId = (child.$ as Record<string, any> | undefined)?.blockId as
      | string
      | undefined
    const textContent = getTextContent(child)
    return {
      index,
      blockId: blockId || '',
      type: getNodeType(child),
      textContent,
      fingerprint: computeBlockFingerprint(textContent),
    }
  })
}

export function findBlockIndex(
  contentEl: Element,
  node: Node,
): number {
  const children = contentEl.children
  let current: Node | null = node
  while (current && current !== contentEl) {
    if (current.parentNode === contentEl) {
      for (let i = 0; i < children.length; i++) {
        if (children[i] === current) return i
      }
      return -1
    }
    current = current.parentNode
  }
  return -1
}

export function getTextOffset(
  container: Element,
  targetNode: Node,
  targetOffset: number,
): number {
  const walker = document.createTreeWalker(container, NodeFilter.SHOW_TEXT)
  let offset = 0
  let node: Node | null
  while ((node = walker.nextNode())) {
    if (node === targetNode) {
      return offset + targetOffset
    }
    offset += (node as Text).length
  }
  return offset
}

export function buildRangeAnchorFromSelection(
  sel: Selection,
  contentEl: Element,
  blockInfos: BlockInfo[],
): RangeAnchor | null {
  const { anchorNode, anchorOffset, focusNode, focusOffset } = sel
  if (!anchorNode || !focusNode) return null

  const anchorBlockIdx = findBlockIndex(contentEl, anchorNode)
  const focusBlockIdx = findBlockIndex(contentEl, focusNode)
  if (anchorBlockIdx < 0 || focusBlockIdx < 0) return null
  if (anchorBlockIdx !== focusBlockIdx) return null

  const info = blockInfos[anchorBlockIdx]
  if (!info?.blockId) return null

  const blockEl = contentEl.children[anchorBlockIdx]
  if (!blockEl) return null

  let startOffset = getTextOffset(blockEl, anchorNode, anchorOffset)
  let endOffset = getTextOffset(blockEl, focusNode, focusOffset)
  if (startOffset > endOffset) {
    ;[startOffset, endOffset] = [endOffset, startOffset]
  }

  const text = info.textContent
  const quote = text.slice(startOffset, endOffset)
  if (!quote) return null

  return {
    mode: 'range',
    blockId: info.blockId,
    blockType: info.type,
    blockFingerprint: info.fingerprint,
    snapshotText: text.slice(0, 300),
    quote,
    prefix: text.slice(Math.max(0, startOffset - 50), startOffset),
    suffix: text.slice(endOffset, endOffset + 50),
    startOffset,
    endOffset,
  }
}

export function buildBlockAnchorFromIndex(
  blockInfos: BlockInfo[],
  index: number,
): BlockAnchor | null {
  const info = blockInfos[index]
  if (!info?.blockId) return null

  return {
    mode: 'block',
    blockId: info.blockId,
    blockType: info.type,
    blockFingerprint: info.fingerprint,
    snapshotText: info.textContent.slice(0, 300),
  }
}

```

```tsx
'use client'
import type { CommentAnchor } from '@haklex/rich-editor'
import clsx from 'clsx'
import { AnimatePresence, m } from 'motion/react'
import { useTranslations } from 'next-intl'
import { useEffect, useMemo, useRef, useState } from 'react'

import { useIsMobile } from '~/atoms/hooks/viewport'
import { MotionButtonBase } from '~/components/ui/button'
import { DividerVertical } from '~/components/ui/divider'
import { useModalStack } from '~/components/ui/modal'
import { DOMCustomEvents } from '~/constants/event'
import { useIsClient } from '~/hooks/common/use-is-client'
import { stopPropagation } from '~/lib/dom'
import { toast } from '~/lib/toast'

import {
  buildRangeAnchorFromSelection,
  extractBlockInfos,
} from '../comment/anchor-utils'
import { useIsInBanCopyContext } from './BanCopyWrapper'
import { CommentModal } from './CommentModal'

export const WithArticleSelectionAction: Component<{
  refId: string
  title: string
  canComment: boolean
  contentFormat?: string
  content?: string
}> = ({ refId, title, children, canComment, contentFormat, content }) => {
  const t = useTranslations('common')
  const isMobile = useIsMobile()
  const [pos, setPos] = useState({
    x: 0,
    y: 0,
  })
  const [show, setShow] = useState(false)
  const [selectedText, setSelectedText] = useState('')
  const ref = useRef<HTMLDivElement>(null)

  const isLexical = contentFormat === 'lexical'
  const blockInfos = useMemo(
    () => (isLexical && content ? extractBlockInfos(content) : []),
    [isLexical, content],
  )

  useEffect(() => {
    const handler = (e: MouseEvent): void => {
      if (window.getSelection()?.toString().length === 0) {
        setShow(false)
        return
      }
      if (ref.current?.contains(e.target as Node)) return
      setShow(false)
    }
    document.addEventListener('mousedown', handler)
    document.addEventListener('mouseup', handler)
    return () => {
      document.removeEventListener('mousedown', handler)
      document.removeEventListener('mouseup', handler)
    }
  }, [])

  const isClient = useIsClient()
  const { present } = useModalStack()

  useEffect(() => {
    const timer = setTimeout(() => {
      document.dispatchEvent(new CustomEvent(DOMCustomEvents.RefreshToc))
    }, 1000)
    return () => {
      clearTimeout(timer)
    }
  }, [])

  const canCopy = !useIsInBanCopyContext()

  const actionCanActivated = canCopy || canComment

  if (isMobile || !isClient) return children
  if (!actionCanActivated) return children

  const buildAnchorFromCurrentSelection = (): CommentAnchor | null => {
    if (!isLexical || blockInfos.length === 0) return null
    const sel = window.getSelection()
    if (!sel || sel.isCollapsed) return null
    const contentEl = ref.current?.querySelector('[data-lexical-content]')
      ?? ref.current?.querySelector('.rich-content')
    if (!contentEl) return null
    return buildRangeAnchorFromSelection(sel, contentEl, blockInfos)
  }

  return (
    <div
      className="relative"
      ref={ref}
      onMouseUp={(e) => {
        const $ = ref.current
        if (!$) return

        const selection = window.getSelection()
        if (!selection) return
        const selectedText = selection.toString()
        if (selectedText.length === 0) return
        const { top, left } = $.getBoundingClientRect()
        setShow(true)
        setSelectedText(selectedText)
        setPos({
          x: e.clientX - left + 10,
          y: e.clientY - top + 10,
        })
      }}
    >
      {children}

      <AnimatePresence>
        {show && (
          <m.div
            className={clsx(
              'absolute z-10 rounded-lg bg-gradient-to-b from-zinc-50/50 to-white/90 p-1 text-sm shadow-lg shadow-zinc-800/5 ring-1 ring-zinc-900/5',
              'backdrop-blur-xs dark:from-zinc-900/50 dark:to-zinc-800/90 dark:ring-white/10 dark:hover:ring-white/20',
              'whitespace-nowrap [&_button]:whitespace-nowrap',
            )}
            style={{
              left: pos.x,
              top: pos.y - 40,
            }}
            initial={{ y: 10, opacity: 0.8, scale: 0.1 }}
            animate={{ y: 0, opacity: 1, scale: 1 }}
            exit={{
              scale: 0,
              opacity: 0,
            }}
          >
            {canCopy && (
              <>
                <MotionButtonBase
                  data-event="selection-comment"
                  className="rounded-md px-2 py-1 hover:bg-slate-100/80 dark:hover:bg-zinc-900/90"
                  onMouseUp={stopPropagation}
                  onClick={() => {
                    navigator.clipboard.writeText(selectedText)
                    setShow(false)
                    toast.success(t('selection_copy_success'))
                  }}
                >
                  {t('selection_copy')}
                </MotionButtonBase>
                <DividerVertical className="mx-1" />
              </>
            )}
            {canComment && (
              <MotionButtonBase
                data-event="selection-comment"
                className="rounded-md px-2 py-1 hover:bg-slate-100/80 dark:hover:bg-zinc-900/90"
                onClick={() => {
                  const anchor = buildAnchorFromCurrentSelection()
                  present({
                    title: t('selection_comment'),
                    content: (rest) => (
                      <CommentModal
                        refId={refId}
                        title={title}
                        anchor={anchor}
                        initialValue={
                          anchor
                            ? undefined
                            : `> ${selectedText?.split('\n').join('')}\n\n`
                        }
                        {...rest}
                      />
                    ),
                  })
                }}
              >
                {t('selection_quote_comment')}
              </MotionButtonBase>
            )}
          </m.div>
        )}
      </AnimatePresence>
    </div>
  )
}

```

```tsx
import type { CommentAnchor } from '@haklex/rich-editor'

import type { ModalContentComponent } from '~/components/ui/modal'
import { useCurrentModal } from '~/components/ui/modal'

import { CommentsLazy } from '../comment'
import { CommentBoxRoot } from '../comment/CommentBox'

export interface CommentModalProps {
  title: string
  refId: string

  initialValue?: string
  anchor?: CommentAnchor | null
}

export const CommentModal: ModalContentComponent<CommentModalProps> = (
  props,
) => {
  const { refId, title, initialValue, anchor } = props
  const { dismiss } = useCurrentModal()

  return (
    <div className="overflow-hidden md:w-[500px] lg:w-[600px] xl:w-[700px]">
      <span>
        回复： <h1 className="mt-4 text-lg font-medium">{title}</h1>
      </span>

      {anchor && anchor.mode === 'range' && (
        <blockquote className="my-3 border-l-2 border-accent/40 pl-3 text-sm italic text-zinc-500 dark:text-zinc-400">
          {anchor.quote}
        </blockquote>
      )}

      {anchor && anchor.mode === 'block' && (
        <div className="my-3 text-sm text-zinc-500 dark:text-zinc-400">
          评论了「{anchor.snapshotText.slice(0, 60)}
          {anchor.snapshotText.length > 60 ? '…' : ''}」
        </div>
      )}

      <CommentBoxRoot
        initialValue={initialValue}
        className="mb-12 mt-6"
        refId={refId}
        anchor={anchor}
        autoFocus
        afterSubmit={() => {
          setTimeout(dismiss, 1000)
        }}
      />

      <CommentsLazy refId={refId} />
    </div>
  )
}

```

```text
   103→    }
   104→  }

   141→      )
   142→    content = <>{children}</>

   182→
   183→export function RichRenderer({
```

_**Agent (claude-opus-4-6 2026-02-27 14:58:22Z)**_

<tool-use data-tool-type="write" data-tool-name="Write"><details>
<summary>Tool use: **Write**</summary>

```tsx
'use client'

import type { CommentModel } from '@mx-space/api-client'
import type { CommentAnchor, RangeAnchor } from '@haklex/rich-editor'
import { useEffect } from 'react'

import type { BlockInfo } from './anchor-utils'
import { getTextOffset } from './anchor-utils'

type CommentWithAnchor = CommentModel & { anchor?: CommentAnchor }

function collectRangeAnchors(comments: CommentWithAnchor[]): RangeAnchor[] {
  const result: RangeAnchor[] = []
  for (const c of comments) {
    if (c.anchor?.mode === 'range') result.push(c.anchor)
    if (c.children) {
      result.push(...collectRangeAnchors(c.children as CommentWithAnchor[]))
    }
  }
  return result
}

function findBlockElement(
  contentEl: Element,
  blockInfos: BlockInfo[],
  blockId: string,
): Element | null {
  const idx = blockInfos.findIndex((b) => b.blockId === blockId)
  if (idx < 0) return null
  return contentEl.children[idx] ?? null
}

function createDomRange(
  blockEl: Element,
  startOffset: number,
  endOffset: number,
): Range | null {
  const walker = document.createTreeWalker(blockEl, NodeFilter.SHOW_TEXT)
  let offset = 0
  let startNode: Text | null = null
  let startNodeOffset = 0
  let endNode: Text | null = null
  let endNodeOffset = 0
  let node: Node | null

  while ((node = walker.nextNode())) {
    const textNode = node as Text
    const len = textNode.length

    if (!startNode && offset + len >= startOffset) {
      startNode = textNode
      startNodeOffset = startOffset - offset
    }
    if (offset + len >= endOffset) {
      endNode = textNode
      endNodeOffset = endOffset - offset
      break
    }
    offset += len
  }

  if (!startNode || !endNode) return null

  const range = document.createRange()
  range.setStart(startNode, startNodeOffset)
  range.setEnd(endNode, endNodeOffset)
  return range
}

export function CommentAnchorHighlight({
  containerRef,
  blockInfos,
  comments,
}: {
  containerRef: React.RefObject<HTMLElement | null>
  blockInfos: BlockInfo[]
  comments: CommentWithAnchor[]
}) {
  useEffect(() => {
    if (typeof CSS === 'undefined' || !('highlights' in CSS)) return
    if (!containerRef.current) return

    const contentEl = containerRef.current.querySelector('.rich-content')
    if (!contentEl) return

    const rangeAnchors = collectRangeAnchors(comments)
    if (rangeAnchors.length === 0) {
      ;(CSS as any).highlights.delete('comment-highlight')
      return
    }

    const ranges: Range[] = []
    for (const anchor of rangeAnchors) {
      const blockEl = findBlockElement(contentEl, blockInfos, anchor.blockId)
      if (!blockEl) continue

      const range = createDomRange(blockEl, anchor.startOffset, anchor.endOffset)
      if (range) ranges.push(range)
    }

    if (ranges.length > 0) {
      const highlight = new (window as any).Highlight(...ranges)
      ;(CSS as any).highlights.set('comment-highlight', highlight)
    } else {
      ;(CSS as any).highlights.delete('comment-highlight')
    }

    return () => {
      ;(CSS as any).highlights.delete('comment-highlight')
    }
  }, [containerRef, blockInfos, comments])

  return null
}

```

<summary>Tool use: **Write**</summary>

```tsx
'use client'

import { useTranslations } from 'next-intl'
import { useCallback, useEffect, useRef, useState } from 'react'

import { useModalStack } from '~/components/ui/modal'

import type { BlockInfo } from './anchor-utils'
import { buildBlockAnchorFromIndex } from './anchor-utils'
import { CommentModal } from '../shared/CommentModal'

export function CommentBlockButton({
  containerRef,
  blockInfos,
  refId,
  title,
}: {
  containerRef: React.RefObject<HTMLElement | null>
  blockInfos: BlockInfo[]
  refId: string
  title: string
}) {
  const [hoverIndex, setHoverIndex] = useState(-1)
  const [btnPos, setBtnPos] = useState({ top: 0, right: 0 })
  const btnRef = useRef<HTMLButtonElement>(null)
  const { present } = useModalStack()
  const t = useTranslations('common')

  const handleMouseMove = useCallback(
    (e: MouseEvent) => {
      const container = containerRef.current
      if (!container) return

      const contentEl = container.querySelector('.rich-content')
      if (!contentEl) return

      const children = contentEl.children
      const containerRect = container.getBoundingClientRect()

      for (let i = 0; i < children.length; i++) {
        const child = children[i] as HTMLElement
        const rect = child.getBoundingClientRect()
        if (e.clientY >= rect.top && e.clientY <= rect.bottom) {
          setHoverIndex(i)
          setBtnPos({
            top: rect.top - containerRect.top + 4,
            right: 0,
          })
          return
        }
      }
      setHoverIndex(-1)
    },
    [containerRef],
  )

  const handleMouseLeave = useCallback(() => {
    setHoverIndex(-1)
  }, [])

  useEffect(() => {
    const container = containerRef.current
    if (!container) return

    container.addEventListener('mousemove', handleMouseMove)
    container.addEventListener('mouseleave', handleMouseLeave)
    return () => {
      container.removeEventListener('mousemove', handleMouseMove)
      container.removeEventListener('mouseleave', handleMouseLeave)
    }
  }, [containerRef, handleMouseMove, handleMouseLeave])

  if (hoverIndex < 0) return null

  return (
    <button
      ref={btnRef}
      type="button"
      className="absolute z-10 flex size-6 items-center justify-center rounded-full bg-zinc-200/80 text-zinc-500 opacity-0 transition-opacity hover:bg-accent/20 hover:text-accent group-hover/comment-block:opacity-100 dark:bg-zinc-700/80 dark:text-zinc-400"
      style={{
        top: btnPos.top,
        right: btnPos.right,
      }}
      onClick={() => {
        const anchor = buildBlockAnchorFromIndex(blockInfos, hoverIndex)
        present({
          title: t('selection_comment'),
          content: (rest) => (
            <CommentModal
              refId={refId}
              title={title}
              anchor={anchor}
              {...rest}
            />
          ),
        })
      }}
    >
      <i className="icon-[mingcute--comment-line] text-sm" />
    </button>
  )
}

```

_**Agent (claude-opus-4-6 2026-02-27 14:59:53Z)**_

<tool-use data-tool-type="write" data-tool-name="Write"><details>
<summary>Tool use: **Write**</summary>

```tsx
'use client'

import type { CommentAnchor } from '@haklex/rich-editor'
import type { CommentModel, PaginateResult } from '@mx-space/api-client'
import type { InfiniteData } from '@tanstack/react-query'
import { useQueryClient } from '@tanstack/react-query'
import type { PropsWithChildren } from 'react'
import { useMemo, useRef } from 'react'

import { buildCommentsQueryKey } from '~/queries/keys'

import type { BlockInfo } from './anchor-utils'
import { extractBlockInfos } from './anchor-utils'
import { CommentAnchorHighlight } from './CommentAnchorHighlight'
import { CommentBlockButton } from './CommentBlockButton'

type CommentWithAnchor = CommentModel & { anchor?: CommentAnchor }

export function LexicalCommentWrapper({
  content,
  refId,
  title,
  children,
}: PropsWithChildren<{
  content: string
  refId: string
  title: string
}>) {
  const containerRef = useRef<HTMLDivElement>(null)
  const blockInfos = useMemo<BlockInfo[]>(
    () => extractBlockInfos(content),
    [content],
  )

  const queryClient = useQueryClient()
  const commentsData = queryClient.getQueryData<
    InfiniteData<PaginateResult<CommentWithAnchor & { ref: string }>>
  >(buildCommentsQueryKey(refId))

  const comments = useMemo(() => {
    if (!commentsData) return []
    return commentsData.pages.flatMap((page) => page.data)
  }, [commentsData])

  return (
    <div ref={containerRef} className="group/comment-block relative">
      {children}
      <CommentBlockButton
        containerRef={containerRef}
        blockInfos={blockInfos}
        refId={refId}
        title={title}
      />
      <CommentAnchorHighlight
        containerRef={containerRef}
        blockInfos={blockInfos}
        comments={comments}
      />
    </div>
  )
}

```


```tsx
'use client'

import { LexicalCommentWrapper } from '~/components/modules/comment/LexicalCommentWrapper'
import { MainLexicalContent } from '~/components/ui/rich-content/MainLexicalContent'
import { useCurrentPostDataSelector } from '~/providers/post/CurrentPostDataProvider'

export const PostLexicalRenderer = () => {
  const content = useCurrentPostDataSelector((data) => data?.content)
  const refId = useCurrentPostDataSelector((data) => data?.id)
  const title = useCurrentPostDataSelector((data) => data?.title)
  if (!content) return null
  return (
    <LexicalCommentWrapper content={content} refId={refId!} title={title!}>
      <MainLexicalContent content={content} className="min-w-0 w-full" />
    </LexicalCommentWrapper>
  )
}
```

```text
   390→    --tint: 214;

   392→    --base: hsl(var(--tint, 214) 80% 27% / calc(var(--alpha, 4) * 1%));
   393→    /**

   396→    --shade: hsl(from var(--base) calc(h + 8) 25 calc(l - 5));

   399→      0 3px 3px -1.5px var(--shade), 0 6px 6px -3px var(--shade),

   429→@layer components {
   430→  .mask-scroller {
   431→    --mask-top: 0px;
   432→    --mask-bottom: 30px;
   433→    mask: linear-gradient(
   434→      to bottom,
   435→      transparent calc(var(--mask-top) - 30px),
   436→      black var(--mask-top),
   437→      black calc(100% - var(--mask-bottom)),
   438→      transparent calc(100% - var(--mask-bottom) + 30px)
   439→    );
   440→  }
   441→
   442→  @supports (animation-timeline: scroll(self block)) {
   443→    .mask-scroller {
   444→      animation-name: mask-up, mask-down;
   445→      animation-duration: 1s, 1s;
   446→      animation-timing-function: linear, linear;
   447→      animation-fill-mode: both, both;
   448→      animation-timeline:
   449→        scroll(self block),
   450→        scroll(self block);
   451→      animation-range:
   452→        0 50px,
   453→        calc(100% - 50px) 100%;
   454→    }
   455→  }
   456→  @supports (animation-timeline: scroll()) and (not (animation-timeline: scroll(self block))) {
   457→    .mask-scroller {
   458→      animation-name: mask-up, mask-down;
   459→      animation-duration: 1s, 1s;
   460→      animation-timing-function: linear, linear;
   461→      animation-fill-mode: both, both;
   462→      animation-timeline: scroll(), scroll();
   463→      animation-range:
   464→        0 50px,
   465→        calc(100% - 50px) 100%;
   466→    }
   467→  }
   468→  @keyframes mask-up {
   469→    to {
   470→      --mask-top: 30px;
   471→    }
   472→  }
   473→  @keyframes mask-down {
```

```text
{"threadId":"019c9fa1-5da8-7243-b8e9-7c3cf425a598","content":"**Findings**\n1. **High**: Range anchor is captured too late and can be lost before submit.  \n[WithArticleSelectionAction.tsx:83](<REPO_ROOT>/apps/web/src/components/modules/shared/WithArticleSelectionAction.tsx:83), [WithArticleSelectionAction.tsx:156](<REPO_ROOT>/apps/web/src/components/modules/shared/WithArticleSelectionAction.tsx:156)  \n`buildAnchorFromCurrentSelection()` runs inside button `onClick`, after the user clicks the popup button. When comments load/refresh, this component won’t re-render from query updates, so `CommentAnchorHighlight` can stay stale or empty until an unrelated re-render.\n\n3. **Medium-High**: Offset math is inconsistent around line breaks, causing incorrect anchors/quotes in some blocks.  \n[anchor-utils.ts:31](<REPO_ROOT>/apps/web/src/components/modules/comment/anchor-utils.ts:31), [anchor-utils.ts:89](<REPO_ROOT>/apps/web/src/components/modules/comment/anchor-utils.ts:89), [anchor-utils.ts:127](<REPO_ROOT>/apps/web/src/components/modules/comment/anchor-utils.ts:127)  \n`getTextContent` counts `linebreak` as `\\n`, but `getTextOffset` only walks text nodes (ignores `<br>`). For selections after line breaks, stored offsets and `quote/prefix/suffix` can drift.\n\n4. **Medium**: Custom Highlight API safety/fallback handling is incomplete.  \n[CommentAnchorHighlight.tsx:79](<REPO_ROOT>/apps/web/src/components/modules/comment/CommentAnchorHighlight.tsx:79), [CommentAnchorHighlight.tsx:101](<REPO_ROOT>/apps/web/src/components/modules/comment/CommentAnchorHighlight.tsx:101), [layer.css:497](<REPO_ROOT>/apps/web/src/styles/layer.css:497)  \nOnly `CSS.highlights` is checked; `window.Highlight` construction isn’t guarded, and range construction isn’t wrapped for bad anchor payloads. Unsupported browsers get no visual fallback at all (anchor info only appears in comment text).\n\n5. **Medium**: `blockType` for heading anchors diverges from canonical rich-editor anchor shape.  \n[anchor-utils.ts:20](<REPO_ROOT>/apps/web/src/components/modules/comment/anchor-utils.ts:20), [comment-anchor.ts:233](<REPO_ROOT>/packages/rich-editor/src/utils/comment-anchor.ts:233)  \nWeb extraction emits `heading-h1`/`heading-h2`, while canonical builder uses `heading`. _**Agent (claude-opus-4-6 2026-02-27 15:14:27Z)**_
```

Use `useQueryClient` with a subscription approach. The simplest fix is to use `useQuery`/`useInfiniteQuery` data selector or just import the same query. Let me use a simpler approach with `useIsFetching` + explicit subscription by importing `useCommentsQuery` data through a custom atom approach. Actually the simplest fix is to subscribe to the query data reactively:

_**Agent (claude-opus-4-6 2026-02-27 15:14:34Z)**_

<tool-use data-tool-type="write" data-tool-name="Write"><details>
<summary>Tool use: **Write**</summary>

```tsx
'use client'

import type { CommentAnchor } from '@haklex/rich-editor'
import type { CommentModel, PaginateResult } from '@mx-space/api-client'
import type { InfiniteData } from '@tanstack/react-query'
import { useQueryClient } from '@tanstack/react-query'
import type { PropsWithChildren } from 'react'
import { useMemo, useRef, useSyncExternalStore } from 'react'

import { buildCommentsQueryKey } from '~/queries/keys'

import type { BlockInfo } from './anchor-utils'
import { extractBlockInfos } from './anchor-utils'
import { CommentAnchorHighlight } from './CommentAnchorHighlight'
import { CommentBlockButton } from './CommentBlockButton'

type CommentWithAnchor = CommentModel & { anchor?: CommentAnchor }
type CommentsQueryData = InfiniteData<
  PaginateResult<CommentWithAnchor & { ref: string }>
>

function useCommentsQueryData(refId: string): CommentWithAnchor[] {
  const queryClient = useQueryClient()
  const queryKey = useMemo(() => buildCommentsQueryKey(refId), [refId])
  const queryCache = queryClient.getQueryCache()

  const data = useSyncExternalStore(
    (onStoreChange) => {
      const unsubscribe = queryCache.subscribe((event) => {
        if (
          event.type === 'updated' &&
          event.query.queryHash === JSON.stringify(queryKey)
        ) {
          onStoreChange()
        }
      })
      return unsubscribe
    },
    () => queryClient.getQueryData<CommentsQueryData>(queryKey),
    () => undefined,
  )

  return useMemo(() => {
    if (!data) return []
    return data.pages.flatMap((page) => page.data)
  }, [data])
}

export function LexicalCommentWrapper({
  content,
  refId,
  title,
  children,
}: PropsWithChildren<{
  content: string
  refId: string
  title: string
}>) {
  const containerRef = useRef<HTMLDivElement>(null)
  const blockInfos = useMemo<BlockInfo[]>(
    () => extractBlockInfos(content),
    [content],
  )

  const comments = useCommentsQueryData(refId)

  return (
    <div ref={containerRef} className="group/comment-block relative">
      {children}
      <CommentBlockButton
        containerRef={containerRef}
        blockInfos={blockInfos}
        refId={refId}
        title={title}
      />
      <CommentAnchorHighlight
        containerRef={containerRef}
        blockInfos={blockInfos}
        comments={comments}
      />
    </div>
  )
}

```

</details></tool-use>

### Fix 3: Line break offset 不一致

`getTextContent` 将 `linebreak` 计为 `\n`，但 `getTextOffset` 的 DOM TreeWalker 只走文本节点。在 DOM 中 `<br>` 渲染为 `BR` 元素而非文本节点。我需要让 `getTextOffset` 也处理 `<br>`:

## 实现总结

### 新建文件（5）
| 文件 | 用途 |
|------|------|
| `atoms/comment-anchor.ts` | `pendingCommentAnchorAtom` |
| `comment/anchor-utils.ts` | 纯 DOM anchor 构建工具：`extractBlockInfos`, `buildRangeAnchorFromSelection`, `buildBlockAnchorFromIndex` |
| `comment/CommentAnchorHighlight.tsx` | CSS Custom Highlight API 渲染 range 评论高亮 |
| `comment/CommentBlockButton.tsx` | hover block 时浮动评论按钮 |
| `comment/LexicalCommentWrapper.tsx` | 包装 lexical 内容，提供 containerRef/blockInfos，渲染上述两组件 |

### 修改文件（14）
| 文件 | 改动 |
|------|------|
| `comment/types.ts` | `anchor?: CommentAnchor \| null` |
| `CommentBox/providers.tsx` | 新增 `anchor` atom，Provider 接收并初始化 |
| `CommentBox/Root.tsx` | 传递 `anchor` prop |
| `CommentBox/hooks.tsx` | API 调用包含 anchor，成功后清除 |
| `Comment.tsx` | 评论卡显示 anchor 引用文本/段落指示 |
| `WithArticleSelectionAction.tsx` | mouseUp 时预构建 RangeAnchor（缓存避免 click 丢失），lexical 内容传 anchor 代替 blockquote |
| `CommentModal.tsx` | 接收并展示 anchor 预览，传给 CommentBoxRoot |
| 3× pageExtra.tsx | 传递 `contentFormat`/`content` 到 WithArticleSelectionAction |
| 3× LexicalRenderer.tsx | 包装 LexicalCommentWrapper |
| `layer.css` | `::highlight(comment-highlight)` 样式 |

### Codex 审查修复
1. Selection 在 click 前丢失 → mouseUp 时缓存 anchor
2. Query data 不响应式 → `useSyncExternalStore` 订阅 queryCache
3. Line break offset 偏移 → TreeWalker 处理 `<br>` 元素
4. Highlight API guard → 增加 `window.Highlight` 检查 + try/catch
5. blockType 与 core 一致 → 直接使用 `node.type`
6. `anchor?: any` → `anchor?: CommentAnchor`

Ready for feedback.

_**Agent (claude-opus-4-6 2026-02-27 15:38:02Z)**_

<think><details><summary>Thought Process</summary>
The issue is that Tailwind CSS 4 / Lightning CSS doesn't recognize `::highlight()` as a valid pseudo-element. This is a relatively new CSS feature (CSS Custom Highlight API). The CSS parser used by Tailwind/Lightning CSS doesn't support it yet.

I need to inject this CSS in a way that bypasses the CSS parser. Options:
1. Use a raw CSS file that's not processed by Tailwind/Lightning CSS
2. Inject the style via JavaScript at runtime
3. Use `@layer` with a raw string approach

The simplest approach is to inject the highlight style via JavaScript in the `CommentAnchorHighlight` component itself, since it's already managing the Highlight API programmatically.


I'll inject a `<style>` element directly in the component when the Highlight API is available, since Next.js processes all CSS imports through Tailwind anyway.
</details></think>

_**Agent (claude-opus-4-6 2026-02-27 15:38:03Z)**_

Tailwind 4 / Lightning CSS 不识别 `::highlight()` 伪元素。需将该样式从 CSS 文件移除，改为在 JS 中动态注入。

```text
    25→  blockId: string,
    26→): Element | null {
    27→  const idx = blockInfos.findIndex((b) => b.blockId === blockId)
    28→  if (idx === -1) return null
    29→  return contentEl.children[idx] ?? null
    30→}
    31→
    32→function createDomRange(
    33→  blockEl: Element,
    34→  startOffset: number,
    35→  endOffset: number,
    36→): Range | null {
    37→  const walker = document.createTreeWalker(
    38→    blockEl,
    39→    NodeFilter.SHOW_TEXT | NodeFilter.SHOW_ELEMENT,
    40→    {
    41→      acceptNode(node) {
    42→        if (node.nodeType === Node.TEXT_NODE) return NodeFilter.FILTER_ACCEPT
    43→        if (node instanceof HTMLBRElement) return NodeFilter.FILTER_ACCEPT
    44→        return NodeFilter.FILTER_SKIP
    45→      },
    46→    },
    47→  )
    48→  let offset = 0
    49→  let startNode: Text | null = null
    50→  let startNodeOffset = 0
    51→  let endNode: Text | null = null
    52→  let endNodeOffset = 0
    53→  let node: Node | null
    54→
    55→  while ((node = walker.nextNode())) {
    56→    const len = node.nodeType === Node.TEXT_NODE ? (node as Text).length : 1
    57→
    58→    if (!startNode && node.nodeType === Node.TEXT_NODE && offset + len >= startOffset) {
    59→      startNode = node as Text
    60→      startNodeOffset = startOffset - offset
    61→    }
    62→    if (node.nodeType === Node.TEXT_NODE && offset + len >= endOffset) {
    63→      endNode = node as Text
    64→      endNodeOffset = endOffset - offset
    65→      break
    66→    }
    67→    offset += len
    68→  }
    69→
    70→  if (!startNode || !endNode) return null
    71→
    72→  try {
    73→    const range = document.createRange()
    74→    range.setStart(startNode, startNodeOffset)
    75→    range.setEnd(endNode, endNodeOffset)
    76→    return range
    77→  } catch {
    78→    return null
    79→  }
    80→}
    81→
    82→export function CommentAnchorHighlight({
    83→  containerRef,
    84→  blockInfos,
    85→  comments,
```

_**Agent (claude-opus-4-6 2026-02-27 15:42:02Z)**_

<think><details><summary>Thought Process</summary>
Now I see the issue. Both `rich-kit-shiro` and `rich-static-renderer` are at version `0.0.41` locally, but `apps/web` depends on version `0.0.40` of them. So pnpm should resolve to npm published `0.0.40`, not the local workspace `0.0.41`.

But `rich-static-renderer` has `"@haklex/rich-style-token": "workspace:*"` as a dependency - this means the published `0.0.40` version of `rich-static-renderer` would have had this resolved to a specific npm version.


When `apps/web` pulls in `@haklex/rich-static-renderer@0.0.40` from npm, that package has `@haklex/rich-style-token` as a dependency with an actual version number instead of `workspace:*`. However, since `@haklex/rich-style-token` exists in the local workspace, pnpm might be hoisting it and using the local version instead of respecting what the npm package specifies. I'm realizing my `import type` statements from `@haklex/rich-editor` might be causing the bundler to resolve that package even though it's just a type import, and since `@haklex/rich-editor` exists in the local workspace, pnpm is pulling the local version instead of respecting the npm-published versions that `apps/web` should be using.

The cleanest solution is to define those simple type interfaces directly in the web app rather than importing them from the editor package.
</details></think>

```typescript
export interface BlockAnchor {
  mode: 'block'
  blockId: string
  blockType: string
  blockFingerprint: string
  snapshotText: string

  blockType: string
  blockFingerprint: string

  quote: string
  prefix: string
  suffix: string
  startOffset: number
  endOffset: number
}

}
```

<summary>
1. Primary Request and Intent:
   The user asked to implement a Comment Anchor System for `apps/web` in the Shiroi monorepo. The system enables range (text selection) and block (paragraph-level) comment anchoring on articles using `contentFormat === 'lexical'`. The plan has 9 steps: anchor atoms, DOM anchor utils, comment creation flow with anchor, selection action building RangeAnchor, CommentModal passing anchor, block comment button, CSS Custom Highlight for range comments, fetching comments with anchors, and displaying anchor info in comment cards.

2. Key Technical Concepts:
   - **CommentAnchor types**: `BlockAnchor` (mode: 'block', blockId, blockType, blockFingerprint, snapshotText) and `RangeAnchor` (extends block with quote, prefix, suffix, startOffset, endOffset)
   - **Lexical serialized state**: Block IDs stored under `$` key in JSON (`{ "type": "paragraph", "$": { "blockId": "uuid" } }`)
   - **CSS Custom Highlight API**: `CSS.highlights`, `window.Highlight` for rendering range comment highlights
   - **DOM-based anchor building**: Pure DOM TreeWalker approach to compute text offsets without Lexical runtime
   - **ShiroRenderer**: Renders blocks as direct children of `.rich-content` element, 1:1 mapping with serialized root children
   - **Jotai atoms**: Used for anchor state in comment creation flow
   - **TanStack Query**: `useSyncExternalStore` subscription to query cache for reactive comment data
   - **Vanilla Extract**: `.css.ts` files in editor packages require proper build processing; apps/web must use npm-published versions, not local workspace source
   - **pnpm workspace**: Local packages at version 0.0.41/0.0.42 vs npm published versions; `apps/web` should resolve to npm versions

3. Files and Code Sections:

   - **`apps/web/src/atoms/comment-anchor.ts`** (NEW)
     - Global atom for pending comment anchor during creation
     ```typescript
     import type { CommentAnchor } from '@haklex/rich-editor'
     import { atom } from 'jotai'
     export const pendingCommentAnchorAtom = atom<CommentAnchor | null>(null)
     ```
     - **Needs update**: import should change from `@haklex/rich-editor` to local types path

   - **`apps/web/src/components/modules/comment/types.ts`** (MODIFIED)
     - Central type definitions and re-exports for anchor types
     ```typescript
     import type { CommentAnchor } from '@haklex/rich-editor'
     export type { BlockAnchor, CommentAnchor, RangeAnchor } from '@haklex/rich-editor'
     export interface CommentBaseProps {
       refId: string
       afterSubmit?: () => void
       initialValue?: string
       autoFocus?: boolean
       anchor?: CommentAnchor | null
     }
     ```

   - **`apps/web/src/components/modules/comment/anchor-utils.ts`** (NEW)
     - Pure DOM anchor building utilities: `extractBlockInfos`, `findBlockIndex`, `getTextOffset`, `buildRangeAnchorFromSelection`, `buildBlockAnchorFromIndex`, `computeBlockFingerprint`
     - `getTextOffset` uses TreeWalker with `SHOW_TEXT | SHOW_ELEMENT` filter handling `<br>` elements
     - `getNodeType` returns `node.type` directly (matching core's `block.getType()`)
     - Import already updated to `./types`

   - **`apps/web/src/components/modules/comment/CommentBox/providers.tsx`** (MODIFIED)
     - Added `anchor: atom<CommentAnchor | null>(null)` to `createInitialValue()`
     - `CommentBoxProvider` accepts `anchor` prop and initializes atom via `useBeforeMounted`
     - Import already updated to `../types`

   - **`apps/web/src/components/modules/comment/CommentBox/Root.tsx`** (MODIFIED)
     - Destructures `anchor` from props, passes to `CommentBoxProvider`

   - **`apps/web/src/components/modules/comment/CommentBox/hooks.tsx`** (MODIFIED)
     - `useSendComment` reads `anchorAtom` from context
     - `commentDto` typed as `CommentDto & { anchor?: CommentAnchor }` 
     - Owner comment API call includes `...(anchor ? { anchor } : {})`
     - `onSuccess` clears anchor: `jotaiStore.set(anchorAtom, null)`
     - **Needs update**: import still uses `@haklex/rich-editor`

   - **`apps/web/src/components/modules/shared/WithArticleSelectionAction.tsx`** (MODIFIED)
     - Added props: `contentFormat?: string`, `content?: string`
     - `cachedAnchorRef` caches anchor at mouseUp time (fixes selection-lost-on-click bug)
     - `buildAnchorFromSelection()` finds `.rich-content` element and calls `buildRangeAnchorFromSelection`
     - For lexical content: passes anchor instead of blockquote initialValue
     - **Needs update**: import still uses `@haklex/rich-editor`

   - **`apps/web/src/components/modules/shared/CommentModal.tsx`** (MODIFIED)
     - Accepts `anchor?: CommentAnchor | null` prop
     - Shows blockquote preview for range anchor, text preview for block anchor
     - Passes anchor to `CommentBoxRoot`
     - **Needs update**: import still uses `@haklex/rich-editor`

   - **`apps/web/src/components/modules/comment/Comment.tsx`** (MODIFIED)
     - Destructures anchor from comment: `const { anchor } = comment as CommentModel & { anchor?: CommentAnchor }`
     - Range anchor: shows quote in border-l styled div
     - Block anchor: shows "评论了「...」" text
     - Import already updated to `./types`

   - **`apps/web/src/components/modules/comment/CommentAnchorHighlight.tsx`** (NEW)
     - Effect component (returns null)
     - `ensureHighlightStyle()` dynamically injects `<style>` for `::highlight(comment-highlight)` (bypasses Lightning CSS parser)
     - `createDomRange()` handles BR elements in TreeWalker
     - Guards: checks `CSS.highlights`, `window.Highlight`, try/catch on Range creation
     - Import already updated to `./types`

   - **`apps/web/src/components/modules/comment/CommentBlockButton.tsx`** (NEW)
     - Hover-activated floating comment button on block right edge
     - `handleMouseMove` finds hovered block in `.rich-content` children
     - Clicks build `BlockAnchor` and open `CommentModal`

   - **`apps/web/src/components/modules/comment/LexicalCommentWrapper.tsx`** (NEW)
     - Wraps lexical content with containerRef, renders `CommentBlockButton` + `CommentAnchorHighlight`
     - `useCommentsQueryData()` uses `useSyncExternalStore` to subscribe to TanStack Query cache reactively
     - Import already updated to `./types`

   - **`apps/web/src/app/[locale]/posts/(post-detail)/[category]/[slug]/PostLexicalRenderer.tsx`** (MODIFIED)
     - Wraps `MainLexicalContent` with `LexicalCommentWrapper`, passing content/refId/title

   - **`apps/web/src/app/[locale]/notes/[id]/NoteLexicalRenderer.tsx`** (MODIFIED)
     - Same pattern as PostLexicalRenderer for notes

   - **`apps/web/src/app/[locale]/(page-detail)/[slug]/PageLexicalRenderer.tsx`** (MODIFIED)
     - Same pattern for pages

   - **3x pageExtra.tsx** (MODIFIED)
     - Post: `useCurrentPostDataSelector((data) => data?.contentFormat)` 
     - Note: `useCurrentNoteDataSelector((data) => data?.data.contentFormat)`
     - Page: `useCurrentPageDataSelector((data) => data?.contentFormat)`
     - All pass `contentFormat` and `content` (when lexical) to `WithArticleSelectionAction`

   - **`apps/web/src/styles/layer.css`** (MODIFIED)
     - `::highlight(comment-highlight)` CSS was REMOVED because Lightning CSS can't parse it
     - Style now injected dynamically via JS in CommentAnchorHighlight

4. Errors and fixes:
   - **ESLint errors (6)**: `simple-import-sort/imports`, `prefer-destructuring`, `unicorn/consistent-existence-index-check`, `react-google-translate/no-conditional-text-nodes-with-siblings` → Fixed import order, used destructuring, `=== -1` instead of `< 0`, wrapped conditional text in template literals inside `<span>`
   - **Codex review finding: Selection lost on click**: `buildAnchorFromCurrentSelection()` ran in onClick where selection may be collapsed → Fixed by caching anchor in `cachedAnchorRef` during `onMouseUp`
   - **Codex review finding: Query data not reactive**: `queryClient.getQueryData()` is a snapshot → Fixed with `useSyncExternalStore` subscribing to `queryCache`
   - **Codex review finding: Line break offset drift**: `getTextContent` counts linebreak as `\n` but `getTextOffset` only walks text nodes → Fixed TreeWalker to include `HTMLBRElement` with `SHOW_ELEMENT` filter
   - **Codex review finding: Highlight API safety**: Only `CSS.highlights` checked → Added `typeof (window as any).Highlight !== 'function'` guard + try/catch on Range creation
   - **Codex review finding: blockType mismatch**: Web extraction emitted `heading-h1` vs core's `heading` → Fixed `getNodeType` to return `node.type` directly
   - **Codex review finding: `anchor?: any`**: → Changed to `anchor?: CommentAnchor` with proper import
   - **`::highlight(comment-highlight)` CSS parse error**: Tailwind 4 / Lightning CSS doesn't recognize `::highlight()` pseudo-element → Removed from layer.css, inject dynamically via `ensureHighlightStyle()` in CommentAnchorHighlight
   - **Vanilla Extract `rich-style-token/src/vars.css.ts` error**: `import type { CommentAnchor } from '@haklex/rich-editor'` caused bundler to resolve to local workspace source (which has `.css.ts` files requiring vanilla-extract build). User corrected: **"解法应该是我发包，然后你 apps/web 安装依赖，使用依赖的 type。我已经发布了 0.0.42 版本"** → Installed `@haklex/rich-editor@0.0.42`, `@haklex/rich-kit-shiro@0.0.42`, `@haklex/rich-static-renderer@0.0.42` as npm dependencies. Then started updating imports so files within `comment/` module use local re-exports from `types.ts`.

5. Problem Solving:
   - Solved the entire comment anchor system implementation across 5 new files and 14 modified files

```text
    34→} from './providers'
    35→
    36→export const useUseCommentReply = () => use(CommentIsReplyContext)
    37→
    38→export const useCommentOriginalRefId = () => {

    51→
    52→export const useGetCommentBoxAtomValues = () => use(CommentBoxContext)
    53→export const useCommentBoxLifeCycle = () => use(CommentBoxLifeCycleContext)
    54→
    55→// ReactNode 导致 tsx 无法推断，过于复杂
    56→const commentActionLeftSlotAtom = atom(null as PropsWithChildren['children'])
    57→export const useCommentActionLeftSlot = () =>
    58→  useAtomValue(commentActionLeftSlotAtom)
    59→
    60→export const setCommentActionLeftSlot = (slot: PropsWithChildren['children']) =>
    61→  jotaiStore.set(commentActionLeftSlotAtom, slot)
    62→
    63→export const useCommentBoxHasText = () =>
    64→  useAtomValue(
    65→    selectAtom(
    66→      use(CommentBoxContext).text,
    67→      useCallback((v) => v.length > 0, []),
    68→    ),
    69→  )
    70→
    71→export const useCommentBoxTextIsOversize = () =>
    72→  useAtomValue(

    75→      useCallback((v) => v.length > MAX_COMMENT_TEXT_LENGTH, []),

    78→type CommentContextValue = ReturnType<typeof createInitialValue>
    79→
    80→export const useSetCommentBoxValues = <
    81→  T extends keyof CommentContextValue,
    82→>() => {
    83→  const ctx = use(CommentBoxContext)

    85→    (key: T, value: ExtractAtomValue<CommentContextValue[T]>) => {

    90→    [ctx],

    92→}
    93→
    94→// Comment Mode
    95→
    96→export const enum CommentBoxMode {
    97→  'legacy',
    98→  'with-auth',
    99→}
   100→
   101→const commentModeAtom = atomWithStorage(
   102→  'comment-mode',
   103→  CommentBoxMode['with-auth'],
   104→)
   105→
   106→export const useCommentMode = () => useAtomValue(commentModeAtom)
   107→export const setCommentMode = (mode: CommentBoxMode) =>
   108→  jotaiStore.set(commentModeAtom, mode)
   109→
   110→export const useSendComment = () => {
   111→  const commentRefId = useCommentBoxRefIdValue()
   112→  const {
   113→    text: textAtom,
   114→    author: authorAtom,
   115→    mail: mailAtom,
   116→    url: urlAtom,
   117→
   118→    source: sourceAtom,
   119→    avatar: avatarAtom,
   120→
   121→    anchor: anchorAtom,
   122→
   123→    isWhisper: isWhisperAtom,
   124→    syncToRecently: syncToRecentlyAtom,
   125→  } = useGetCommentBoxAtomValues()
   126→  const { afterSubmit } = useCommentBoxLifeCycle()
   127→  const isLogged = useIsOwnerLogged()
   128→  const queryClient = useQueryClient()
   129→  const isReply = useUseCommentReply()
   130→  const originalRefId = useCommentOriginalRefId()
   131→  const completedCallback = useCommentCompletedCallback()
   132→
   133→  const wrappedCompletedCallback = <T extends CommentModel>(data: T): T => {
   134→    completedCallback?.(data)
   135→    return data
   136→  }
   137→
   138→  const { mutate, isPending } = useMutation({
   139→    mutationFn: async (refId: string) => {
   140→      const text = jotaiStore.get(textAtom)
   141→      const author = jotaiStore.get(authorAtom)
   142→      const mail = jotaiStore.get(mailAtom)
   143→      const avatar = jotaiStore.get(avatarAtom)
   144→      const source = jotaiStore.get(sourceAtom) as any
   145→      const url = jotaiStore.get(urlAtom)
   146→      const anchor = jotaiStore.get(anchorAtom)
   147→
   148→      const commentDto: CommentDto & { anchor?: CommentAnchor } = { text, author, mail, avatar, source, url }
   149→      if (anchor) commentDto.anchor = anchor
   150→
   151→      if (isLogged) {
   152→        delete commentDto.avatar
   153→      }
   154→
   155→      // Omit empty string key
   156→      Object.keys(commentDto).forEach((key) => {
   157→        // @ts-expect-error
   158→        if (commentDto[key] === '') delete commentDto[key]
   159→      })
   160→
   161→      // Reply Comment
   162→      if (isReply) {
   163→        if (isLogged) {
   164→          return apiClient.comment.proxy.owner
   165→            .reply(refId)
   166→            .post<CommentModel>({
   167→              data: {
   168→                text,
   169→                source,
   170→              },
   171→            })
   172→            .then(wrappedCompletedCallback)
   173→        } else {
   174→          return apiClient.comment
   175→            .reply(refId, commentDto)
   176→            .then(wrappedCompletedCallback)
   177→        }
   178→      }
   179→
   180→      // Normal Comment
   181→      const isWhisper = jotaiStore.get(isWhisperAtom)
   182→      const syncToRecently = jotaiStore.get(syncToRecentlyAtom)
   183→
   184→      if (isLogged) {
   185→        return apiClient.comment.proxy.owner
   186→          .comment(refId)
   187→          .post<CommentModel>({
   188→            data: { text, source, ...(anchor ? { anchor } : {}) },
   189→          })
   190→          .then(async (res) => {
   191→            if (syncToRecently)
   192→              apiClient.recently.proxy
   193→                .post({
   194→                  data: {
   195→                    content: text,
   196→                    ref: refId,
   197→                  },
   198→                })
   199→                .then(() => {
   200→                  toast.success('已同步到碎碎念')
   201→                })
   202→
   203→            return res
   204→          })
   205→          .then(wrappedCompletedCallback)
   206→      }
   207→      // @ts-ignore
   208→      commentDto.isWhispers = isWhisper
   209→      return apiClient.comment
   210→        .comment(refId, commentDto)
   211→        .then(wrappedCompletedCallback)
   212→    },
   213→    mutationKey: [commentRefId, 'comment'],
   214→    onError(error: RequestError) {
   215→      toast.error(getErrorMessageFromRequestError(error))
   216→    },
   217→    onSuccess(data) {
   218→      afterSubmit?.()
   219→
   220→      const toastCopy = isLogged
   221→        ? '发表成功啦~'
   222→        : isReply
   223→          ? '感谢你的回复！'
   224→          : '感谢你的评论！'
   225→
   226→      const commentListQueryKey = buildCommentsQueryKey(originalRefId)
   227→
   228→      toast.success(toastCopy)
   229→      jotaiStore.set(textAtom, '')
   230→      jotaiStore.set(anchorAtom, null)
   231→
   232→      queryClient.setQueryData<
   233→        InfiniteData<
   234→          PaginateResult<
   235→            CommentModel & {
   236→              ref: string
   237→            }
   238→          >
   239→        >
   240→      >(commentListQueryKey, (oldData) => {
   241→        if (!oldData) return oldData
   242→        if (isReply) {
   243→          // find the reply refed comment
   244→
   245→          return produce(oldData, (draft) => {
   246→            const dfs = (
   247→              data: CommentModel,
   248→              commentRefId: string,
   249→              newData: CommentModel & { new?: boolean },
   250→            ) => {
   251→              if (data.id === commentRefId) {
   252→                if (!data.children) {
   253→                  data.children = []
   254→                }
   255→                ;(data.children as (CommentModel & { new: boolean })[]).push({
   256→                  ...newData,
   257→                  new: true,
   258→                })
   259→                return true
   260→              }
   261→              if (!data.children) {
   262→                return
   263→              }
   264→              for (const child of data.children) {
   265→                if (dfs(child, commentRefId, newData)) {
   266→                  return true
   267→                }
   268→              }
   269→              return false
   270→            }
   271→
   272→            const dataToAdd = {
   273→              ...data,
   274→              new: true,
   275→            }
   276→
   277→            for (const page of draft.pages) {
   278→              for (const item of page.data) {
   279→                if (dfs(item, commentRefId, dataToAdd)) {
   280→                  break
   281→                }
   282→              }
   283→            }
   284→          })
   285→        }
   286→
   287→        return produce(oldData, (draft) => {
   288→          draft.pages[0].data.unshift({
   289→            ...data,
   290→            // @ts-ignore
   291→            new: true,
   292→          })
   293→        })
   294→      })
   295→    },
   296→  })
   297→
   298→  return [
   299→    useCallback(() => mutate(commentRefId), [commentRefId, mutate]),
   300→    isPending,
   301→  ] as const
   302→}
   303→
```

```text
    21→import { useIsInBanCopyContext } from './BanCopyWrapper'

    23→
    24→export const WithArticleSelectionAction: Component<{
    25→  refId: string
    26→  title: string
    27→  canComment: boolean
    28→  contentFormat?: string
    29→  content?: string
    30→}> = ({ refId, title, children, canComment, contentFormat, content }) => {

    32→  const isMobile = useIsMobile()
    33→  const [pos, setPos] = useState({

    45→    [isLexical, content],
    46→  )
    47→
    48→  useEffect(() => {
    49→    const handler = (e: MouseEvent): void => {
    50→      if (window.getSelection()?.toString().length === 0) {

    52→        return
    53→      }
    54→      if (ref.current?.contains(e.target as Node)) return
    55→      setShow(false)
    56→    }
    57→    document.addEventListener('mousedown', handler)
    58→    document.addEventListener('mouseup', handler)
    59→    return () => {
    60→      document.removeEventListener('mousedown', handler)
    61→      document.removeEventListener('mouseup', handler)

    68→  useEffect(() => {
    69→    const timer = setTimeout(() => {
    70→      document.dispatchEvent(new CustomEvent(DOMCustomEvents.RefreshToc))
    71→    }, 1000)
    72→    return () => {
    73→      clearTimeout(timer)
    74→    }
    75→  }, [])
    76→
    77→  const canCopy = !useIsInBanCopyContext()
    78→
    79→  const actionCanActivated = canCopy || canComment
    80→
    81→  if (isMobile || !isClient) return children
    82→  if (!actionCanActivated) return children
    83→
    84→  const buildAnchorFromSelection = (sel: Selection): CommentAnchor | null => {
    85→    if (!isLexical || blockInfos.length === 0) return null
    86→    if (sel.isCollapsed) return null
    87→    const contentEl = ref.current?.querySelector('[data-lexical-content]')
    88→      ?? ref.current?.querySelector('.rich-content')
    89→    if (!contentEl) return null
    90→    return buildRangeAnchorFromSelection(sel, contentEl, blockInfos)
    91→  }
    92→
    93→  return (
    94→    <div
    95→      className="relative"
    96→      ref={ref}
    97→      onMouseUp={(e) => {
    98→        const $ = ref.current
    99→        if (!$) return
   100→
   101→        const selection = window.getSelection()
   102→        if (!selection) return
   103→        const selectedText = selection.toString()
   104→        if (selectedText.length === 0) return
   105→        const { top, left } = $.getBoundingClientRect()
   106→
   107→        cachedAnchorRef.current = buildAnchorFromSelection(selection)
   108→
   109→        setShow(true)
   110→        setSelectedText(selectedText)
   111→        setPos({
   112→          x: e.clientX - left + 10,
   113→          y: e.clientY - top + 10,
   114→        })
   115→      }}
   116→    >
   117→      {children}
   118→
   119→      <AnimatePresence>
   120→        {show && (
   121→          <m.div
   122→            className={clsx(
   123→              'absolute z-10 rounded-lg bg-gradient-to-b from-zinc-50/50 to-white/90 p-1 text-sm shadow-lg shadow-zinc-800/5 ring-1 ring-zinc-900/5',
   124→              'backdrop-blur-xs dark:from-zinc-900/50 dark:to-zinc-800/90 dark:ring-white/10 dark:hover:ring-white/20',
   125→              'whitespace-nowrap [&_button]:whitespace-nowrap',
   126→            )}
   127→            style={{
   128→              left: pos.x,
   129→              top: pos.y - 40,
   130→            }}
   131→            initial={{ y: 10, opacity: 0.8, scale: 0.1 }}
   132→            animate={{ y: 0, opacity: 1, scale: 1 }}
   133→            exit={{
   134→              scale: 0,
   135→              opacity: 0,
   136→            }}
   137→          >
   138→            {canCopy && (
   139→              <>
   140→                <MotionButtonBase
   141→                  data-event="selection-comment"
   142→                  className="rounded-md px-2 py-1 hover:bg-slate-100/80 dark:hover:bg-zinc-900/90"
   143→                  onMouseUp={stopPropagation}
   144→                  onClick={() => {
   145→                    navigator.clipboard.writeText(selectedText)
   146→                    setShow(false)
   147→                    toast.success(t('selection_copy_success'))
   148→                  }}
   149→                >
   150→                  {t('selection_copy')}
   151→                </MotionButtonBase>
   152→                <DividerVertical className="mx-1" />
   153→              </>
   154→            )}
   155→            {canComment && (
   156→              <MotionButtonBase
   157→                data-event="selection-comment"
   158→                className="rounded-md px-2 py-1 hover:bg-slate-100/80 dark:hover:bg-zinc-900/90"
   159→                onClick={() => {
   160→                  const anchor = cachedAnchorRef.current
   161→                  present({
   162→                    title: t('selection_comment'),
   163→                    content: (rest) => (
   164→                      <CommentModal
   165→                        refId={refId}
   166→                        title={title}
   167→                        anchor={anchor}
   168→                        initialValue={
   169→                          anchor
   170→                            ? undefined
   171→                            : `> ${selectedText?.split('\n').join('')}\n\n`
   172→                        }
   173→                        {...rest}
   174→                      />
   175→                    ),
   176→                  })
   177→                }}
   178→              >
   179→                {t('selection_quote_comment')}
   180→              </MotionButtonBase>
   181→            )}
   182→          </m.div>
   183→        )}
   184→      </AnimatePresence>
   185→    </div>
   186→  )
   187→}
   188→
```

```text
    62→    const container = containerRef.current
    63→    if (!container) return
    64→
    65→    container.addEventListener('mousemove', handleMouseMove)
    66→    container.addEventListener('mouseleave', handleMouseLeave)
    67→    return () => {

    69→      container.removeEventListener('mouseleave', handleMouseLeave)
```

```text
    64→  anchor: CommentAnchorSchema.optional(),
    65→})
    66→
```
