   121→
   122→  private findRangeByQuoteContext(
   123→    text: string,
   124→    quote: string,
   125→    prefix = '',
   126→    suffix = '',
   127→  ): { startOffset: number; endOffset: number } | null {
   128→    if (!quote) return null
   129→
   130→    const indexes: number[] = []
   131→    let cursor = 0
   132→    while (cursor <= text.length - quote.length) {
   133→      const index = text.indexOf(quote, cursor)
   134→      if (index === -1) break
   135→      indexes.push(index)
   136→      cursor = index + 1
   137→    }
   138→
   139→    if (!indexes.length) return null
   140→
   141→    const expectedPrefix = prefix || ''
   142→    const expectedSuffix = suffix || ''
   143→
   144→    const withContext = indexes.find((index) => {
   145→      const left = text.slice(
   146→        Math.max(0, index - expectedPrefix.length),
   147→        index,
   148→      )
   149→      const right = text.slice(
   150→        index + quote.length,
   151→        index + quote.length + expectedSuffix.length,
   152→      )
   153→      const prefixMatched = expectedPrefix ? left === expectedPrefix : true
   154→      const suffixMatched = expectedSuffix ? right === expectedSuffix : true
   155→      return prefixMatched && suffixMatched
   156→    })
   157→
   158→    const picked = withContext ?? (indexes.length === 1 ? indexes[0] : null)
   159→    if (picked == null) {
   160→      return null
   161→    }
   162→
   163→    return {
   164→      startOffset: picked,
   165→      endOffset: picked + quote.length,
   166→    }
   167→  }
   168→
   169→  private projectRangeFromSnapshot(
   170→    snapshotText: string,
   171→    currentText: string,
   172→    startOffset: number,
   173→    endOffset: number,
   174→  ): { startOffset: number; endOffset: number } | null {
   175→    const safeStart = Math.max(0, Math.min(startOffset, snapshotText.length))
   176→    const safeEnd = Math.max(safeStart, Math.min(endOffset, snapshotText.length))
   177→    const selected = snapshotText.slice(safeStart, safeEnd)
   178→    if (!selected) return null
   179→
   180→    const patches = dmp.patch_make(snapshotText, currentText)
   181→    const [projectedPrefix, prefixFlags] = dmp.patch_apply(
   182→      patches,
   183→      snapshotText.slice(0, safeStart),
   184→    )
   185→    const [projectedSelection, selectionFlags] = dmp.patch_apply(
   186→      patches,
   187→      snapshotText.slice(0, safeEnd),
   188→    )
   189→
   190→    if (
   191→      !prefixFlags.every(Boolean) ||
   192→      !selectionFlags.every(Boolean) ||
   193→      typeof projectedPrefix !== 'string' ||
   194→      typeof projectedSelection !== 'string'
   195→    ) {
   196→      return null
   197→    }
   198→
   199→    const nextStart = projectedPrefix.length
   200→    const nextEnd = projectedSelection.length
   201→
   202→    if (nextEnd < nextStart || nextEnd > currentText.length) {
   203→      return null
   204→    }
   205→
   206→    return {
   207→      startOffset: nextStart,
   208→      endOffset: nextEnd,
   209→    }
   210→  }
   211→
   212→  private findBlockByAnchor(
   213→    anchor: Pick<
   214→      CommentAnchorModel,
   215→      'blockId' | 'blockFingerprint' | 'blockType' | 'snapshotText'
   216→    >,
   217→    blocks: LexicalRootBlock[],
   218→  ): LexicalRootBlock | null {
   219→    const blockById = blocks.find((block) => block.id === anchor.blockId)
   220→    if (blockById) {
   221→      return blockById
   222→    }
   223→
   224→    const byFingerprint = blocks.find((block) => {
   225→      if (!anchor.blockFingerprint) return false
   226→      if (block.fingerprint !== anchor.blockFingerprint) return false
   227→      if (anchor.blockType && block.type !== anchor.blockType) return false
   228→      return true
   229→    })
   230→    if (byFingerprint) {
   231→      return byFingerprint
   232→    }
   233→
   234→    if (anchor.blockType) {
   235→      const bySnapshot = blocks.find(
   236→        (block) => block.type === anchor.blockType && block.text === anchor.snapshotText,
   237→      )
   238→      if (bySnapshot) {
   239→        return bySnapshot
   240→      }
   241→    }
   242→
   243→    return null
   244→  }
   245→
   246→  private resolveAnchorForCreate(
   247→    anchor: CommentAnchorInput | undefined,
   248→    refDoc: Pick<WriteBaseModel, 'contentFormat' | 'content'>,
   249→  ): CommentAnchorModel | undefined {
   250→    if (!anchor) {
   251→      return undefined
   252→    }
   253→
   254→    if (
   255→      refDoc.contentFormat !== ContentFormat.Lexical ||
   256→      !refDoc.content ||
   257→      typeof refDoc.content !== 'string'
   258→    ) {
   259→      throw new BizException(
   260→        ErrorCodeEnum.InvalidParameter,
   261→        'Anchor comments are only supported for lexical content.',
   262→      )
   263→    }
   264→
   265→    const blocks = this.lexicalService.extractRootBlocks(refDoc.content)
   266→    const block = this.findBlockByAnchor(anchor, blocks)
   267→    if (!block || !block.id) {
   268→      throw new BizException(
   269→        ErrorCodeEnum.InvalidParameter,
   270→        'Cannot find the anchor block in current lexical document.',
   271→      )
   272→    }
   273→
   274→    const now = new Date()
   275→    const contentHash = md5(refDoc.content)
   276→
   277→    if (anchor.mode === CommentAnchorMode.Block) {
   278→      return {
   279→        mode: CommentAnchorMode.Block,
   280→        blockId: block.id,
   281→        blockType: block.type,
   282→        blockFingerprint: block.fingerprint,
   283→        snapshotText: block.text,
   284→        contentHashAtCreate: contentHash,
   285→        contentHashCurrent: contentHash,
   286→        lastResolvedAt: now,
   287→      }
   288→    }
   289→
   290→    const quote = anchor.quote
   291→    if (!quote) {
   292→      throw new BizException(
   293→        ErrorCodeEnum.InvalidParameter,
   294→        'Range anchor quote cannot be empty.',
   295→      )
   296→    }
   297→
   298→    const initialSlice = block.text.slice(anchor.startOffset, anchor.endOffset)
   299→    const range =
   300→      initialSlice === quote
   301→        ? {
   302→            startOffset: anchor.startOffset,
   303→            endOffset: anchor.endOffset,
   304→          }
   305→        : this.findRangeByQuoteContext(
   306→            block.text,
   307→            quote,
   308→            anchor.prefix,
   309→            anchor.suffix,
   310→          )
   311→
   312→    if (!range) {
   313→      throw new BizException(
   314→        ErrorCodeEnum.InvalidParameter,
   315→        'Cannot resolve selected text in current block.',
   316→      )
   317→    }
   318→
   319→    return {
   320→      mode: CommentAnchorMode.Range,
   321→      blockId: block.id,
   322→      blockType: block.type,
   323→      blockFingerprint: block.fingerprint,
   324→      snapshotText: block.text,
   325→      quote,
   326→      prefix: anchor.prefix ?? '',
   327→      suffix: anchor.suffix ?? '',
   328→      startOffset: range.startOffset,
   329→      endOffset: range.endOffset,
   330→      contentHashAtCreate: contentHash,
   331→      contentHashCurrent: contentHash,
   332→      lastResolvedAt: now,
   333→    }
   334→  }
   335→
   336→  private resolveAnchorForUpdatedContent(
   337→    anchor: CommentAnchorModel,
   338→    blocks: LexicalRootBlock[],
   339→    contentHash: string,
   340→  ): CommentAnchorModel | null {
   341→    const targetBlock = this.findBlockByAnchor(anchor, blocks)
   342→    if (!targetBlock || !targetBlock.id) {
   343→      return null
   344→    }
   345→
   346→    const baseAnchor = {
   347→      ...anchor,
   348→      blockId: targetBlock.id,
   349→      blockType: targetBlock.type,
   350→      blockFingerprint: targetBlock.fingerprint,
   351→      snapshotText: targetBlock.text,
   352→      contentHashCurrent: contentHash,
   353→      lastResolvedAt: new Date(),
   354→    }
   355→
   356→    if (anchor.mode === CommentAnchorMode.Block) {
   357→      return {
   358→        ...baseAnchor,
   359→        mode: CommentAnchorMode.Block,
   360→      }
   361→    }
   362→
   363→    const quote = anchor.quote
   364→    if (!quote) {
   365→      return null
   366→    }
   367→
   368→    const currentSlice = targetBlock.text.slice(
   369→      anchor.startOffset ?? 0,
   370→      anchor.endOffset ?? 0,
   371→    )
   372→
   373→    let range =
   374→      currentSlice === quote
   375→        ? {
   376→            startOffset: anchor.startOffset ?? 0,
   377→            endOffset: anchor.endOffset ?? 0,
   378→          }
   379→        : this.findRangeByQuoteContext(
   380→            targetBlock.text,
   381→            quote,
   382→            anchor.prefix ?? '',
   383→            anchor.suffix ?? '',
   384→          )
   385→
   386→    if (!range && typeof anchor.snapshotText === 'string') {
   387→      const projected = this.projectRangeFromSnapshot(
   388→        anchor.snapshotText,
   389→        targetBlock.text,
   390→        anchor.startOffset ?? 0,
   391→        anchor.endOffset ?? 0,
   392→      )
   393→      if (
   394→        projected &&
   395→        targetBlock.text.slice(projected.startOffset, projected.endOffset) ===
   396→          quote
   397→      ) {
   398→        range = projected
   399→      }
   400→    }
   401→
   402→    if (!range) {
   403→      range = this.findRangeByQuoteContext(targetBlock.text, quote)
   404→    }
   405→
   406→    if (!range) {
   407→      return null
   408→    }
   409→
   410→    return {
   411→      ...baseAnchor,
   412→      mode: CommentAnchorMode.Range,
   413→      quote,
   414→      prefix: anchor.prefix ?? '',
   415→      suffix: anchor.suffix ?? '',
   416→      startOffset: range.startOffset,
   417→      endOffset: range.endOffset,
   418→    }
   419→  }
   420→
   421→  private async reanchorCommentsByRef(
   422→    refType: CollectionRefTypes,
   423→    refId: string,
   424→  ) {
   425→    if (!refId) return
   426→
   427→    const refModel = this.getModelByRefType(refType)
   428→    const refDoc = await refModel
   429→      .findById(refId)
   430→      .select('content contentFormat')
   431→      .lean()
   432→
   433→    if (
   434→      !refDoc ||
   435→      refDoc.contentFormat !== ContentFormat.Lexical ||
   436→      !refDoc.content ||
   437→      typeof refDoc.content !== 'string'
   438→    ) {
   439→      return
   440→    }
   441→
   442→    const blocks = this.lexicalService.extractRootBlocks(refDoc.content)
   443→    const contentHash = md5(refDoc.content)
   444→
   445→    const comments = await this.commentModel
   446→      .find({
   447→        ref: refId,
   448→        refType,
   449→        parent: undefined,
   450→        anchor: { $exists: true },
   451→      })
   452→      .lean()
   453→
   454→    const deleting: string[] = []
   455→
   456→    for (const comment of comments) {
   457→      if (!comment.anchor) continue
   458→
   459→      const nextAnchor = this.resolveAnchorForUpdatedContent(
   460→        comment.anchor as CommentAnchorModel,
   461→        blocks,
   462→        contentHash,
   463→      )
   464→
   465→      if (!nextAnchor) {
   466→        deleting.push(comment.id ?? comment._id.toString())
   467→        continue
   468→      }
   469→
   470→      await this.commentModel.updateOne(
   471→        { _id: comment._id },
   472→        {
   473→          $set: {
   474→            anchor: nextAnchor,
   475→          },
   476→        },
   477→      )
   478→    }
   479→
   480→    for (const id of deleting) {
   481→      try {
   482→        await this.deleteComments(id)
   483→        await this.eventManager.emit(
   484→          BusinessEvents.COMMENT_DELETE,
   485→          { id },
   486→          {
   487→            scope: EventScope.TO_SYSTEM_VISITOR,
   488→            nextTick: true,
   489→          },
   490→        )
   491→      } catch (error) {
   492→        this.logger.error(`failed to delete orphan anchor comment ${id}`, error)
   493→      }
   494→    }
   495→  }
   496→
   497→  /**
   498→   * 使用 AI 评估评论内容
   499→   * @param text 评论文本
   500→   * @param aiReviewType 评审类型
   501→   * @param aiReviewThreshold 阈值
   502→   * @returns 是否应该被标记为垃圾评论
   503→   */
   504→  private async evaluateCommentWithAI(
   505→    text: string,
   506→    aiReviewType: 'binary' | 'score',
   507→    aiReviewThreshold: number,
   508→  ): Promise<boolean> {
   509→    const runtime = await this.aiService.getCommentReviewModel()
   510→
   511→    // 评分模式
   512→    if (aiReviewType === 'score') {
   513→      try {
   514→        const { output } = await runtime.generateStructured({
   515→          ...AI_PROMPTS.comment.score(text),
   516→        })
   517→
   518→        // 如果包含敏感内容直接拒绝
   519→        if (output.hasSensitiveContent) {
   520→          return true
   521→        }
   522→        // 否则根据评分判断
   523→        return output.score > aiReviewThreshold
   524→      } catch (error) {
   525→        this.logger.error('AI 评审评分模式出错', error)
   526→        return false
   527→      }
   528→    }
   529→    // 垃圾检测模式
   530→    else {
   531→      try {
   532→        const { output } = await runtime.generateStructured({
   533→          ...AI_PROMPTS.comment.spam(text),
   534→        })
   535→
   536→        // 如果包含敏感内容直接拒绝
   537→        if (output.hasSensitiveContent) {
   538→          return true
   539→        }
   540→        // 否则按照是否 spam 判断
   541→        return output.isSpam
   542→      } catch (error) {
   543→        this.logger.error('AI 评审垃圾检测模式出错', error)
   544→        return false
   545→      }
   546→    }
   547→  }
   548→
   549→  async checkSpam(doc: CommentModel) {
   550→    const res = await (async () => {
   551→      const commentOptions = await this.configsService.get('commentOptions')
   552→      if (!commentOptions.antiSpam) {
   553→        return false
   554→      }
   555→      const owner = await this.ownerService.getOwner()
   556→      if (doc.author === owner.username || doc.author === owner.name) {
   557→        return false
   558→      }
   559→      if (commentOptions.blockIps) {
   560→        if (!doc.ip) {
   561→          return false
   562→        }
   563→        const isBlock = commentOptions.blockIps.some((ip) =>
   564→          // @ts-ignore
   565→          new RegExp(ip, 'gi').test(doc.ip),
   566→        )
   567→        if (isBlock) {
   568→          return true
   569→        }
   570→      }
   571→
   572→      const customKeywords = commentOptions.spamKeywords || []
   573→      const isBlock = [...customKeywords, ...BlockedKeywords].some((keyword) =>
   574→        new RegExp(keyword, 'gi').test(doc.text),
   575→      )
   576→
   577→      if (isBlock) {
   578→        return true
   579→      }
   580→
   581→      if (commentOptions.disableNoChinese && !hasChinese(doc.text)) {
   582→        return true
   583→      }
   584→
   585→      if (commentOptions.aiReview) {
   586→        return this.evaluateCommentWithAI(
   587→          doc.text,
   588→          commentOptions.aiReviewType,
   589→          commentOptions.aiReviewThreshold,
   590→        )
   591→      }
   592→      return false
   593→    })()
   594→    if (res) {
   595→      this.logger.warn(
   596→        '--> 检测到一条垃圾评论：' +
   597→          `作者：${doc.author}, IP: ${doc.ip}, 内容为：${doc.text}`,
   598→      )
   599→    }
   600→    return res
   601→  }
   602→
   603→  async assignReaderToComment(
   604→    doc: Partial<CommentModel>,
   605→  ): Promise<(ReaderModel & { id: string }) | null> {
   606→    const readerId = RequestContext.currentRequest()?.readerId
   607→
   608→    let reader: ReaderModel | null = null
   609→    if (readerId) {
   610→      reader = await this.readerService
   611→        .findReaderInIds([readerId])
   612→        .then((readers) => readers[0] ?? null)
   613→    }
   614→
   615→    if (!reader) {
   616→      return null
   617→    }
   618→    doc.author = reader.name
   619→    doc.mail = reader.email
   620→    doc.avatar = reader.image
   621→
   622→    return { ...reader, id: readerId! }
   623→  }
   624→  async createComment(
   625→    id: string,
   626→    doc: Partial<CommentModel>,
   627→    type?: CollectionRefTypes,
   628→  ) {
   629→    const reader = await this.assignReaderToComment(doc)
   630→
   631→    let ref: (WriteBaseModel & { _id: any }) | null = null
   632→    let refType = type
   633→    if (type) {
   634→      const model = this.getModelByRefType(type)
   635→
   636→      ref = await model.findById(id).lean()
   637→    } else {
   638→      const result = await this.databaseService.findGlobalById(id)
   639→      if (result) {
   640→        const { type, document } = result
   641→        ref = document as any
   642→        refType = type
   643→      }
   644→    }
   645→    if (!ref) {
   646→      throw new BizException(ErrorCodeEnum.CommentPostNotExists)
   647→    }
   648→    const normalizedAnchor = this.resolveAnchorForCreate(
   649→      doc.anchor as CommentAnchorInput | undefined,
   650→      ref,
   651→    )
   652→    if (normalizedAnchor) {
   653→      doc.anchor = normalizedAnchor
   654→    } else {
   655→      delete (doc as Partial<CommentModel>).anchor
   656→    }
   657→
   658→    const commentIndex = ref.commentsIndex || 0
   659→    doc.key = `#${commentIndex + 1}`
   660→
   661→    const comment = await this.commentModel.create({
   662→      ...doc,
   663→      state: RequestContext.currentIsAuthenticated()
   664→        ? CommentState.Read
   665→        : CommentState.Unread,
   666→      ref: new Types.ObjectId(id),
   667→      readerId: reader ? reader.id : undefined,
   668→      refType,
   669→    })
   670→
   671→    await this.databaseService.getModelByRefType(refType!).updateOne(
   672→      { _id: ref._id },
   673→      {
   674→        $inc: {
   675→          commentsIndex: 1,
   676→        },
   677→      },
   678→    )
   679→
   680→    return comment
   681→  }
   682→
   683→  async afterCreateComment(
   684→    commentId: string,
   685→    ipLocation: { ip: string },
   686→    isAuthenticated: boolean,
   687→  ) {
   688→    const comment = await this.commentModel
   689→      .findById(commentId)
   690→      .lean({
   691→        getters: true,
   692→      })
   693→      .select('+ip +agent')
   694→
   695→    const readerId = RequestContext.currentRequest()?.readerId
   696→    if (!comment) return
   697→    scheduleManager.schedule(async () => {
   698→      if (isAuthenticated) {
   699→        return
   700→      }
   701→      await this.appendIpLocation(commentId, ipLocation.ip)
   702→    })
   703→
   704→    scheduleManager.batch(async () => {
   705→      const configs = await this.configsService.get('commentOptions')
   706→      const { commentShouldAudit } = configs
   707→      if ((await this.checkSpam(comment)) && !readerId) {
   708→        await this.commentModel.updateOne(
   709→          { _id: commentId },
   710→          {
   711→            state: CommentState.Junk,
   712→          },
   713→        )
   714→
   715→        return
   716→      } else if (!isAuthenticated) {
   717→        this.sendEmail(comment, CommentReplyMailType.Owner)
   718→      }
   719→
   720→      await this.eventManager.broadcast(
   721→        BusinessEvents.COMMENT_CREATE,
   722→        comment,
   723→        {
   724→          scope: EventScope.TO_SYSTEM_ADMIN,
   725→        },
   726→      )
   727→
   728→      if ((!commentShouldAudit || isAuthenticated) && !comment.isWhispers) {
   729→        await this.eventManager.broadcast(
   730→          BusinessEvents.COMMENT_CREATE,
   731→          omit(comment, ['ip', 'agent']),
   732→          {
   733→            scope: EventScope.TO_VISITOR,
   734→          },
   735→        )
   736→      }
   737→    })
   738→  }
   739→
   740→  async validAuthorName(author: string): Promise<void> {
   741→    const isExist = await this.ownerService.isOwnerName(author)
   742→    if (isExist) {
   743→      throw new BizException(
   744→        ErrorCodeEnum.InvalidParameter,
   745→        '用户名与主人重名啦，但是你好像并不是我的主人唉',
   746→      )
   747→    }
   748→  }
   749→
   750→  async deleteComments(id: string) {
   751→    const comment = await this.commentModel.findById(id).lean()
   752→    if (!comment) {
   753→      throw new NoContentCanBeModifiedException()
   754→    }
   755→
   756→    const { children, parent } = comment
   757→    if (children && children.length > 0) {
   758→      await Promise.all(
   759→        children.map(async (id) => {
   760→          await this.deleteComments(id as any as string)
   761→        }),
   762→      )
   763→    }
   764→    if (parent) {
   765→      const parent = await this.commentModel.findById(comment.parent)
   766→      if (parent) {
   767→        await parent.updateOne({
   768→          $pull: {
   769→            children: comment._id,
   770→          },
   771→        })
   772→      }
   773→    }
   774→    await this.commentModel.deleteOne({ _id: id })
   775→  }
   776→
   777→  async allowComment(id: string, type?: CollectionRefTypes) {
   778→    if (type) {
   779→      const model = this.getModelByRefType(type)
   780→      const doc = await model.findById(id)
   781→      if (!doc) {
   782→        throw new CannotFindException()
   783→      }
   784→      return doc.allowComment ?? true
   785→    } else {
   786→      const result = await this.databaseService.findGlobalById(id)
   787→      if (!result) {
   788→        throw new CannotFindException()
   789→      }
   790→      return 'allowComment' in result ? result.allowComment : true
   791→    }
   792→  }
   793→
   794→  async getComments({ page, size, state } = { page: 1, size: 10, state: 0 }) {
   795→    const queryList = await this.commentModel.paginate(
   796→      { state },
   797→      {
   798→        select: '+ip +agent -children',
   799→        page,
   800→        limit: size,
   801→        populate: [
   802→          { path: 'parent', select: '-children' },
   803→          {
   804→            path: 'ref',
   805→            // categoryId for post
   806→            // content for recently
   807→            select: 'title _id slug nid categoryId content',
   808→          },
   809→        ],
   810→        sort: { created: -1 },
   811→        autopopulate: false,
   812→      },
   813→    )
   814→
   815→    // 过滤脏数据
   816→    this.cleanDirtyData(queryList.docs)
   817→
   818→    await this.fillAndReplaceAvatarUrl(queryList.docs)
   819→
   820→    return queryList
   821→  }
   822→
   823→  cleanDirtyData(docs: CommentModel[]) {
   824→    for (const doc of docs) {
   825→      if (!doc.children || doc.children.length === 0) {
   826→        continue
   827→      }
   828→
   829→      const nextChildren = [] as any[]
   830→
   831→      for (const child of doc.children) {
   832→        if (isObjectIdOrHexString(child)) {
   833→          this.logger.warn(`--> 检测到一条脏数据：${doc.id}.child: ${child}`)
   834→          continue
   835→        }
   836→        nextChildren.push(child)
   837→
   838→        if ((child as CommentModel).children) {
   839→          this.cleanDirtyData((child as CommentModel).children as any[])
   840→        }
   841→      }
   842→
   843→      doc.children = nextChildren
   844→    }
   845→  }
   846→
   847→  async sendEmail(comment: CommentModel, type: CommentReplyMailType) {
   848→    const enable = await this.configsService
   849→      .get('mailOptions')
   850→      .then((config) => config.enable)
   851→    if (!enable) {
   852→      return
   853→    }
   854→
   855→    const ownerInfo = await this.ownerService.getOwnerInfo()
   856→
   857→    const refType = comment.refType
   858→    const refModel = this.getModelByRefType(refType)
   859→    const refDoc = await refModel.findById(comment.ref)
   860→    const time = new Date(comment.created!)
   861→    const parent: CommentModel | null = await this.commentModel
   862→      .findOne({ _id: comment.parent })
   863→      .lean()
   864→
   865→    const parsedTime = `${time.getDate()}/${
   866→      time.getMonth() + 1
   867→    }/${time.getFullYear()}`
   868→
   869→    if (!refDoc || !ownerInfo.mail) {
   870→      return
   871→    }
   872→
   873→    this.sendCommentNotificationMail({
   874→      to: type === CommentReplyMailType.Owner ? ownerInfo.mail : parent!.mail,
   875→      type,
   876→      source: {
   877→        title: refType === CollectionRefTypes.Recently ? '速记' : refDoc.title,
   878→        text: comment.text,
   879→        author:
   880→          type === CommentReplyMailType.Guest ? parent!.author : comment.author,
   881→        owner: ownerInfo.name,
   882→        link: await this.resolveUrlByType(refType, refDoc).then(
   883→          (url) => `${url}#comments-${comment.id}`,
   884→        ),
   885→        time: parsedTime,
   886→        mail:
   887→          CommentReplyMailType.Owner === type ? comment.mail : ownerInfo.mail,
   888→        ip: comment.ip || '',
   889→
   890→        aggregate: {
   891→          owner: ownerInfo,
   892→          commentor: {
   893→            ...pick(comment, defaultCommentModelKeys),
   894→            created: new Date(comment.created!).toISOString(),
   895→            isWhispers: comment.isWhispers || false,
   896→          } as CommentModelRenderProps,
   897→          parent,
   898→          post: {
   899→            title: refDoc.title,
   900→            created: new Date(refDoc.created!).toISOString(),
   901→            id: refDoc.id!,
   902→            modified: refDoc.modified
   903→              ? new Date(refDoc.modified!).toISOString()
   904→              : null,
   905→            text: refDoc.text,
   906→          },
   907→        },
   908→      },
   909→    })
   910→  }
   911→
   912→  async resolveUrlByType(type: CollectionRefTypes, model: any) {
   913→    const {
   914→      url: { webUrl: base },
   915→    } = await this.configsService.waitForConfigReady()
   916→    switch (type) {
   917→      case CollectionRefTypes.Note: {
   918→        return new URL(`/notes/${model.nid}`, base).toString()
   919→      }
   920→      case CollectionRefTypes.Page: {
   921→        return new URL(`/${model.slug}`, base).toString()
   922→      }
   923→      case CollectionRefTypes.Post: {
   924→        return new URL(
   925→          `/posts/${model.category.slug}/${model.slug}`,
   926→          base,
   927→        ).toString()
   928→      }
   929→      case CollectionRefTypes.Recently: {
   930→        return new URL(`/thinking/${model._id}`, base).toString()
   931→      }
   932→    }
   933→  }
   934→
   935→  async appendIpLocation(id: string, ip: string) {
   936→    if (!ip) {
   937→      return
   938→    }
   939→    const { recordIpLocation } = await this.configsService.get('commentOptions')
   940→
   941→    if (!recordIpLocation) {
   942→      return
   943→    }
   944→
   945→    const model = this.commentModel.findById(id).lean()
   946→    if (!model) {
   947→      return
   948→    }
   949→
   950→    const fnModel = (await this.serverlessService.model
   951→      .findOne({
   952→        name: 'ip',
   953→        reference: 'built-in',
   954→        type: SnippetType.Function,
   955→      })
   956→      .select('+secret')
   957→      .lean({
   958→        getters: true,
   959→      })) as SnippetModel
   960→
   961→    if (!fnModel) {
   962→      this.logger.error('[Serverless Fn] ip query function is missing.')
   963→      return model
   964→    }
   965→
   966→    const result =
   967→      await this.serverlessService.injectContextIntoServerlessFunctionAndCall(
   968→        fnModel,
   969→        {
   970→          req: {
   971→            query: { ip },
   972→          },
   973→          res: createMockedContextResponse({} as any),
   974→        } as any,
   975→      )
   976→
   977→    const location =
   978→      `${result.countryName || ''}${
   979→        result.regionName && result.regionName !== result.cityName
   980→          ? String(result.regionName)
   981→          : ''
   982→      }${result.cityName ? String(result.cityName) : ''}` || undefined
   983→
   984→    if (location) await this.commentModel.updateOne({ _id: id }, { location })
   985→  }
   986→
   987→  async fillAndReplaceAvatarUrl(comments: CommentModel[]) {
   988→    const owner = await this.ownerService.getOwner()
   989→
   990→    comments.forEach(function process(comment) {
   991→      if (typeof comment == 'string') {
   992→        return
   993→      }
   994→      // 如果是 author 是站长，就用站长自己设定的头像替换
   995→      if (comment.author === owner.name) {
   996→        comment.avatar = owner.avatar || comment.avatar
   997→      }
   998→
   999→      // 如果不存在头像就
  1000→      if (!comment.avatar) {
  1001→        comment.avatar = getAvatar(comment.mail)
  1002→      }
  1003→
  1004→      if (comment.children?.length) {
  1005→        comment.children.forEach((child) => {
  1006→          process(child as CommentModel)
  1007→        })
  1008→      }
  1009→
  1010→      return comment
  1011→    })
  1012→
  1013→    return comments
  1014→  }
  1015→
  1016→  async sendCommentNotificationMail({
  1017→    to,
  1018→    source,

<think><details><summary>Thought Process</summary>
Found it! The owner comment endpoint uses `TextOnlyDto` which is:

```typescript
export const TextOnlySchema = z.object({
  text: z.string().min(1),
  source: z.string().optional(),
})
```

It does NOT include `anchor`. So when the owner (logged-in user) creates a comment through the proxy endpoint, the `anchor` field gets stripped by the zod validation because `TextOnlyDto` only accepts `text` and `source`.

This is the blocker mentioned in the plan! The owner comment endpoint uses `TextOnlyDto` which strips anchor.

For anonymous/reader comments, the endpoint uses `CommentDto` which includes anchor (line 200-201). So anonymous comments with anchors should work.


Now I need to figure out the fix—either modify `TextOnlyDto` to accept anchor, or create a new DTO that handles text, source, and anchor together. Let me trace through the `commentByOwner` method to understand how it constructs the comment object.

然。根因乃 `TextOnlySchema`（owner 评论端点 `POST /owner/comment/:id` 所用 DTO）仅接受 `text` + `source`，anchor 被 zod 校验剥离。

<think><details><summary>Thought Process</summary>
The user is pointing out that comments are lazy-loaded (only loaded when the user scrolls to the comments section), but the anchor highlights need to appear in the article content area immediately. So we need to pre-fetch/eagerly load comments with anchors for the article content highlighting.

Let me think about the approach:

1. Currently, `LexicalCommentWrapper` uses `useCommentsQueryData(refId)` which subscribes to the query cache for the comments query key `['comments', refId]`.
2. The comments are loaded lazily by `CommentProvider` which uses `useCommentsQuery(refId)` - this only triggers when the comment section becomes visible.


3. I need to make sure the comments query fires eagerly in `LexicalCommentWrapper` so the anchor data is available immediately, either by triggering the same query key so the lazy loader can reuse the cached data, or by creating a separate lightweight query that only fetches comments with anchors.

The challenge is that `useCommentsQuery` is an infinite query, so triggering it from `LexicalCommentWrapper` would only fetch the first page—but anchor comments might be scattered across multiple pages. The cleanest solution would be a dedicated API endpoint for anchor comments, though that requires backend changes. For now, I'll start by adding the `useCommentsQuery` call in `LexicalCommentWrapper` to at least cache the initial page of comments. (or a prefetch) in `LexicalCommentWrapper` so at least the first page of comments loads eagerly
2. Or better yet, have the core API support a query parameter to filter for anchor comments only

But modifying the core API adds complexity. Let me think about a simpler approach.

Actually, the current `useCommentsQueryData` in `LexicalCommentWrapper` already subscribes to the query cache. The issue is just that nothing triggers the query until the comment section becomes visible.

The simplest fix: trigger the query from within `LexicalCommentWrapper` itself. We can call `useCommentsQuery(refId)` there (or use `queryClient.prefetchInfiniteQuery`).

But `useCommentsQuery` returns the full infinite query state. We don't need all of that in `LexicalCommentWrapper`. We just need to ensure the query is triggered.

I could use `queryClient.prefetchInfiniteQuery` to kick off the fetch, or just invoke `useCommentsQuery(refId)` directly inside the wrapper. The key insight is that `useCommentsQueryData` is already listening to the query cache through `useSyncExternalStore`, so once I trigger the query from `LexicalCommentWrapper`, the subscription will automatically pick up the cached data and re-render when it arrives. I'm weighing different approaches to handle anchor comments efficiently. Option B seems most practical—adding a query parameter to filter for anchor-only comments rather than fetching all comments or creating a new endpoint—though I should verify what the current API infrastructure supports before committing to that direction. The endpoint signature shows it only accepts `PagerDto` for pagination, so I'd need to add a filter parameter to the core API. Given that anchor comments are likely sparse per article, the most practical solution is adding a simple query parameter or dedicated endpoint in core to fetch anchor comments, then creating a corresponding query in `LexicalCommentWrapper` to use it. I'm realizing the cache strategy matters here—if I add a separate anchor comments query, I need to either merge it with the main cache or use a different key entirely. The simpler path is to just trigger the main comments query eagerly in `LexicalCommentWrapper` without waiting for user interaction, letting the existing cache subscription handle the data flow. For anchor-specific filtering, I can add that to the core API later, but for now this gets the comments loading immediately when the article renders.

Since the user specifically mentioned anchor comments, the right approach is adding an `anchor` query parameter to the existing `getCommentsByRefId` method that filters for documents with an anchor field, then having `LexicalCommentWrapper` use this filtered query instead of subscribing to the full comments cache. I'm going back and forth on the implementation approach here. The simplest path forward is to just add a dedicated endpoint in the core that fetches comments filtered by anchor status, then have the web layer call it directly from `LexicalCommentWrapper` rather than trying to work around the existing API client's limitations. I'm realizing the paginated endpoint won't work well here since anchor comments shouldn't be paginated—there typically aren't many of them. I could just use a large page size like 100 as a workaround, but I need to think about what the frontend actually needs and whether that's the cleanest solution.

The web side needs to fetch all comments with anchors for a given ref to display as highlights, and since there shouldn't be more than a dozen or so, I'll add a `hasAnchor` query parameter to the existing endpoint and have the frontend call it with a reasonable size limit. Now I need to figure out how to make that API call from the web side since the current client probably doesn't support passing extra query parameters directly. I'm examining how the proxy pattern works in the codebase—it chains method calls for path segments, so I'd construct the API call by chaining `apiClient.comments.ref(refId)` with query parameters for `hasAnchor` and `size`.

Since I'm not entirely sure about the exact proxy API structure, I'm stepping back to take a simpler approach: I'll split this into two parts—updating the core endpoint to support the `hasAnchor` query parameter, then creating a new fetch function and query hook on the web side that either uses the API client's proxy or makes a direct fetch call.

_**Agent (claude-opus-4-6 2026-02-27 16:05:47Z)**_

<tool-use data-tool-type="write" data-tool-name="Write"><details>
<summary>Tool use: **Write**</summary>

```tsx
'use client'

import type { CommentModel, PaginateResult } from '@mx-space/api-client'

import type { InfiniteData } from '@tanstack/react-query'
import { useQuery, useQueryClient } from '@tanstack/react-query'
import type { PropsWithChildren } from 'react'
import { useMemo, useRef, useSyncExternalStore } from 'react'

import { apiClient } from '~/lib/request'
import { buildCommentsQueryKey } from '~/queries/keys'

import type { BlockInfo } from './anchor-utils'
import { extractBlockInfos } from './anchor-utils'
import { CommentAnchorHighlight } from './CommentAnchorHighlight'
import { CommentBlockButton } from './CommentBlockButton'
import type { CommentAnchor } from './types'

type CommentWithAnchor = CommentModel & { anchor?: CommentAnchor }
type CommentsQueryData = InfiniteData<
  PaginateResult<CommentWithAnchor & { ref: string }>
>

function useAnchorCommentsQuery(refId: string): CommentWithAnchor[] {
  const { data } = useQuery({
    queryKey: ['comments', refId, 'anchors'],
    queryFn: async () => {
      const data = await apiClient.comment.proxy.ref(refId).get<
        PaginateResult<CommentWithAnchor & { ref: string }>
      >({
        params: { hasAnchor: 'true', size: 50 },
      })
      return data
    },
    staleTime: 1000 * 60 * 5,
  })

  return useMemo(() => {
    if (!data) return []
    return data.data
  }, [data])
}

function useCachedCommentsData(refId: string): CommentWithAnchor[] {
  const queryClient = useQueryClient()
  const queryKey = useMemo(() => buildCommentsQueryKey(refId), [refId])
  const queryCache = queryClient.getQueryCache()

  const data = useSyncExternalStore(
    (onStoreChange) => {
      const unsubscribe = queryCache.subscribe((event) => {
        if (
          event.type === 'updated' &&
          event.query.queryHash === JSON.stringify(queryKey)
        ) {
          onStoreChange()
        }
      })
      return unsubscribe
    },
    () => queryClient.getQueryData<CommentsQueryData>(queryKey),
    () => null as CommentsQueryData | null,
  )

  return useMemo(() => {
    if (!data) return []
    return data.pages.flatMap((page) => page.data)
  }, [data])
}

function useMergedAnchorComments(refId: string): CommentWithAnchor[] {
  const eagerComments = useAnchorCommentsQuery(refId)
  const cachedComments = useCachedCommentsData(refId)

  return useMemo(() => {
    const map = new Map<string, CommentWithAnchor>()
    for (const c of eagerComments) map.set(c.id, c)
    for (const c of cachedComments) {
      if ((c as CommentWithAnchor).anchor) map.set(c.id, c)
    }
    return [...map.values()]
  }, [eagerComments, cachedComments])
}

export function LexicalCommentWrapper({
  content,
  refId,
  title,
  children,
}: PropsWithChildren<{
  content: string
  refId: string
  title: string
}>) {
  const containerRef = useRef<HTMLDivElement>(null)
  const blockInfos = useMemo<BlockInfo[]>(
    () => extractBlockInfos(content),
    [content],
  )

  const comments = useMergedAnchorComments(refId)

  return (
    <div ref={containerRef} className="group/comment-block relative">
      {children}
      <CommentBlockButton
        containerRef={containerRef}
        blockInfos={blockInfos}
        refId={refId}
        title={title}
      />
      <CommentAnchorHighlight
        containerRef={containerRef}
        blockInfos={blockInfos}
        comments={comments}
      />
    </div>
  )
}

```

_**Agent (claude-opus-4-6 2026-02-27 16:06:14Z)**_

Lint 0 error。总结两处修改：

**Core** (`mx-core`):
1. `comment.schema.ts` — `TextOnlySchema` 增加 `anchor: CommentAnchorSchema.optional()`，使 owner 评论端点接受 anchor
2. `comment.controller.ts` — `getCommentsByRefId` 增加 `@Query('hasAnchor') hasAnchor` 参数，当 `hasAnchor=true` 时追加 `{ anchor: { $exists: true } }` 过滤条件

**Web** (`apps/web`):
1. `LexicalCommentWrapper.tsx` — 新增 `useAnchorCommentsQuery(refId)` 使用 `useQuery` 独立预取锚点评论（`GET /comments/ref/{refId}?hasAnchor=true&size=50`），5 分钟 staleTime
2. 保留 `useCachedCommentsData` 订阅主评论列表缓存（用户新建锚点评论时即时更新）
3. `useMergedAnchorComments` 合并两数据源，按 id 去重，仅保留有 anchor 的评论

如此，文章页加载即刻预取锚点评论并渲染高亮，无需等评论区懒加载。

## Component Directory Analysis

Here's a complete breakdown of the visual/UI components available at `<TMP_DIR>/b_ENCfwcHOEnE-1772209167696/components`:

---

### **Comment-Specific Components**

#### 1. **CommentThread** (`comment-thread.tsx`)
- **Purpose**: Displays threaded comments with reply capability
- **Props**: 
  - `comments: Comment[]` - Array of existing comments

- **Visual Elements**:
  - ScrollArea container with max-height (max-h-72)
  - Avatar (size-7) for each commenter with fallback initials
  - Comment metadata: user name (font-semibold, 13px), timestamp in muted color (11px)
  - Comment content (13px, leading-relaxed, 80% opacity)
  - Textarea input (min-h-60px, resize-none)
  - Keyboard hint badge (`Cmd+Enter` to send)
  - Send button with icon
  - Border separator between existing comments and new comment area
  - Width constraint: w-80

#### 2. **InlineCommentMark** (`inline-comment-mark.tsx`)
- **Purpose**: Highlights selected text with inline comments
- **Props**:
  - `inlineComment: InlineComment` - Comment data for the text span
  - `currentUser: User` - Current user
  - `onAddReply: (inlineCommentId, content) => void` - Reply handler
  - `children: ReactNode` - The highlighted text
- **Visual Elements**:
  - Dashed underline with primary color (decoration-dashed, primary/60 → primary on hover)
  - Hover background (primary/10)
  - Popover with quoted text display
  - Curly quotes around selected text ("…")
  - Border-top separator in popover

#### 3. **SelectionToolbar** (`selection-toolbar.tsx`)
- **Purpose**: Context toolbar appearing when text is selected
- **Props**:
  - `currentUser: User`
  - `onAddInlineComment: (blockId, selectedText, startOffset, endOffset, content) => void`
  - `containerRef: React.RefObject<HTMLElement>`
- **Visual Elements**:
  - Floating toolbar (absolute positioned, z-50)
  - Pill button with MessageSquareQuote icon
  - Popover with selected text preview
  - Positioned above selection with arrow
  - Shadow-lg for depth

#### 4. **EditorBlock** (`editor-block.tsx`)
- **Purpose**: Single document block with comment gutter
- **Props**:
  - `block: Block` - Document content block
  - `inlineComments: InlineComment[]`
  - `currentUser: User`
  - `onAddComment: (blockId, content) => void`
  - `onAddInlineReply: (inlineCommentId, content) => void`
- **Visual Elements**:
  - Main content area (flex-1, rounded-md px-2 py-1.5)
  - Right gutter (w-16) for comment indicators
  - Avatar stack showing comment authors (size-6, overlapping -space-x-1.5)
  - Comment count badge (11px text)
  - MessageSquarePlus icon button (appears on hover if no comments, opacity-0 → opacity-100)
  - Background highlight on block when open (comment-highlight class)
  - Supports multiple block types: h1, h2, h3, paragraph, quote, code, list-item, divider
  - Popover on right side (side="right", align="start")

#### 5. **DocumentViewer** (`document-viewer.tsx`)
- **Purpose**: Full document interface with all comments
- **Props**: None (uses internal state)
- **Visual Elements**:
  - Sticky header (top-0, z-20, border-b)

  - Lock icon with "Read only" status

  - Uses ScrollArea, Tooltip, Avatar primitives

---

### **UI Primitive Components**

#### **Avatar** (`ui/avatar.tsx`)
- **Composition**: Root, Image, Fallback (from @radix-ui/react-avatar)
- **Base styles**: `size-8 rounded-full overflow-hidden`
- **Common sizes**: size-7, size-6 (used in comments)
- **Fallback**: `bg-muted` or `bg-accent`/`bg-primary` for styling

#### **Popover** (`ui/popover.tsx`)
- **Composition**: Root, Trigger, Content, Anchor (from @radix-ui/react-popover)
- **Content styles**: 
  - `w-72` default width (overridden with `w-auto` for comments)
  - Animations: fade-in-0, zoom-in-95
  - Border, rounded-md, shadow-md
  - Portal rendering (z-50)
- **Positioning**: side (top, bottom, right, left), align (start, center, end), sideOffset

#### **Button** (`ui/button.tsx`)
- **Variants**: default (primary), destructive, outline, secondary, ghost, link
- **Sizes**: default (h-9), sm (h-8), lg (h-10), icon variants
- **Features**: 
  - SVG icon sizing (size-4 default, respects explicit sizes)
  - Disabled state handling
  - Focus-visible ring (3px)
  - Supports asChild (Slot composition)

#### **Textarea** (`ui/textarea.tsx`)
- **Base**: Native textarea with styled wrapper
- **Styles**: 
  - Border, rounded-md, px-3 py-2
  - Focus-visible ring, transitions
  - field-sizing-content for auto-expansion
  - min-h-16 default

#### **ScrollArea** (`ui/scroll-area.tsx`)
- **Composition**: Root, Viewport, ScrollBar, Corner (from @radix-ui/react-scroll-area)
- **ScrollBar**: Vertical/horizontal, thumb with bg-border, smooth transitions
- **Features**: Custom scrollbar styling, optional orientation

#### **Tooltip** (`ui/tooltip.tsx`)
- **Composition**: Provider, Root, Trigger, Content (from @radix-ui/react-tooltip)
- **Content styles**: bg-foreground text-background, 3px arrow, rounded-md
- **Positioning**: side (top, bottom, left, right), configurable sideOffset

#### **Card** (`ui/card.tsx`)
- **Composition**: Card, CardHeader, CardTitle, CardDescription, CardAction, CardContent, CardFooter
- **Styles**: bg-card, rounded-xl, border, shadow-sm, px-6 py-6
- **Container queries**: @container/card-header for responsive header

#### **Badge** (`ui/badge.tsx`)
- **Variants**: default (primary), secondary, destructive, outline
- **Sizes**: Uniform inline-flex with text-xs font-medium
- **Features**: w-fit whitespace-nowrap, gap-1 for icons, borderless variants

#### **Separator** (`ui/separator.tsx`)
- **Props**: orientation (horizontal/vertical), decorative
- **Styles**: bg-border, 1px thickness, h-px or w-px

#### **Label** (`ui/label.tsx`)
- **Base**: From @radix-ui/react-label
- **Styles**: flex items-center gap-2, text-sm, font-medium, select-none
- **Disabled state**: opacity-50 with pointer-events-none

#### **Sidebar** (`ui/sidebar.tsx`) - Complex layout system
- **Composition**: SidebarProvider, Sidebar, SidebarContent, SidebarHeader, SidebarFooter, SidebarGroup, SidebarMenu, SidebarMenuItem, SidebarMenuButton, SidebarMenuAction, SidebarMenuBadge, SidebarMenuSkeleton, SidebarMenuSub, SidebarMenuSubButton
- **Features**:
  - Collapsible modes: offcanvas, icon, none
  - Mobile-responsive (Sheet on mobile, fixed sidebar on desktop)
  - Cookie-based state persistence
  - Keyboard shortcut (Ctrl/Cmd+B)
  - Width variables: --sidebar-width (16rem), --sidebar-width-icon (3rem)
  - Variants: sidebar, floating, inset
  - Side positioning: left, right
- **Menu items**: Active state styling, tooltips on collapsed state, hover actions
- **Badge support**: Positioned absolutely on menu items

---

### **Styling Patterns**

**Color System**:
- Foreground/background contrast pairs (foreground, background, card, sidebar)
- Primary/secondary color variants
- Accent colors for highlights
- Muted variants (muted-foreground, muted background)
- Destructive for danger actions

**Spacing**:
- Base unit: ~0.25rem (4px)
- Common gaps: gap-2, gap-2.5, gap-3
- Padding: px-2, px-3, px-4, py-1.5, py-2.5
- Negative spacing for overlaps: -space-x-1.5, -space-x-2

**Typography**:
- Comment text: 13px (text-[13px])
- Metadata: 11px (text-[11px]), 12px (text-[12px])
- Leading: leading-relaxed (1.625em), leading-tight, leading-snug
- Opacity: /80 (text-foreground/80), /70, /30

**Animations**:
- Slide-in transitions (slide-in-from-*)
- Fade-in/out (fade-in-0, fade-out-0)
- Zoom effects (zoom-in-95, zoom-out-95)
- Color/shadow transitions (transition-[color,box-shadow])
- Hover bg transitions (duration-150)

---

### **Key Design Decisions for Comment Sidebar**

1. **Compact sizing**: All comment UI uses small text (11px-13px) and compact spacing
2. **Avatar-centric**: Shows commenters via small avatar stacks with tooltips
3. **Contextual popovers**: Comments open in popovers anchored to content (right for blocks, bottom for inline)
4. **Subtle highlights**: Uses primary/10 opacity for hover states, primary/60 for decorative elements
5. **Keyboard-first input**: Sends with Cmd/Ctrl+Enter
6. **Scrollable overflow**: Long comment threads use ScrollArea with max-height
7. **State indicators**: Active comments show visual feedback (highlight background)
8. **Progressive disclosure**: Hidden comment button appears on hover

These patterns suggest a reference design suited for building a comment sidebar that maintains consistency with the existing system through popover-based interactions, compact typography, and avatar-driven presence indicators.

     1→"use client"
     2→
     3→import { useEffect, useState, useCallback, useRef } from "react"
     4→import { MessageSquareQuote } from "lucide-react"
     5→import { Popover, PopoverContent, PopoverTrigger } from "@/components/ui/popover"
     6→import { CommentThread } from "@/components/comment-thread"
     7→import type { User, InlineComment } from "@/lib/document-data"
     8→
     9→interface SelectionInfo {
    10→  blockId: string
    11→  text: string
    12→  startOffset: number
    13→  endOffset: number
    14→  rect: DOMRect
    15→}
    16→
    17→interface SelectionToolbarProps {
    18→  currentUser: User
    19→  onAddInlineComment: (
    20→    blockId: string,
    21→    selectedText: string,
    22→    startOffset: number,
    23→    endOffset: number,
    24→    content: string
    25→  ) => void
    26→  containerRef: React.RefObject<HTMLElement | null>
    27→}
    28→
    29→export function SelectionToolbar({
    30→  currentUser,
    31→  onAddInlineComment,
    32→  containerRef,
    33→}: SelectionToolbarProps) {
    34→  const [selection, setSelection] = useState<SelectionInfo | null>(null)
    35→  const [isCommentOpen, setIsCommentOpen] = useState(false)
    36→  const toolbarRef = useRef<HTMLDivElement>(null)
    37→
    38→  const handleMouseUp = useCallback(() => {
    39→    // Small delay to let the browser finalize selection
    40→    setTimeout(() => {
    41→      const sel = window.getSelection()
    42→      if (!sel || sel.isCollapsed || !sel.rangeCount) {
    43→        if (!isCommentOpen) {
    44→          setSelection(null)
    45→        }
    46→        return
    47→      }
    48→
    49→      const range = sel.getRangeAt(0)
    50→      const text = sel.toString().trim()
    51→      if (!text) {
    52→        if (!isCommentOpen) setSelection(null)
    53→        return
    54→      }
    55→
    56→      // Find the block element
    57→      const startNode = range.startContainer
    58→      const blockEl = (
    59→        startNode.nodeType === Node.TEXT_NODE
    60→          ? startNode.parentElement
    61→          : startNode
    62→      )?.closest("[data-block-id]") as HTMLElement | null
    63→
    64→      if (!blockEl) {
    65→        if (!isCommentOpen) setSelection(null)
    66→        return
    67→      }
    68→
    69→      const blockId = blockEl.getAttribute("data-block-id")
    70→      if (!blockId) {
    71→        if (!isCommentOpen) setSelection(null)
    72→        return
    73→      }
    74→
    75→      // Get the text content element (the element holding the actual text)
    76→      const textEl = blockEl.querySelector("[data-block-text]") as HTMLElement | null
    77→      if (!textEl) {
    78→        if (!isCommentOpen) setSelection(null)
    79→        return
    80→      }
    81→
    82→      // Calculate offset relative to textEl's textContent
    83→      const fullText = textEl.textContent || ""
    84→      const selectedText = text
    85→      const textBefore = range.startContainer.textContent?.slice(0, range.startOffset) || ""
    86→
    87→      // Walk the DOM to find the start offset
    88→      let startOffset = 0
    89→      const walker = document.createTreeWalker(textEl, NodeFilter.SHOW_TEXT)
    90→      let node: Node | null = walker.nextNode()
    91→      while (node) {
    92→        if (node === range.startContainer) {
    93→          startOffset += range.startOffset
    94→          break
    95→        }
    96→        startOffset += (node.textContent || "").length
    97→        node = walker.nextNode()
    98→      }
    99→
   100→      const endOffset = startOffset + selectedText.length
   101→
   102→      // Validate offsets
   103→      if (startOffset >= 0 && endOffset <= fullText.length && startOffset < endOffset) {
   104→        const rect = range.getBoundingClientRect()
   105→        setSelection({
   106→          blockId,
   107→          text: selectedText,
   108→          startOffset,
   109→          endOffset,
   110→          rect,
   111→        })
   112→      }
   113→    }, 10)
   114→  }, [isCommentOpen])
   115→
   116→  useEffect(() => {
   117→    document.addEventListener("mouseup", handleMouseUp)
   118→    return () => document.removeEventListener("mouseup", handleMouseUp)
   119→  }, [handleMouseUp])
   120→
   121→  // Clear selection when clicking outside
   122→  useEffect(() => {
   123→    function handleClickOutside(e: MouseEvent) {
   124→      if (isCommentOpen) return
   125→      if (toolbarRef.current && toolbarRef.current.contains(e.target as Node)) return
   126→      // Small delay to avoid clearing on the same click
   127→      setTimeout(() => {
   128→        const sel = window.getSelection()
   129→        if (!sel || sel.isCollapsed) {
   130→          setSelection(null)
   131→        }
   132→      }, 50)
   133→    }
   134→    document.addEventListener("mousedown", handleClickOutside)
   135→    return () => document.removeEventListener("mousedown", handleClickOutside)
   136→  }, [isCommentOpen])
   137→
   138→  if (!selection) return null
   139→
   140→  const containerRect = containerRef.current?.getBoundingClientRect()
   141→  if (!containerRect) return null
   142→
   143→  const top = selection.rect.top - containerRect.top - 44
   144→  const left =
   145→    selection.rect.left - containerRect.left + selection.rect.width / 2
   146→
   147→  return (
   148→    <div
   149→      ref={toolbarRef}
   150→      className="absolute z-50"
   151→      style={{
   152→        top: `${top}px`,
   153→        left: `${left}px`,
   154→        transform: "translateX(-50%)",
   155→      }}
   156→    >
   157→      <Popover
   158→        open={isCommentOpen}
   159→        onOpenChange={(open) => {
   160→          setIsCommentOpen(open)
   161→          if (!open) {
   162→            setSelection(null)
   163→            window.getSelection()?.removeAllRanges()
   164→          }
   165→        }}
   166→      >
   167→        <PopoverTrigger asChild>
   168→          <button
   169→            className="flex items-center gap-1.5 rounded-lg border border-border bg-card px-3 py-1.5 text-[13px] font-medium text-foreground shadow-lg transition-colors hover:bg-muted"
   170→            onClick={() => setIsCommentOpen(true)}
   171→          >
   172→            <MessageSquareQuote className="size-3.5 text-primary" />
   173→            <span>Comment</span>
   174→          </button>
   175→        </PopoverTrigger>
   176→        <PopoverContent
   177→          side="bottom"
   178→          align="center"
   179→          sideOffset={8}
   180→          className="w-auto p-0 shadow-lg z-[100]"
   181→          onOpenAutoFocus={(e) => e.preventDefault()}
   182→          onInteractOutside={(e) => {
   183→            // Don't close if user is selecting text
   184→            e.preventDefault()
   185→          }}
   186→        >
   187→          <div className="border-b border-border px-4 py-2.5">
   188→            <p className="text-[12px] text-muted-foreground">
   189→              Commenting on:
   190→            </p>
   191→            <p className="mt-0.5 text-[13px] font-medium text-foreground line-clamp-2">
   192→              {`"${selection.text}"`}
   193→            </p>
   194→          </div>
   195→          <CommentThread
   196→            comments={[]}
   197→            currentUser={currentUser}
   198→            onAddComment={(content) => {
   199→              onAddInlineComment(
   200→                selection.blockId,
   201→                selection.text,
   202→                selection.startOffset,
   203→                selection.endOffset,
   204→                content
   205→              )
   206→              setIsCommentOpen(false)
   207→              setSelection(null)
   208→              window.getSelection()?.removeAllRanges()
   209→            }}
   210→          />
   211→        </PopoverContent>
   212→      </Popover>
   213→    </div>
   214→  )
   215→}
   216→

```text
     1→"use client"
     2→
     3→import { useState, type ReactNode } from "react"
     4→import { Avatar, AvatarImage, AvatarFallback } from "@/components/ui/avatar"
     5→import { Popover, PopoverContent, PopoverTrigger } from "@/components/ui/popover"
     6→import { Tooltip, TooltipTrigger, TooltipContent } from "@/components/ui/tooltip"
     7→import { MessageSquarePlus } from "lucide-react"
     8→import { CommentThread } from "@/components/comment-thread"
     9→import { InlineCommentMark } from "@/components/inline-comment-mark"
    10→import type { Block, Comment, InlineComment, User } from "@/lib/document-data"
    11→import { cn } from "@/lib/utils"
    12→
    13→interface EditorBlockProps {
    14→  block: Block
    15→  inlineComments: InlineComment[]
    16→  currentUser: User
    17→  onAddComment: (blockId: string, content: string) => void
    18→  onAddInlineReply: (inlineCommentId: string, content: string) => void
    19→}
    20→
    21→/**
    22→ * Renders text content with inline comment marks (dashed underlines).
    23→ * Splits the text into segments: plain text and highlighted ranges.
    24→ */
    25→function renderTextWithHighlights(
    26→  text: string,
    27→  inlineComments: InlineComment[],
    28→  currentUser: User,
    29→  onAddInlineReply: (inlineCommentId: string, content: string) => void
    30→): ReactNode {
    31→  if (inlineComments.length === 0) return text
    32→
    33→  // Sort by startOffset to process left to right
    34→  const sorted = [...inlineComments].sort(
    35→    (a, b) => a.startOffset - b.startOffset
    36→  )
    37→
    38→  const segments: ReactNode[] = []
    39→  let cursor = 0
    40→
    41→  for (const ic of sorted) {
    42→    // Skip if overlapping or out of bounds
    43→    if (ic.startOffset < cursor || ic.endOffset > text.length) continue
    44→
    45→    // Plain text before this highlight
    46→    if (ic.startOffset > cursor) {
    47→      segments.push(text.slice(cursor, ic.startOffset))
    48→    }
    49→
    50→    // Highlighted segment
    51→    const highlightedText = text.slice(ic.startOffset, ic.endOffset)
    52→    segments.push(
    53→      <InlineCommentMark
    54→        key={ic.id}
    55→        inlineComment={ic}
    56→        currentUser={currentUser}
    57→        onAddReply={onAddInlineReply}
    58→      >
    59→        {highlightedText}
    60→      </InlineCommentMark>
    61→    )
    62→
    63→    cursor = ic.endOffset
    64→  }
    65→
    66→  // Remaining text after last highlight
    67→  if (cursor < text.length) {
    68→    segments.push(text.slice(cursor))
    69→  }
    70→
    71→  return <>{segments}</>
    72→}
    73→
    74→function BlockContent({
    75→  block,
    76→  inlineComments,
    77→  currentUser,
    78→  onAddInlineReply,
    79→}: {
    80→  block: Block
    81→  inlineComments: InlineComment[]
    82→  currentUser: User
    83→  onAddInlineReply: (inlineCommentId: string, content: string) => void
    84→}) {
    85→  const rendered = renderTextWithHighlights(
    86→    block.content,
    87→    inlineComments,
    88→    currentUser,
    89→    onAddInlineReply
    90→  )
    91→
    92→  switch (block.type) {
    93→    case "heading1":
    94→      return (
    95→        <h1
    96→          data-block-id={block.id}
    97→          className="text-3xl font-bold tracking-tight text-foreground leading-tight"
    98→        >
    99→          <span data-block-text>{rendered}</span>
   100→        </h1>
   101→      )
   102→    case "heading2":
   103→      return (
   104→        <h2
   105→          data-block-id={block.id}
   106→          className="text-xl font-semibold tracking-tight text-foreground leading-tight"
   107→        >
   108→          <span data-block-text>{rendered}</span>
   109→        </h2>
   110→      )
   111→    case "heading3":
   112→      return (
   113→        <h3
   114→          data-block-id={block.id}
   115→          className="text-lg font-medium text-foreground leading-snug"
   116→        >
   117→          <span data-block-text>{rendered}</span>
   118→        </h3>
   119→      )
   120→    case "paragraph":
   121→      return (
   122→        <p
   123→          data-block-id={block.id}
   124→          className="text-[15px] leading-relaxed text-foreground/85"
   125→        >
   126→          <span data-block-text>{rendered}</span>
   127→        </p>
   128→      )
   129→    case "quote":
   130→      return (
   131→        <blockquote
   132→          data-block-id={block.id}
   133→          className="border-l-2 border-primary/40 pl-4 italic text-[15px] leading-relaxed text-foreground/70"
   134→        >
   135→          <span data-block-text>{rendered}</span>
   136→        </blockquote>
   137→      )
   138→    case "code":
   139→      return (
   140→        <pre
   141→          data-block-id={block.id}
   142→          className="overflow-x-auto rounded-lg border border-border bg-muted/60 p-4"
   143→        >
   144→          <code className="text-[13px] font-mono leading-relaxed text-foreground/90">
   145→            <span data-block-text>{rendered}</span>
   146→          </code>
   147→        </pre>
   148→      )
   149→    case "list-item":
   150→      return (
   151→        <div
   152→          data-block-id={block.id}
   153→          className="flex gap-2.5 text-[15px] leading-relaxed text-foreground/85"
   154→        >
   155→          <span className="mt-[3px] size-1.5 shrink-0 rounded-full bg-foreground/30" />
   156→          <span data-block-text>{rendered}</span>
   157→        </div>
   158→      )
   159→    case "divider":
   160→      return <hr data-block-id={block.id} className="border-border" />
   161→    default:
   162→      return (
   163→        <p
   164→          data-block-id={block.id}
   165→          className="text-[15px] leading-relaxed text-foreground/85"
   166→        >
   167→          <span data-block-text>{rendered}</span>
   168→        </p>
   169→      )
   170→  }
   171→}
   172→
   173→function AvatarStack({ comments }: { comments: Comment[] }) {
   174→  const uniqueUsers = Array.from(
   175→    new Map(comments.map((c) => [c.user.id, c.user])).values()
   176→  )
   177→  const displayUsers = uniqueUsers.slice(0, 3)
   178→  const remainingCount = uniqueUsers.length - displayUsers.length
   179→
   180→  return (
   181→    <div className="flex items-center -space-x-1.5">
   182→      {displayUsers.map((user) => (
   183→        <Tooltip key={user.id}>
   184→          <TooltipTrigger asChild>
   185→            <Avatar className="size-6 ring-2 ring-card">
   186→              <AvatarImage src={user.avatar} alt={user.name} />
   187→              <AvatarFallback className="text-[9px] bg-accent text-accent-foreground font-medium">
   188→                {user.initials}
   189→              </AvatarFallback>
   190→            </Avatar>
   191→          </TooltipTrigger>
   192→          <TooltipContent side="top">{user.name}</TooltipContent>
   193→        </Tooltip>
   194→      ))}
   195→      {remainingCount > 0 && (
   196→        <div className="flex size-6 items-center justify-center rounded-full bg-muted text-[10px] font-medium text-muted-foreground ring-2 ring-card">
   197→          +{remainingCount}
   198→        </div>
   199→      )}
   200→    </div>
   201→  )
   202→}
   203→
   204→export function EditorBlock({
   205→  block,
   206→  inlineComments,
   207→  currentUser,
   208→  onAddComment,
   209→  onAddInlineReply,
   210→}: EditorBlockProps) {
   211→  const [isHovered, setIsHovered] = useState(false)
   212→  const [isOpen, setIsOpen] = useState(false)
   213→  const hasComments = block.comments.length > 0
   214→
   215→  return (
   216→    <div
   217→      className="group relative"
   218→      onMouseEnter={() => setIsHovered(true)}
   219→      onMouseLeave={() => setIsHovered(false)}
   220→    >
   221→      <div className="flex items-start gap-0">
   222→        {/* Document content */}
   223→        <div
   224→          className={cn(
   225→            "flex-1 rounded-md px-2 py-1.5 transition-colors duration-150",
   226→            isOpen && "bg-comment-highlight",
   227→            hasComments && !isOpen && "hover:bg-comment-highlight/50"
   228→          )}
   229→        >
   230→          <BlockContent
   231→            block={block}
   232→            inlineComments={inlineComments}
   233→            currentUser={currentUser}
   234→            onAddInlineReply={onAddInlineReply}
   235→          />
   236→        </div>
   237→
   238→        {/* Right gutter: comment indicator / action */}
   239→        <div className="flex w-16 shrink-0 items-center justify-center pt-1">
   240→          <Popover open={isOpen} onOpenChange={setIsOpen}>
   241→            <PopoverTrigger asChild>
   242→              {hasComments ? (
   243→                <button
   244→                  type="button"
   245→                  onClick={() => setIsOpen(!isOpen)}
   246→                  className="flex cursor-pointer items-center gap-1 rounded-full py-0.5 pl-0.5 pr-1.5 transition-colors hover:bg-muted"
   247→                  aria-label={`${block.comments.length} comments on this block`}
   248→                >
   249→                  <AvatarStack comments={block.comments} />
   250→                  <span className="text-[11px] font-medium text-muted-foreground ml-0.5">
   251→                    {block.comments.length}
   252→                  </span>
   253→                </button>
   254→              ) : (
   255→                <button
   256→                  type="button"
   257→                  onClick={() => setIsOpen(true)}
   258→                  className={cn(
   259→                    "flex size-7 cursor-pointer items-center justify-center rounded-md text-muted-foreground transition-all hover:bg-muted hover:text-foreground",
   260→                    isHovered ? "opacity-100" : "opacity-0"
   261→                  )}
   262→                  aria-label="Add comment to this block"
   263→                >
   264→                  <MessageSquarePlus className="size-4" />
   265→                </button>
   266→              )}
   267→            </PopoverTrigger>
   268→            <PopoverContent
   269→              side="right"
   270→              align="start"
   271→              sideOffset={8}
   272→              className="w-auto p-0 shadow-lg z-[100]"
   273→              onOpenAutoFocus={(e) => e.preventDefault()}
   274→            >
   275→              <CommentThread
   276→                comments={block.comments}
   277→                currentUser={currentUser}
   278→                onAddComment={(content) => onAddComment(block.id, content)}
   279→              />
   280→            </PopoverContent>
   281→          </Popover>
   282→        </div>
   283→      </div>
   284→    </div>
   285→  )
   286→}
   287→

## 注释系统架构及布局分析报告

### 1. CommentBlockButton 组件（悬停按钮）

**位置：** `<REPO_ROOT>/apps/web/src/components/modules/comment/CommentBlockButton.tsx`

**核心特性：**
- 在内容容器上监听 `mousemove` 事件（行62-70）
- 遍历 `.rich-content` 子元素，按Y轴判断当前悬停的块级元素
- 计算按钮位置：相对于容器的 `top`，`right` 默认为0
- 样式：`absolute z-10 size-6 rounded-full` 圆形按钮
- 状态：通过 `group-hover/comment-block:opacity-100` 实现悬停显示
- 点击时调用 `buildBlockAnchorFromIndex()` 构建块级注释锚点

### 2. LexicalCommentWrapper 编排器

**位置：** `<REPO_ROOT>/apps/web/src/components/modules/comment/LexicalCommentWrapper.tsx`

**三层结构：**
```
LexicalCommentWrapper (ref=containerRef)
├─ {children} (MainLexicalContent)
├─ CommentBlockButton (悬停按钮)
└─ CommentAnchorHighlight (范围高亮)
```

**功能：**
- 提取内容的块信息 `extractBlockInfos()` (行98-101)
- 获取有锚点的注释 `useMergedAnchorComments()` (行103) 
- 管理 `.group/comment-block` 容器，触发按钮可见性

### 3. CommentAnchorHighlight 高亮系统

**位置：** `<REPO_ROOT>/apps/web/src/components/modules/comment/CommentAnchorHighlight.tsx`

**原理：**
- 使用 CSS Highlights API（现代浏览器）
- 收集所有范围锚点 (mode='range')
- 构建DOM Range对象，映射到实际文本节点
- 注入 CSS 样式（ID: `comment-anchor-highlight-style`，行82-97）
- 样式：15% 背景色混合 + 下划线装饰

**注意：** 高亮为**只读**功能，不参与可交互面

### 4. 文章内容和布局约束

**Post 页面（/posts/[category]/[slug]）：**

```
page.tsx (line 232)：
<div className="relative flex min-h-[120px] grid-cols-[auto_200px] lg:grid">
  <BottomToUpTransitionView lcpOptimization>
    <PostPage data={data}>
      <article>
        <PostContent contentFormat>
          <LexicalCommentWrapper>
            <MainLexicalContent className="min-w-0 w-full" />
          </LexicalCommentWrapper>
      </article>
    </PostPage>
  </BottomToUpTransitionView>
  
  <LayoutRightSideProvider className="relative hidden lg:block" />  <!-- 200px宽 -->
</div>
```

**关键约束：**
- 网格布局：`grid-cols-[auto_200px]` 仅在 `lg:` 显示
- 内容区宽度：`min-w-0` + `w-full`，自动伸缩
- 右侧固定宽200px（对应layout的grid列）
- 注释区域在文章下方（CommentAreaRootLazy，line 240-243）

**Note 页面（/notes/[id]）：**

```
notes/layout.tsx (line 8-23)：
<div className="relative mx-auto grid min-h-[calc(100vh-6.5rem-10rem)] max-w-[60rem]
      gap-4 md:grid-cols-1 xl:max-w-[calc(60rem+400px)] 
      xl:grid-cols-[1fr_minmax(auto,60rem)_1fr]">
  <NoteLeftSidebar /> (隐藏在md以下)
  {children}
  <LayoutRightSideProvider className="relative hidden xl:block" /> (400px区域)
</div>
```

**关键约束：**
- 内容最大宽60rem（960px）
- 高宽布局：`xl:grid-cols-[1fr_minmax(auto,60rem)_1fr]`（左侧动态、中间60rem、右侧400px）
- 仅 `xl:` 以上显示右侧（约1280px+屏幕）

### 5. 右侧布局系统（LayoutRightSideProvider）

**位置：** `<REPO_ROOT>/apps/web/src/providers/shared/LayoutRightSideProvider.tsx`

**Portal 架构：**
```tsx
// 提供者（固定div容器）
const LayoutRightSideProvider = (props) => {
  const [element] = useState()  // Jotai atom
  return <div ref={divRef} className={className} />
}

// 入口（使用Portal渲染到右侧）
const LayoutRightSidePortal = (children) => {
  return createPortal(children, rightSideElement)
}
```

**用法：**
- Post: `<LayoutRightSidePortal><PostActionAside /></LayoutRightSidePortal>`
- Note: `<LayoutRightSidePortal><NoteActionAside /></LayoutRightSidePortal>`
- Page: 类似

### 6. ArticleRightAside（右侧栏组件）

**位置：** `<REPO_ROOT>/apps/web/src/components/modules/shared/ArticleRightAside.tsx`

**结构：**
```tsx
<aside className="sticky top-[120px] mt-[120px] h-[calc(100vh-6rem-4.5rem-150px-120px)]">
  <TocAside /> (目录树，绝对定位)
  {children && (
    /* 动作按钮通过transform偏移到下方 */
    translate-y-[calc(100%+24px)]
  )}
</aside>
```

**特点：**
- 粘性定位（sticky）
- TOC占据上部
- 内容（LikeButton、ShareButton等）通过 `translate-y` 偏移到下方
- 高度限制：`calc(100vh - 6rem - 4.5rem - 150px - 120px)` ≈ 视口高 - 280.5px

### 7. Avatar 组件

**位置：** `<REPO_ROOT>/apps/web/src/components/ui/avatar/Avatar.tsx`

**使用场景：** 注释中（Comment.tsx line 171-176）

```tsx
<Avatar
  shadow={false}
  imageUrl={avatar}
  className="size-6 select-none rounded-full"  // mobile
  // md:size-9 for desktop
/>
```

**可配置：**
- `size`：数字像素值
- `text`：fallback文字初字
- `randomColor`：自动着色
- `radius`：圆角（full / 数值）
- `lazy`：懒加载（默认true）
- RadixUI Avatar 基础

### 8. Comment 树形结构（Comment.tsx）

**布局设计：**
```tsx
<m.li className="relative my-2">
  <div className="group flex w-full items-stretch gap-4">
    <Avatar className="size-6 ... absolute top-2" />  // 绝对定位
    <div className="flex flex-1 flex-col min-w-0">
      <Header /> (作者名、时间、location)
      <ContentBox className="rounded-xl bg-zinc-600/5" />
      <Actions />
    </div>
  </div>
  
  {comment.children && (
    <ul className="my-2 space-y-2">
      <Comment /> (递归子注释，ml-9左缩进)
    </ul>
  )}
</m.li>
```

**注释显示：**
- 范围锚点：显示引用文本 + 边框
- 块级锚点：显示"评论了「...」"标签
- 单链接内容：使用BlockLinkRenderer（card展示）

### 9. WithArticleSelectionAction（文本选中菜单）

**位置：** `<REPO_ROOT>/apps/web/src/components/modules/shared/WithArticleSelectionAction.tsx`

**工作流：**
1. 在 `onMouseUp` 时检测 `window.getSelection()`
2. 计算菜单位置：`e.clientX - left + 10`, `e.clientY - top + 10`
3. 菜单显示 "复制" + "引用评论" 按钮
4. 调用 `buildRangeAnchorFromSelection()` 构建范围锚点
5. 仅在非移动设备上启用（line 81）

### 10. 注释块信息提取（anchor-utils.ts）

**数据结构：**
```typescript
interface BlockInfo {
  index: number
  blockId: string         // Lexical 块ID
  type: string            // 块类型（paragraph等）
  textContent: string     // 块的文本内容
  fingerprint: string     // 简易hash用于验证
}
```

**锚点类型：**
- **BlockAnchor**：仅记录块ID、类型、快照（非精确范围）
- **RangeAnchor**：精确范围（startOffset/endOffset）+ 前后文 + 引用文本

---

## 布局空间分析

| 页面 | 响应式阈值 | 右侧宽度 | 可用空间 | 约束 |
|------|----------|---------|--------|------|
| **Post** | `lg:` (1024px+) | 200px | 自动减少 | grid-cols-[auto_200px] |
| **Note** | `xl:` (1280px+) | 400px | 60rem固定 | 中间内容严格限制 |
| **Page** | 类似Post | 动态 | 自动 | 右侧绝对定位 |
| **Mobile** | < lg | 隐藏 | 全宽 | 底部条形bar替代 |

---

## 关键发现

1. **右侧空间策略**
   - Post：利用 `grid-cols-[auto_200px]` 的 `auto` 列自动适配左侧内容
   - Note：严格 `xl:max-w-[calc(60rem+400px)]` 限制整体宽度，右侧固定400px
   - 评论栏与右侧 Portal 容器共存不冲突（不同区域）

2. **注释的三种交互入口**
   - 悬停按钮（CommentBlockButton）- 块级注释
   - 文本选中菜单（WithArticleSelectionAction）- 范围注释
   - 底部注释区（CommentAreaRoot）- 完整注释树

3. **高亮机制**
   - 使用 CSS Highlights API，不占用DOM
   - 仅对 mode='range' 的锚点高亮，block模式无视觉反馈（需依靠CommentBlockButton或菜单）

4. **响应式分割**
   - `lg:` 触点决定了Post右侧出现
   - `xl:` 触点决定了Note完整三栏布局
   - 移动端退化为底部bar + 全屏注释区

---

## 可扩展的右侧评论侧栏设计空间

基于上述分析，右侧评论侧栏可以：

1. **Post 页面**：插入 LayoutRightSidePortal，并列于 PostActionAside（共享200px宽）
2. **Note 页面**：利用 ArticleRightAside 的下方空间（translate-y 区域）或替代TocAside
3. **实时性**：使用 pendingCommentAnchorAtom 追踪当前锚点，动态过滤/排序注释列表

君如需进一步深入实现细节，吾可继续阐述。

     9→import { apiClient } from '~/lib/request'

    12→import type { BlockInfo } from './anchor-utils'
    13→import { extractBlockInfos } from './anchor-utils'

    18→type CommentWithAnchor = CommentModel & { anchor?: CommentAnchor }
    19→type CommentsQueryData = InfiniteData<
    20→  PaginateResult<CommentWithAnchor & { ref: string }>
    21→>
    22→
    23→function useAnchorCommentsQuery(refId: string): CommentWithAnchor[] {
    24→  const { data } = useQuery({
    25→    queryKey: ['comments', refId, 'anchors'],
    26→    queryFn: async () => {
    27→      const data = await apiClient.comment.proxy
    28→        .ref(refId)
    29→        .get<PaginateResult<CommentWithAnchor & { ref: string }>>({
    30→          params: { hasAnchor: 'true', size: 50 },
    31→        })
    32→
    33→      console.log('data', data)
    34→      return data
    35→    },
    36→  })
    37→
    38→  console.log('data', data)
    39→
    40→  return useMemo(() => {
    41→    if (!data) return []
    42→    return data.data
    43→  }, [data])
    44→}
    45→
    46→function useCachedCommentsData(refId: string): CommentWithAnchor[] {
    47→  const queryClient = useQueryClient()
    48→  const queryKey = useMemo(() => buildCommentsQueryKey(refId), [refId])
    49→  const queryCache = queryClient.getQueryCache()
    50→
    51→  const data = useSyncExternalStore(
    52→    (onStoreChange) => {
    53→      const unsubscribe = queryCache.subscribe((event) => {
    54→        if (
    55→          event.type === 'updated' &&
    56→          event.query.queryHash === JSON.stringify(queryKey)
    57→        ) {
    58→          onStoreChange()
    59→        }
    60→      })
    61→      return unsubscribe
    62→    },
    63→    () => queryClient.getQueryData<CommentsQueryData>(queryKey),
    64→    () => null as CommentsQueryData | null,
    65→  )
    66→
    67→  return useMemo(() => {
    68→    if (!data) return []
    69→    return data.pages.flatMap((page) => page.data)
    70→  }, [data])
    71→}
    72→
    73→function useMergedAnchorComments(refId: string): CommentWithAnchor[] {
    74→  const eagerComments = useAnchorCommentsQuery(refId)
    75→  const cachedComments = useCachedCommentsData(refId)
    76→
    77→  return useMemo(() => {
    78→    const map = new Map<string, CommentWithAnchor>()
    79→    for (const c of eagerComments) map.set(c.id, c)
    80→    for (const c of cachedComments) {
    81→      if ((c as CommentWithAnchor).anchor) map.set(c.id, c)
    82→    }
    83→    return [...map.values()]
    84→  }, [eagerComments, cachedComments])
    85→}
    86→
    87→export function LexicalCommentWrapper({
    88→  content,
    89→  refId,
    90→  title,
    91→  children,
    92→}: PropsWithChildren<{
    93→  content: string
    94→  refId: string
    95→  title: string
    96→}>) {
    97→  const containerRef = useRef<HTMLDivElement>(null)
    98→  const blockInfos = useMemo<BlockInfo[]>(
    99→    () => extractBlockInfos(content),
   100→    [content],
   101→  )
   102→
   103→  const comments = useMergedAnchorComments(refId)
   104→
   105→  return (
   106→    <div ref={containerRef} className="group/comment-block relative">
   107→      {children}
   108→      <CommentBlockButton
   109→        containerRef={containerRef}
   110→        blockInfos={blockInfos}
   111→        refId={refId}
   112→        title={title}
   113→      />
   114→      <CommentAnchorHighlight
   115→        containerRef={containerRef}
   116→        blockInfos={blockInfos}
   117→        comments={comments}
   118→      />
   119→    </div>
   120→  )
   121→}
   122→
