     1→'use client'
     2→
     3→import type { CommentModel } from '@mx-space/api-client'
     4→import { useEffect } from 'react'
     5→
     6→import type { BlockInfo } from './anchor-utils'
     7→import type { CommentAnchor, RangeAnchor } from './types'
     8→
     9→type CommentWithAnchor = CommentModel & { anchor?: CommentAnchor }
    10→
    11→function collectRangeAnchors(comments: CommentWithAnchor[]): RangeAnchor[] {
    12→  const result: RangeAnchor[] = []
    13→  for (const c of comments) {
    14→    if (c.anchor?.mode === 'range') result.push(c.anchor)
    15→    if (c.children) {
    16→      result.push(...collectRangeAnchors(c.children as CommentWithAnchor[]))
    17→    }
    18→  }
    19→  return result
    20→}
    21→
    22→function findBlockElement(
    23→  contentEl: Element,
    24→  blockInfos: BlockInfo[],
    25→  blockId: string,
    26→): Element | null {
    27→  const idx = blockInfos.findIndex((b) => b.blockId === blockId)
    28→  if (idx === -1) return null
    29→  return contentEl.children[idx] ?? null
    30→}
    31→
    32→function createDomRange(
    33→  blockEl: Element,
    34→  startOffset: number,
    35→  endOffset: number,
    36→): Range | null {
    37→  const walker = document.createTreeWalker(
    38→    blockEl,
    39→    NodeFilter.SHOW_TEXT | NodeFilter.SHOW_ELEMENT,
    40→    {
    41→      acceptNode(node) {
    42→        if (node.nodeType === Node.TEXT_NODE) return NodeFilter.FILTER_ACCEPT
    43→        if (node instanceof HTMLBRElement) return NodeFilter.FILTER_ACCEPT
    44→        return NodeFilter.FILTER_SKIP
    45→      },
    46→    },
    47→  )
    48→  let offset = 0
    49→  let startNode: Text | null = null
    50→  let startNodeOffset = 0
    51→  let endNode: Text | null = null
    52→  let endNodeOffset = 0
    53→  let node: Node | null
    54→
    55→  while ((node = walker.nextNode())) {
    56→    const len = node.nodeType === Node.TEXT_NODE ? (node as Text).length : 1
    57→
    58→    if (!startNode && node.nodeType === Node.TEXT_NODE && offset + len >= startOffset) {
    59→      startNode = node as Text
    60→      startNodeOffset = startOffset - offset
    61→    }
    62→    if (node.nodeType === Node.TEXT_NODE && offset + len >= endOffset) {
    63→      endNode = node as Text
    64→      endNodeOffset = endOffset - offset
    65→      break
    66→    }
    67→    offset += len
    68→  }
    69→
    70→  if (!startNode || !endNode) return null
    71→
    72→  try {
    73→    const range = document.createRange()
    74→    range.setStart(startNode, startNodeOffset)
    75→    range.setEnd(endNode, endNodeOffset)
    76→    return range
    77→  } catch {
    78→    return null
    79→  }
    80→}
    81→
    82→const HIGHLIGHT_STYLE_ID = 'comment-anchor-highlight-style'
    83→
    84→function ensureHighlightStyle() {
    85→  if (document.getElementById(HIGHLIGHT_STYLE_ID)) return
    86→  const style = document.createElement('style')
    87→  style.id = HIGHLIGHT_STYLE_ID
    88→  style.textContent = [
    89→    '::highlight(comment-highlight) {',
    90→    '  background: color-mix(in srgb, var(--color-accent, #33a6b8) 15%, transparent);',
    91→    '  text-decoration: underline;',
    92→    '  text-decoration-color: color-mix(in srgb, var(--color-accent, #33a6b8) 50%, transparent);',
    93→    '  text-underline-offset: 2px;',
    94→    '}',
    95→  ].join('\n')
    96→  document.head.append(style)
    97→}
    98→
    99→export function CommentAnchorHighlight({
   100→  containerRef,
   101→  blockInfos,
   102→  comments,
   103→}: {
   104→  containerRef: React.RefObject<HTMLElement | null>
   105→  blockInfos: BlockInfo[]
   106→  comments: CommentWithAnchor[]
   107→}) {
   108→  useEffect(() => {
   109→    if (
   110→      typeof CSS === 'undefined' ||
   111→      !('highlights' in CSS) ||
   112→      typeof (window as any).Highlight !== 'function'
   113→    )
   114→      return
   115→    if (!containerRef.current) return
   116→
   117→    const contentEl = containerRef.current.querySelector('.rich-content')
   118→    if (!contentEl) return
   119→
   120→    const rangeAnchors = collectRangeAnchors(comments)
   121→    if (rangeAnchors.length === 0) {
   122→      ;(CSS as any).highlights.delete('comment-highlight')
   123→      return
   124→    }
   125→
   126→    ensureHighlightStyle()
   127→
   128→    const ranges: Range[] = []
   129→    for (const anchor of rangeAnchors) {
   130→      const blockEl = findBlockElement(contentEl, blockInfos, anchor.blockId)
   131→      if (!blockEl) continue
   132→
   133→      const range = createDomRange(blockEl, anchor.startOffset, anchor.endOffset)
   134→      if (range) ranges.push(range)
   135→    }
   136→
   137→    if (ranges.length > 0) {
   138→      const highlight = new (window as any).Highlight(...ranges)
   139→      ;(CSS as any).highlights.set('comment-highlight', highlight)
   140→    } else {
   141→      ;(CSS as any).highlights.delete('comment-highlight')
   142→    }
   143→
   144→    return () => {
   145→      ;(CSS as any).highlights.delete('comment-highlight')
   146→    }
   147→  }, [containerRef, blockInfos, comments])
   148→
   149→  return null
   150→}
   151→

```text
     1→import type { BlockAnchor, RangeAnchor } from './types'
     2→
     3→export interface BlockInfo {
     4→  index: number
     5→  blockId: string
     6→  type: string
     7→  textContent: string
     8→  fingerprint: string
     9→}
    10→
    11→export function computeBlockFingerprint(text: string): string {
    12→  const input = text.slice(0, 200) + String(text.length)
    13→  let hash = 5381
    14→  for (let i = 0; i < input.length; i++) {
    15→    hash = ((hash << 5) + hash + (input.codePointAt(i) ?? 0)) | 0
    16→  }
    17→  return (hash >>> 0).toString(16)
    18→}
    19→
    20→function getNodeType(node: Record<string, any>): string {
    21→  return node.type as string
    22→}
    23→
    24→function getTextContent(node: Record<string, any>): string {
    25→  if (typeof node.text === 'string') return node.text
    26→  if (node.type === 'linebreak') return '\n'
    27→  if (Array.isArray(node.children)) {
    28→    return (node.children as Record<string, any>[]).map(getTextContent).join('')
    29→  }
    30→  return ''
    31→}
    32→
    33→export function extractBlockInfos(content: string): BlockInfo[] {
    34→  let parsed: Record<string, any>
    35→  try {
    36→    parsed = JSON.parse(content)
    37→  } catch {
    38→    return []
    39→  }
    40→
    41→  const rootChildren = parsed.root?.children as
    42→    | Record<string, any>[]
    43→    | undefined
    44→  if (!rootChildren) return []
    45→
    46→  return rootChildren.map((child, index) => {
    47→    const blockId = (child.$ as Record<string, any> | undefined)?.blockId as
    48→      | string
    49→      | undefined
    50→    const textContent = getTextContent(child)
    51→    return {
    52→      index,
    53→      blockId: blockId || '',
    54→      type: getNodeType(child),
    55→      textContent,
    56→      fingerprint: computeBlockFingerprint(textContent),
    57→    }
    58→  })
    59→}
    60→
    61→export function findBlockIndex(
    62→  contentEl: Element,
    63→  node: Node,
    64→): number {
    65→  const { children } = contentEl
    66→  let current: Node | null = node
    67→  while (current && current !== contentEl) {
    68→    if (current.parentNode === contentEl) {
    69→      for (let i = 0; i < children.length; i++) {
    70→        if (children[i] === current) return i
    71→      }
    72→      return -1
    73→    }
    74→    current = current.parentNode
    75→  }
    76→  return -1
    77→}
    78→
    79→export function getTextOffset(
    80→  container: Element,
    81→  targetNode: Node,
    82→  targetOffset: number,
    83→): number {
    84→  const walker = document.createTreeWalker(
    85→    container,
    86→    NodeFilter.SHOW_TEXT | NodeFilter.SHOW_ELEMENT,
    87→    {
    88→      acceptNode(node) {
    89→        if (node.nodeType === Node.TEXT_NODE) return NodeFilter.FILTER_ACCEPT
    90→        if (node instanceof HTMLBRElement) return NodeFilter.FILTER_ACCEPT
    91→        return NodeFilter.FILTER_SKIP
    92→      },
    93→    },
    94→  )
    95→  let offset = 0
    96→  let node: Node | null
    97→  while ((node = walker.nextNode())) {
    98→    if (node === targetNode) {
    99→      return offset + targetOffset
   100→    }
   101→    if (node.nodeType === Node.TEXT_NODE) {
   102→      offset += (node as Text).length
   103→    } else if (node instanceof HTMLBRElement) {
   104→      offset += 1
   105→    }
   106→  }
   107→  return offset
   108→}
   109→
   110→export function buildRangeAnchorFromSelection(
   111→  sel: Selection,
   112→  contentEl: Element,
   113→  blockInfos: BlockInfo[],
   114→): RangeAnchor | null {
   115→  const { anchorNode, anchorOffset, focusNode, focusOffset } = sel
   116→  if (!anchorNode || !focusNode) return null
   117→
   118→  const anchorBlockIdx = findBlockIndex(contentEl, anchorNode)
   119→  const focusBlockIdx = findBlockIndex(contentEl, focusNode)
   120→  if (anchorBlockIdx < 0 || focusBlockIdx < 0) return null
   121→  if (anchorBlockIdx !== focusBlockIdx) return null
   122→
   123→  const info = blockInfos[anchorBlockIdx]
   124→  if (!info?.blockId) return null
   125→
   126→  const blockEl = contentEl.children[anchorBlockIdx]
   127→  if (!blockEl) return null
   128→
   129→  let startOffset = getTextOffset(blockEl, anchorNode, anchorOffset)
   130→  let endOffset = getTextOffset(blockEl, focusNode, focusOffset)
   131→  if (startOffset > endOffset) {
   132→    ;[startOffset, endOffset] = [endOffset, startOffset]
   133→  }
   134→
   135→  const text = info.textContent
   136→  const quote = text.slice(startOffset, endOffset)
   137→  if (!quote) return null
   138→
   139→  return {
   140→    mode: 'range',
   141→    blockId: info.blockId,
   142→    blockType: info.type,
   143→    blockFingerprint: info.fingerprint,
   144→    snapshotText: text.slice(0, 300),
   145→    quote,
   146→    prefix: text.slice(Math.max(0, startOffset - 50), startOffset),
   147→    suffix: text.slice(endOffset, endOffset + 50),
   148→    startOffset,
   149→    endOffset,
   150→  }
   151→}
   152→
   153→export function buildBlockAnchorFromIndex(
   154→  blockInfos: BlockInfo[],
   155→  index: number,
   156→): BlockAnchor | null {
   157→  const info = blockInfos[index]
   158→  if (!info?.blockId) return null
   159→
   160→  return {
   161→    mode: 'block',
   162→    blockId: info.blockId,
   163→    blockType: info.type,
   164→    blockFingerprint: info.fingerprint,
   165→    snapshotText: info.textContent.slice(0, 300),
   166→  }
   167→}
   168→

    25→        sm: 'h-8 rounded-md gap-1.5 px-3 has-[>svg]:px-2.5',
    26→        lg: 'h-10 rounded-md px-6 has-[>svg]:px-4',
    27→        icon: 'size-9',
    28→        'icon-sm': 'size-8',
    29→        'icon-lg': 'size-10',
    30→      },
    31→    },
    32→    defaultVariants: {
    33→      variant: 'default',
    34→      size: 'default',
    35→    },
    36→  },
    37→)
    38→
    39→function Button({
    40→  className,
    41→  variant,
    42→  size,
    43→  asChild = false,
    44→  ...props
    45→}: React.ComponentProps<'button'> &
    46→  VariantProps<typeof buttonVariants> & {
    47→    asChild?: boolean
    48→  }) {
    49→  const Comp = asChild ? Slot : 'button'
    50→
    51→  return (
    52→    <Comp
    53→      data-slot="button"
    54→      className={cn(buttonVariants({ variant, size, className }))}
    55→      {...props}
    56→    />
    57→  )
    58→}
    59→
    60→export { Button, buttonVariants }
    61→

    29→
    30→export const LdJsonWithAuthor = ({
    31→  baseLdJson,
    32→}: {
    33→  baseLdJson: WithContext<BlogPosting>
    34→}) => {
    35→  const jsonLd = useAggregationSelector(

    37→      ({

    40→          '@type': 'Person',

    45→  )

    47→    <script
    48→      type="application/ld+json"
    49→      dangerouslySetInnerHTML={{
    50→        __html: JSON.stringify(jsonLd),
    51→      }}
    52→    />
    53→  )
    54→}
    55→export const PostTitle = () => {
    56→  const title = useCurrentPostDataSelector((data) => data?.title)!
    57→
    58→  return (
    59→    <h1 className="mb-8 text-balance text-center text-4xl font-bold leading-tight">
    60→      {title}
    61→    </h1>
    62→  )
    63→}
    64→export const MarkdownSelection: Component = (props) => {
    65→  const id = useCurrentPostDataSelector((data) => data?.id)!
    66→  const title = useCurrentPostDataSelector((data) => data?.title)!
    67→  const allowComment = useCurrentPostDataSelector((data) => data?.allowComment)!
    68→  const contentFormat = useCurrentPostDataSelector(
    69→    (data) => data?.contentFormat,
    70→  )
    71→  const content = useCurrentPostDataSelector((data) => data?.content)
    72→  return (
    73→    <WithArticleSelectionAction
    74→      refId={id}
    75→      title={title}
    76→      canComment={allowComment}
    77→      contentFormat={contentFormat}
    78→      content={contentFormat === 'lexical' ? (content ?? undefined) : undefined}
    79→    >
    80→      {props.children}
    81→    </WithArticleSelectionAction>
    82→  )
    83→}
    84→export const FocusReadingEffect = () => {
    85→  useFocusReading()
    86→  return null
    87→}
    88→
    89→export const PostMarkdownImageRecordProvider = (props: PropsWithChildren) => {
    90→  const images = useCurrentPostDataSelector(
    91→    (data) => data?.images || (noopArr as Image[]),
    92→  )
    93→
    94→  return (
    95→    <MarkdownImageRecordProvider images={images || noopArr}>
    96→      {props.children}
    97→    </MarkdownImageRecordProvider>
    98→  )
    99→}
   100→export const PostMetaBarInternal: Component = ({ className }) => {
   101→  const meta = useCurrentPostDataSelector((data) => {
   102→    if (!data) return
   103→    return {
   104→      created: data.created,
   105→      category: data.category,
   106→      tags: data.tags,
   107→      count: data.count,
   108→      modified: data.modified,
   109→      aiGen: data.meta?.aiGen,
   110→      availableTranslations: (data as any).availableTranslations as
   111→        | string[]
   112→        | undefined,
   113→      translationMeta: data.translationMeta,
   114→    }
   115→  })
   116→
   117→  if (!meta) return null
   118→  return (
   119→    <PostMetaBar meta={meta} className={className}>
   120→      <CurrentReadingCountingMetaBarItem />
   121→      <AIGenBadge value={meta.aiGen} />
   122→      <TranslationLanguageSwitcher
   123→        availableTranslations={meta.availableTranslations}
   124→        sourceLang={meta.translationMeta?.sourceLang}
   125→      />
   126→    </PostMetaBar>
   127→  )
   128→}
   129→
   130→export const PostDataReValidate: FC<{
   131→  fetchedAt: string
   132→}> = withClientOnly(({ fetchedAt }) => {
   133→  const isOutdated = useMemo(
   134→    () =>
   135→      Date.now() - new Date(fetchedAt).getTime() > appStaticConfig.revalidate,
   136→    [fetchedAt],
   137→  )
   138→  const dataSetter = useSetCurrentPostData()
   139→
   140→  const locale = useLocale()
   141→
   142→  const { category, slug } = useCurrentPostDataSelector((post) => {
   143→    if (!post) return {}
   144→    return {
   145→      category: post.category,
   146→      slug: post.slug,
   147→    }
   148→  })
   149→  const onceRef = useRef(false)
   150→  const queryClient = useQueryClient()
   151→  useEffect(() => {
   152→    if (onceRef.current) return
   153→
   154→    onceRef.current = true
   155→    if (!isOutdated) return
   156→
   157→    if (!category || !slug) return
   158→
   159→    queryClient
   160→      .fetchQuery(queries.post.bySlug(category.slug, slug, locale))
   161→      .then((data) => {
   162→        dataSetter(data as PostWithTranslation)
   163→        // toast.info('此文章访问的内容已过期，所以页面数据自动更新了。')
   164→        logger.log('Post data revalidated', data)
   165→      })
   166→  }, [category, dataSetter, isOutdated, locale, queryClient, slug])
   167→  return null
   168→})
   169→
   170→export const SlugReplacer = ({ to }: { to: string }) => {
   171→  const router = useRouter()
   172→  const onceRef = useRef(false)
   173→
   174→  if (!onceRef.current) {
   175→    onceRef.current = true
   176→    router.replace(to)
   177→  }
   178→
   179→  return null
   180→}
   181→
```

     1→'use client'
     2→import clsx from 'clsx'
     3→import { AnimatePresence, m } from 'motion/react'
     4→import { useTranslations } from 'next-intl'
     5→import { useEffect, useMemo, useRef, useState } from 'react'
     6→
     7→import { useIsMobile } from '~/atoms/hooks/viewport'
     8→import { MotionButtonBase } from '~/components/ui/button'
     9→import { DividerVertical } from '~/components/ui/divider'
    10→import { useModalStack } from '~/components/ui/modal'
    11→import { DOMCustomEvents } from '~/constants/event'
    12→import { useIsClient } from '~/hooks/common/use-is-client'
    13→import { stopPropagation } from '~/lib/dom'
    14→import { toast } from '~/lib/toast'
    15→
    16→import {
    17→  buildRangeAnchorFromSelection,
    18→  extractBlockInfos,
    19→} from '../comment/anchor-utils'
    20→import type { CommentAnchor } from '../comment/types'
    21→import { useIsInBanCopyContext } from './BanCopyWrapper'
    22→import { CommentModal } from './CommentModal'
    23→
    24→export const WithArticleSelectionAction: Component<{
    25→  refId: string
    26→  title: string
    27→  canComment: boolean
    28→  contentFormat?: string
    29→  content?: string
    30→}> = ({ refId, title, children, canComment, contentFormat, content }) => {
    31→  const t = useTranslations('common')
    32→  const isMobile = useIsMobile()
    33→  const [pos, setPos] = useState({
    34→    x: 0,
    35→    y: 0,
    36→  })
    37→  const [show, setShow] = useState(false)
    38→  const [selectedText, setSelectedText] = useState('')
    39→  const ref = useRef<HTMLDivElement>(null)
    40→  const cachedAnchorRef = useRef<CommentAnchor | null>(null)
    41→
    42→  const isLexical = contentFormat === 'lexical'
    43→  const blockInfos = useMemo(
    44→    () => (isLexical && content ? extractBlockInfos(content) : []),
    45→    [isLexical, content],
    46→  )
    47→
    48→  useEffect(() => {
    49→    const handler = (e: MouseEvent): void => {
    50→      if (window.getSelection()?.toString().length === 0) {
    51→        setShow(false)
    52→        return
    53→      }
    54→      if (ref.current?.contains(e.target as Node)) return
    55→      setShow(false)
    56→    }
    57→    document.addEventListener('mousedown', handler)
    58→    document.addEventListener('mouseup', handler)
    59→    return () => {
    60→      document.removeEventListener('mousedown', handler)
    61→      document.removeEventListener('mouseup', handler)
    62→    }
    63→  }, [])
    64→
    65→  const isClient = useIsClient()
    66→  const { present } = useModalStack()
    67→
    68→  useEffect(() => {
    69→    const timer = setTimeout(() => {
    70→      document.dispatchEvent(new CustomEvent(DOMCustomEvents.RefreshToc))
    71→    }, 1000)
    72→    return () => {
    73→      clearTimeout(timer)
    74→    }
    75→  }, [])
    76→
    77→  const canCopy = !useIsInBanCopyContext()
    78→
    79→  const actionCanActivated = canCopy || canComment
    80→
    81→  if (isMobile || !isClient) return children
    82→  if (!actionCanActivated) return children
    83→
    84→  const buildAnchorFromSelection = (sel: Selection): CommentAnchor | null => {
    85→    if (!isLexical || blockInfos.length === 0) return null
    86→    if (sel.isCollapsed) return null
    87→    const contentEl = ref.current?.querySelector('[data-lexical-content]')
    88→      ?? ref.current?.querySelector('.rich-content')
    89→    if (!contentEl) return null
    90→    return buildRangeAnchorFromSelection(sel, contentEl, blockInfos)
    91→  }
    92→
    93→  return (
    94→    <div
    95→      className="relative"
    96→      ref={ref}
    97→      onMouseUp={(e) => {
    98→        const $ = ref.current
    99→        if (!$) return
   100→
   101→        const selection = window.getSelection()
   102→        if (!selection) return
   103→        const selectedText = selection.toString()
   104→        if (selectedText.length === 0) return
   105→        const { top, left } = $.getBoundingClientRect()
   106→
   107→        cachedAnchorRef.current = buildAnchorFromSelection(selection)
   108→
   109→        setShow(true)
   110→        setSelectedText(selectedText)
   111→        setPos({
   112→          x: e.clientX - left + 10,
   113→          y: e.clientY - top + 10,
   114→        })
   115→      }}
   116→    >
   117→      {children}
   118→
   119→      <AnimatePresence>
   120→        {show && (
   121→          <m.div
   122→            className={clsx(
   123→              'absolute z-10 rounded-lg bg-gradient-to-b from-zinc-50/50 to-white/90 p-1 text-sm shadow-lg shadow-zinc-800/5 ring-1 ring-zinc-900/5',
   124→              'backdrop-blur-xs dark:from-zinc-900/50 dark:to-zinc-800/90 dark:ring-white/10 dark:hover:ring-white/20',
   125→              'whitespace-nowrap [&_button]:whitespace-nowrap',
   126→            )}
   127→            style={{
   128→              left: pos.x,
   129→              top: pos.y - 40,
   130→            }}
   131→            initial={{ y: 10, opacity: 0.8, scale: 0.1 }}
   132→            animate={{ y: 0, opacity: 1, scale: 1 }}
   133→            exit={{
   134→              scale: 0,
   135→              opacity: 0,
   136→            }}
   137→          >
   138→            {canCopy && (
   139→              <>
   140→                <MotionButtonBase
   141→                  data-event="selection-comment"
   142→                  className="rounded-md px-2 py-1 hover:bg-slate-100/80 dark:hover:bg-zinc-900/90"
   143→                  onMouseUp={stopPropagation}
   144→                  onClick={() => {
   145→                    navigator.clipboard.writeText(selectedText)
   146→                    setShow(false)
   147→                    toast.success(t('selection_copy_success'))
   148→                  }}
   149→                >
   150→                  {t('selection_copy')}
   151→                </MotionButtonBase>
   152→                <DividerVertical className="mx-1" />
   153→              </>
   154→            )}
   155→            {canComment && (
   156→              <MotionButtonBase
   157→                data-event="selection-comment"
   158→                className="rounded-md px-2 py-1 hover:bg-slate-100/80 dark:hover:bg-zinc-900/90"
   159→                onClick={() => {
   160→                  const anchor = cachedAnchorRef.current
   161→                  present({
   162→                    title: t('selection_comment'),
   163→                    content: (rest) => (
   164→                      <CommentModal
   165→                        refId={refId}
   166→                        title={title}
   167→                        anchor={anchor}
   168→                        initialValue={
   169→                          anchor
   170→                            ? undefined
   171→                            : `> ${selectedText?.split('\n').join('')}\n\n`

Perfect! Now I have comprehensive understanding. Let me create a detailed summary document:

## Comment Data Flow and Types - Complete Exploration

Based on my thorough exploration of the codebase, here's the complete picture of the comment system:

### 1. **Comment Anchor Types** (`/apps/web/src/components/modules/comment/types.ts`)

```typescript
// Exported from @haklex/rich-editor
export type BlockAnchor = {
  mode: 'block'
  blockId: string
  blockType: string
  blockFingerprint: string
  snapshotText: string
}

export type RangeAnchor = {
  mode: 'range'
  blockId: string
  blockType: string
  blockFingerprint: string
  snapshotText: string
  quote: string
  prefix: string
  suffix: string
  startOffset: number
  endOffset: number
}

export type CommentAnchor = BlockAnchor | RangeAnchor
```

### 2. **Block Information and Anchor Utilities** (`/apps/web/src/components/modules/comment/anchor-utils.ts`)

**BlockInfo structure**: Maps DOM elements to metadata
```typescript
interface BlockInfo {
  index: number              // Position in content.root.children
  blockId: string           // From node.$.blockId in JSON
  type: string              // Node type (paragraph, heading, etc.)
  textContent: string       // Extracted text
  fingerprint: string       // Hash of first 200 chars + length
}
```

**Key functions**:
- `extractBlockInfos(content)` - Parses Lexical JSON, returns `BlockInfo[]` for each root child
- `findBlockIndex(contentEl, node)` - Maps DOM node to block index within container
- `getTextOffset(container, node, offset)` - Calculates text position including line breaks
- `buildRangeAnchorFromSelection(sel, contentEl, blockInfos)` - Creates `RangeAnchor` from user selection
- `buildBlockAnchorFromIndex(blockInfos, index)` - Creates `BlockAnchor` for whole block
- `computeBlockFingerprint(text)` - DJB2 hash for content verification

### 3. **Comment Data Structure** (from `@mx-space/api-client`)

```typescript
interface CommentModel {
  id: string
  text: string
  author: string
  mail: string
  avatar?: string
  url?: string
  source?: AuthSocialProviders  // github, twitter, etc
  created: string                 // ISO date
  editedAt?: string
  location?: string
  isWhispers?: boolean
  key?: string
  
  // Relationships
  parent?: string | CommentModel
  children?: CommentModel[]
  readerId?: string               // Links to ReaderModel
  
  // New in updated system
  anchor?: CommentAnchor | null   // Points to content block
}

interface ReaderModel {
  name: string
  image?: string
  handle?: string                 // For social providers
  // Other profile fields
}
```

**How comments relate to blocks via anchor**:
- `anchor.blockId` matches `BlockInfo.blockId`
- DOM block element = `contentEl.children[blockInfos.findIndex(b => b.blockId === anchor.blockId)]`
- Comments are pinned to specific content blocks via this anchor

### 4. **Individual Comment Rendering** (`/apps/web/src/components/modules/comment/Comment.tsx`)

**Comment exposes**:
```typescript
{
  avatar:    reader?.image || comment.avatar
  author:    reader?.name || comment.author
  authorUrl: comment.url || (source==='github' ? github.com/reader.handle)
  created:   comment.created
  text:      comment.text
  anchor:    comment.anchor  // BlockAnchor | RangeAnchor | null
  source:    comment.source  // Auth strategy
  key:       comment.key     // Metadata
  location:  comment.location
  isWhispers: comment.isWhispers
}
```

**Rendering**:
- Shows quote preview if `anchor.mode === 'range'` (quoted text)
- Shows block reference if `anchor.mode === 'block'` (block comment)
- Renders as nested tree: parent → children[] (threaded replies)
- Portal for comment action slots via `CommentBoxHolderPortal`

### 5. **Comment Data Flow** (`/apps/web/src/components/modules/comment/CommentProvider.tsx`)

```typescript
// Data structure
const CommentListContext = PrimitiveAtom<Record<string, CommentModel>>

const CommentReaderMapContext = Record<string, ReaderModel>

// Provider setup
<CommentProvider refId={refId}>
  {children(data, commentAtom)}
</CommentProvider>

// Data organization
- Flattens all comments (including nested children) into a single map by ID
- Maintains separate map of readers by readerId
- Updates via infinite query pagination
```

**Key hooks**:
- `useCommentById(commentId)` - Get single comment
- `useCommentByIdSelector(commentId, selector)` - Get derived value from comment
- `useCommentReader(readerId)` - Get reader profile
- `useUpdateComment(comment)` - Optimistic update

### 6. **Comment Box System** (`/apps/web/src/components/modules/comment/CommentBox/Root.tsx`)

```typescript
export const CommentBoxRoot: Component<CommentBaseProps> = (props) => {
  // Props
  refId: string                    // What to comment on
  anchor?: CommentAnchor | null   // Which block/range
  initialValue?: string
  afterSubmit?: () => void
  autoFocus?: boolean
}
```

**State management** (`/apps/web/src/components/modules/comment/CommentBox/providers.tsx`):
```typescript
const CommentBoxContext = {
  refId: atom(refId)
  text: atom('')
  author: atomWithStorage('comment-author', '')
  mail: atomWithStorage('comment-mail', '')
  url: atomWithStorage('comment-url', '')
  avatar: atom('')
  source: atom('')
  anchor: atom<CommentAnchor | null>(null)
  isWhisper: atomWithStorage('comment-is-whisper', false)
  syncToRecently: atomWithStorage('comment-sync-to-recently', true)
}
```

**Modes**:
- `'legacy'` - Anonymous form
- `'with-auth'` - Authenticated user (OAuth/passwordless)

### 7. **Comment Modal System** (`/apps/web/src/components/modules/shared/CommentModal.tsx`)

```typescript
interface CommentModalProps {
  title: string          // Article/block title
  refId: string         // Comment target
  anchor?: CommentAnchor | null
  initialValue?: string
}

// Usage pattern
const { present } = useModalStack()
present({
  title: 'Your modal title',
  content: (rest) => <CommentModal {...props} {...rest} />
})
```

**Modal content**:
- Shows anchor context (quote or block title)
- Embeds `CommentBoxRoot` for input
- Shows `CommentsLazy` for existing comments
- Auto-closes after successful submission (1s delay)

### 8. **Modal/Panel Stack System** (`/apps/web/src/components/ui/modal/stacked/`)

```typescript
// Provider setup
<ModalStackProvider>
  {children}
</ModalStackProvider>

// Usage hook
const { present, dismiss, dismissTop, dismissAll } = useModalStack()

// Open modal
present({
  title: ReactNode
  content: ModalContentComponent  // FC<{ dismiss: () => void }>
  clickOutsideToDismiss?: boolean
  modalClassName?: string
  max?: boolean                    // Full screen (90vh/90vw)
})
// Returns: cleanup function

// Managed by Jotai atom
modalStackAtom = PrimitiveAtom<(ModalProps & { id: string })[]>
```

**Features**:
- Stacked modals with z-index management
- Mobile: renders as sheets/drawers
- Desktop: draggable centered dialogs
- Motion animations with scale/y transitions
- Proper pointer events management for nested modals

### 9. **How to Group Comments by BlockId**

From `LexicalCommentWrapper`:
```typescript
// 1. Get comments with anchors
const comments = useMergedAnchorComments(refId)
// Returns: CommentModel[] with anchor field

// 2. Group by blockId
const commentsByBlock = new Map<string, CommentModel[]>()
for (const comment of comments) {
  const blockId = comment.anchor?.blockId
  if (blockId) {
    if (!commentsByBlock.has(blockId)) {
      commentsByBlock.set(blockId, [])
    }
    commentsByBlock.get(blockId)!.push(comment)
  }
}
```

### 10. **Opening Comment Panel for Specific Block**

Pattern from `CommentBlockButton.tsx`:
```typescript
const { present } = useModalStack()

// When clicking comment button on hover
const anchor = buildBlockAnchorFromIndex(blockInfos, hoverIndex)
present({
  title: t('selection_comment'),
  content: (rest) => (
    <CommentModal
      refId={refId}
      title={title}
      anchor={anchor}  // Anchors to specific block
      {...rest}
    />
  ),
})
```

### 11. **Complete Data Fetch Path**

1. **Comment list**: `useCommentsQuery(refId)` → TanStack Query with infinite pagination
2. **Comments with anchors**: `useAnchorCommentsQuery(refId)` → Dedicated query with `hasAnchor=true`
3. **Merge from cache**: `useCachedCommentsData(refId)` → Watch query cache for updates
4. **Final result**: `useMergedAnchorComments()` → Deduped Map of comments with anchors

### Key Files Summary

| File | Purpose |
|------|---------|
| `types.ts` | Type definitions for anchors |
| `anchor-utils.ts` | Block extraction, anchor creation, DOM mapping |
| `Comment.tsx` | Individual comment rendering with avatar/author |
| `CommentProvider.tsx` | Data flow, comment map, reader profiles |
| `CommentBox/Root.tsx` | Input form component |
| `CommentBox/providers.tsx` | State atoms and context |
| `CommentBox/hooks.tsx` | Mutation hooks, state accessors |
| `CommentModal.tsx` | Modal wrapper for commenting on blocks |
| `CommentBlockButton.tsx` | Hover button to open modal, opens via `useModalStack` |
| `LexicalCommentWrapper.tsx` | Block extraction, anchor highlighting, comment highlighting |
| `CommentAnchorHighlight.tsx` | CSS Highlight API for visual feedback |
| `ui/modal/stacked/provider.tsx` | Modal stack implementation, `useModalStack` hook |

    34→
    35→type SidebarContextProps = {
    36→  state: 'expanded' | 'collapsed'
    37→  open: boolean
    38→  setOpen: (open: boolean) => void
    39→  openMobile: boolean
    40→  setOpenMobile: (open: boolean) => void

    43→}
    44→
    45→const SidebarContext = React.createContext<SidebarContextProps | null>(null)
    46→
    47→function useSidebar() {
    48→  const context = React.useContext(SidebarContext)
    49→  if (!context) {
    50→    throw new Error('useSidebar must be used within a SidebarProvider.')
    51→  }
    52→
    53→  return context
    54→}
    55→
    56→function SidebarProvider({
    57→  defaultOpen = true,
    58→  open: openProp,
    59→  onOpenChange: setOpenProp,
    60→  className,
    61→  style,
    62→  children,
    63→  ...props
    64→}: React.ComponentProps<'div'> & {
    65→  defaultOpen?: boolean
    66→  open?: boolean
    67→  onOpenChange?: (open: boolean) => void
    68→}) {
    69→  const isMobile = useIsMobile()
    70→  const [openMobile, setOpenMobile] = React.useState(false)
    71→
    72→  // This is the internal state of the sidebar.
    73→  // We use openProp and setOpenProp for control from outside the component.
    74→  const [_open, _setOpen] = React.useState(defaultOpen)
    75→  const open = openProp ?? _open
    76→  const setOpen = React.useCallback(
    77→    (value: boolean | ((value: boolean) => boolean)) => {
    78→      const openState = typeof value === 'function' ? value(open) : value
    79→      if (setOpenProp) {
    80→        setOpenProp(openState)
    81→      } else {
    82→        _setOpen(openState)
    83→      }
    84→
    85→      // This sets the cookie to keep the sidebar state.
    86→      document.cookie = `${SIDEBAR_COOKIE_NAME}=${openState}; path=/; max-age=${SIDEBAR_COOKIE_MAX_AGE}`
    87→    },
    88→    [setOpenProp, open],
    89→  )
    90→
    91→  // Helper to toggle the sidebar.
    92→  const toggleSidebar = React.useCallback(() => {
    93→    return isMobile ? setOpenMobile((open) => !open) : setOpen((open) => !open)
    94→  }, [isMobile, setOpen, setOpenMobile])
    95→

    97→  React.useEffect(() => {
    98→    const handleKeyDown = (event: KeyboardEvent) => {

   101→        (event.metaKey || event.ctrlKey)

   105→      }

   110→  }, [toggleSidebar])
   111→
   112→  // We add a state so that we can do data-state="expanded" or "collapsed".
   113→  // This makes it easier to style the sidebar with Tailwind classes.
   114→  const state = open ? 'expanded' : 'collapsed'
   115→
   116→  const contextValue = React.useMemo<SidebarContextProps>(

   118→      state,
   119→      open,
   120→      setOpen,
   121→      isMobile,
   122→      openMobile,
   123→      setOpenMobile,

   126→    [state, open, setOpen, isMobile, openMobile, setOpenMobile, toggleSidebar],
   127→  )
   128→
   129→  return (
   130→    <SidebarContext.Provider value={contextValue}>
   131→      <TooltipProvider delayDuration={0}>
   132→        <div
   133→          data-slot="sidebar-wrapper"
   134→          style={
   135→            {
   136→              '--sidebar-width': SIDEBAR_WIDTH,
   137→              '--sidebar-width-icon': SIDEBAR_WIDTH_ICON,
   138→              ...style,
   139→            } as React.CSSProperties
   140→          }
   141→          className={cn(
   142→            'group/sidebar-wrapper has-data-[variant=inset]:bg-sidebar flex min-h-svh w-full',
   143→            className,
   144→          )}
   145→          {...props}
   146→        >
   147→          {children}
   148→        </div>
   149→      </TooltipProvider>
   150→    </SidebarContext.Provider>
   151→  )
   152→}
   153→
   154→function Sidebar({
   155→  side = 'left',
   156→  variant = 'sidebar',
   157→  collapsible = 'offcanvas',
   158→  className,
   159→  children,
   160→  ...props
   161→}: React.ComponentProps<'div'> & {
   162→  side?: 'left' | 'right'
   163→  variant?: 'sidebar' | 'floating' | 'inset'
   164→  collapsible?: 'offcanvas' | 'icon' | 'none'
   165→}) {
   166→  const { isMobile, state, openMobile, setOpenMobile } = useSidebar()
   167→
   168→  if (collapsible === 'none') {
   169→    return (
   170→      <div
   171→        data-slot="sidebar"
   172→        className={cn(
   173→          'bg-sidebar text-sidebar-foreground flex h-full w-(--sidebar-width) flex-col',
   174→          className,
   175→        )}
   176→        {...props}
   177→      >
   178→        {children}
   179→      </div>
   180→    )
   181→  }
   182→
   183→  if (isMobile) {
   184→    return (
   185→      <Sheet open={openMobile} onOpenChange={setOpenMobile} {...props}>
   186→        <SheetContent
   187→          data-sidebar="sidebar"
   188→          data-slot="sidebar"
   189→          data-mobile="true"
   190→          className="bg-sidebar text-sidebar-foreground w-(--sidebar-width) p-0 [&>button]:hidden"
   191→          style={
   192→            {
   193→              '--sidebar-width': SIDEBAR_WIDTH_MOBILE,
   194→            } as React.CSSProperties
   195→          }
   196→          side={side}
   197→        >
   198→          <SheetHeader className="sr-only">
   199→            <SheetTitle>Sidebar</SheetTitle>
   200→            <SheetDescription>Displays the mobile sidebar.</SheetDescription>
   201→          </SheetHeader>
   202→          <div className="flex h-full w-full flex-col">{children}</div>
   203→        </SheetContent>
   204→      </Sheet>
   205→    )
   206→  }
   207→
   208→  return (
   209→    <div
   210→      className="group peer text-sidebar-foreground hidden md:block"
   211→      data-state={state}
   212→      data-collapsible={state === 'collapsed' ? collapsible : ''}
   213→      data-variant={variant}
   214→      data-side={side}
   215→      data-slot="sidebar"
   216→    >
   217→      {/* This is what handles the sidebar gap on desktop */}
   218→      <div
   219→        data-slot="sidebar-gap"
   220→        className={cn(
   221→          'relative w-(--sidebar-width) bg-transparent transition-[width] duration-200 ease-linear',
   222→          'group-data-[collapsible=offcanvas]:w-0',
   223→          'group-data-[side=right]:rotate-180',
   224→          variant === 'floating' || variant === 'inset'
   225→            ? 'group-data-[collapsible=icon]:w-[calc(var(--sidebar-width-icon)+(--spacing(4)))]'
   226→            : 'group-data-[collapsible=icon]:w-(--sidebar-width-icon)',
   227→        )}
   228→      />
   229→      <div
   230→        data-slot="sidebar-container"
   231→        className={cn(
   232→          'fixed inset-y-0 z-10 hidden h-svh w-(--sidebar-width) transition-[left,right,width] duration-200 ease-linear md:flex',
   233→          side === 'left'
   234→            ? 'left-0 group-data-[collapsible=offcanvas]:left-[calc(var(--sidebar-width)*-1)]'
   235→            : 'right-0 group-data-[collapsible=offcanvas]:right-[calc(var(--sidebar-width)*-1)]',
   236→          // Adjust the padding for floating and inset variants.
   237→          variant === 'floating' || variant === 'inset'
   238→            ? 'p-2 group-data-[collapsible=icon]:w-[calc(var(--sidebar-width-icon)+(--spacing(4))+2px)]'
   239→            : 'group-data-[collapsible=icon]:w-(--sidebar-width-icon) group-data-[side=left]:border-r group-data-[side=right]:border-l',
   240→          className,
   241→        )}
   242→        {...props}
   243→      >
   244→        <div
   245→          data-sidebar="sidebar"
   246→          data-slot="sidebar-inner"
   247→          className="bg-sidebar group-data-[variant=floating]:border-sidebar-border flex h-full w-full flex-col group-data-[variant=floating]:rounded-lg group-data-[variant=floating]:border group-data-[variant=floating]:shadow-sm"
   248→        >
   249→          {children}
   250→        </div>
   251→      </div>
   252→    </div>
   253→  )
   254→}
   255→
   256→function SidebarTrigger({
   257→  className,
   258→  onClick,
   259→  ...props
   260→}: React.ComponentProps<typeof Button>) {
   261→  const { toggleSidebar } = useSidebar()
   262→
   263→  return (
   264→    <Button
   265→      data-sidebar="trigger"
   266→      data-slot="sidebar-trigger"
   267→      variant="ghost"
   268→      size="icon"
   269→      className={cn('size-7', className)}
   270→      onClick={(event) => {
   271→        onClick?.(event)
   272→        toggleSidebar()
   273→      }}
   274→      {...props}
   275→    >
   276→      <PanelLeftIcon />
   277→      <span className="sr-only">Toggle Sidebar</span>
   278→    </Button>
   279→  )
   280→}
   281→
   282→function SidebarRail({ className, ...props }: React.ComponentProps<'button'>) {
   283→  const { toggleSidebar } = useSidebar()
   284→
   285→  return (
   286→    <button
   287→      data-sidebar="rail"
   288→      data-slot="sidebar-rail"
   289→      aria-label="Toggle Sidebar"
   290→      tabIndex={-1}
   291→      onClick={toggleSidebar}
   292→      title="Toggle Sidebar"
   293→      className={cn(
   294→        'hover:after:bg-sidebar-border absolute inset-y-0 z-20 hidden w-4 -translate-x-1/2 transition-all ease-linear group-data-[side=left]:-right-4 group-data-[side=right]:left-0 after:absolute after:inset-y-0 after:left-1/2 after:w-[2px] sm:flex',
   295→        'in-data-[side=left]:cursor-w-resize in-data-[side=right]:cursor-e-resize',
   296→        '[[data-side=left][data-state=collapsed]_&]:cursor-e-resize [[data-side=right][data-state=collapsed]_&]:cursor-w-resize',
   297→        'hover:group-data-[collapsible=offcanvas]:bg-sidebar group-data-[collapsible=offcanvas]:translate-x-0 group-data-[collapsible=offcanvas]:after:left-full',
   298→        '[[data-side=left][data-collapsible=offcanvas]_&]:-right-2',
   299→        '[[data-side=right][data-collapsible=offcanvas]_&]:-left-2',
   300→        className,
   301→      )}
   302→      {...props}
   303→    />
   304→  )
   305→}

   314→        className,
   315→      )}

   317→    />

   406→      data-sidebar="group-label"
   407→      className={cn(
   408→        'text-sidebar-foreground/70 ring-sidebar-ring flex h-8 shrink-0 items-center rounded-md px-2 text-xs font-medium outline-hidden transition-[margin,opacity] duration-200 ease-linear focus-visible:ring-2 [&>svg]:size-4 [&>svg]:shrink-0',
   409→        'group-data-[collapsible=icon]:-mt-8 group-data-[collapsible=icon]:opacity-0',

   423→
   424→  return (

   427→      data-sidebar="group-action"
   428→      className={cn(

   430→        // Increases the hit area of the button on mobile.
   431→        'after:absolute after:-inset-2 md:after:hidden',
   432→        'group-data-[collapsible=icon]:hidden',
   433→        className,

   475→
   476→const sidebarMenuButtonVariants = cva(
   477→  'peer/menu-button flex w-full items-center gap-2 overflow-hidden rounded-md p-2 text-left text-sm outline-hidden ring-sidebar-ring transition-[width,height,padding] hover:bg-sidebar-accent hover:text-sidebar-accent-foreground focus-visible:ring-2 active:bg-sidebar-accent active:text-sidebar-accent-foreground disabled:pointer-events-none disabled:opacity-50 group-has-data-[sidebar=menu-action]/menu-item:pr-8 aria-disabled:pointer-events-none aria-disabled:opacity-50 data-[active=true]:bg-sidebar-accent data-[active=true]:font-medium data-[active=true]:text-sidebar-accent-foreground data-[state=open]:hover:bg-sidebar-accent data-[state=open]:hover:text-sidebar-accent-foreground group-data-[collapsible=icon]:size-8! group-data-[collapsible=icon]:p-2! [&>span:last-child]:truncate [&>svg]:size-4 [&>svg]:shrink-0',
   478→  {
   479→    variants: {
   480→      variant: {
   481→        default: 'hover:bg-sidebar-accent hover:text-sidebar-accent-foreground',
   482→        outline:
   483→          'bg-background shadow-[0_0_0_1px_hsl(var(--sidebar-border))] hover:bg-sidebar-accent hover:text-sidebar-accent-foreground hover:shadow-[0_0_0_1px_hsl(var(--sidebar-accent))]',
   484→      },
   485→      size: {
   486→        default: 'h-8 text-sm',
   487→        sm: 'h-7 text-xs',
   488→        lg: 'h-12 text-sm group-data-[collapsible=icon]:p-0!',
   489→      },
   490→    },
   491→    defaultVariants: {
   492→      variant: 'default',
   493→      size: 'default',
   494→    },
   495→  },
   496→)
   497→
   498→function SidebarMenuButton({
   499→  asChild = false,
   500→  isActive = false,
   501→  variant = 'default',
   502→  size = 'default',
   503→  tooltip,
   504→  className,
   505→  ...props
   506→}: React.ComponentProps<'button'> & {
   507→  asChild?: boolean
   508→  isActive?: boolean
   509→  tooltip?: string | React.ComponentProps<typeof TooltipContent>
   510→} & VariantProps<typeof sidebarMenuButtonVariants>) {
   511→  const Comp = asChild ? Slot : 'button'
   512→  const { isMobile, state } = useSidebar()
   513→
   514→  const button = (
   515→    <Comp
   516→      data-slot="sidebar-menu-button"
   517→      data-sidebar="menu-button"
   518→      data-size={size}
   519→      data-active={isActive}
   520→      className={cn(sidebarMenuButtonVariants({ variant, size }), className)}
   521→      {...props}
   522→    />
   523→  )
   524→
   525→  if (!tooltip) {
   526→    return button
   527→  }
   528→
   529→  if (typeof tooltip === 'string') {
   530→    tooltip = {
   531→      children: tooltip,
   532→    }
   533→  }
   534→
   535→  return (
   536→    <Tooltip>
   537→      <TooltipTrigger asChild>{button}</TooltipTrigger>
   538→      <TooltipContent
   539→        side="right"
   540→        align="center"
   541→        hidden={state !== 'collapsed' || isMobile}
   542→        {...tooltip}
   543→      />
   544→    </Tooltip>
   545→  )
   546→}
   547→
   548→function SidebarMenuAction({
   549→  className,
   550→  asChild = false,
   551→  showOnHover = false,
   552→  ...props
   553→}: React.ComponentProps<'button'> & {
   554→  asChild?: boolean
   555→  showOnHover?: boolean
   556→}) {
   557→  const Comp = asChild ? Slot : 'button'
   558→
   559→  return (
   560→    <Comp
   561→      data-slot="sidebar-menu-action"
   562→      data-sidebar="menu-action"
   563→      className={cn(
   564→        'text-sidebar-foreground ring-sidebar-ring hover:bg-sidebar-accent hover:text-sidebar-accent-foreground peer-hover/menu-button:text-sidebar-accent-foreground absolute top-1.5 right-1 flex aspect-square w-5 items-center justify-center rounded-md p-0 outline-hidden transition-transform focus-visible:ring-2 [&>svg]:size-4 [&>svg]:shrink-0',
   565→        // Increases the hit area of the button on mobile.
   566→        'after:absolute after:-inset-2 md:after:hidden',
   567→        'peer-data-[size=sm]/menu-button:top-1',
   568→        'peer-data-[size=default]/menu-button:top-1.5',
   569→        'peer-data-[size=lg]/menu-button:top-2.5',
   570→        'group-data-[collapsible=icon]:hidden',
   571→        showOnHover &&
   572→          'peer-data-[active=true]/menu-button:text-sidebar-accent-foreground group-focus-within/menu-item:opacity-100 group-hover/menu-item:opacity-100 data-[state=open]:opacity-100 md:opacity-0',
   573→        className,
   574→      )}
   575→      {...props}
   576→    />
   577→  )
   578→}
   579→
   580→function SidebarMenuBadge({
   581→  className,
   582→  ...props
   583→}: React.ComponentProps<'div'>) {
   584→  return (
   585→    <div
   586→      data-slot="sidebar-menu-badge"
   587→      data-sidebar="menu-badge"
   588→      className={cn(
   589→        'text-sidebar-foreground pointer-events-none absolute right-1 flex h-5 min-w-5 items-center justify-center rounded-md px-1 text-xs font-medium tabular-nums select-none',
   590→        'peer-hover/menu-button:text-sidebar-accent-foreground peer-data-[active=true]/menu-button:text-sidebar-accent-foreground',
   591→        'peer-data-[size=sm]/menu-button:top-1',
   592→        'peer-data-[size=default]/menu-button:top-1.5',
   593→        'peer-data-[size=lg]/menu-button:top-2.5',
   594→        'group-data-[collapsible=icon]:hidden',
   595→        className,
   596→      )}
   597→      {...props}
   598→    />
   599→  )
   600→}

   602→function SidebarMenuSkeleton({
   603→  className,
   604→  showIcon = false,
   605→  ...props
   606→}: React.ComponentProps<'div'> & {
   607→  showIcon?: boolean
   608→}) {
   609→  // Random width between 50 to 90%.
   610→  const width = React.useMemo(() => {
   611→    return `${Math.floor(Math.random() * 40) + 50}%`
   612→  }, [])
   613→
   614→  return (
   615→    <div
   616→      data-slot="sidebar-menu-skeleton"
   617→      data-sidebar="menu-skeleton"
   618→      className={cn('flex h-8 items-center gap-2 rounded-md px-2', className)}
   619→      {...props}
   620→    >
   621→      {showIcon && (
   622→        <Skeleton
   623→          className="size-4 rounded-md"
   624→          data-sidebar="menu-skeleton-icon"
   625→        />
   626→      )}
   627→      <Skeleton
   628→        className="h-4 max-w-(--skeleton-width) flex-1"
   629→        data-sidebar="menu-skeleton-text"
   630→        style={
   631→          {
   632→            '--skeleton-width': width,
   633→          } as React.CSSProperties
   634→        }
   635→      />
   636→    </div>
   637→  )
   638→}
   639→

   643→      data-slot="sidebar-menu-sub"
   644→      data-sidebar="menu-sub"
   645→      className={cn(
   646→        'border-sidebar-border mx-3.5 flex min-w-0 translate-x-px flex-col gap-1 border-l px-2.5 py-0.5',
   647→        'group-data-[collapsible=icon]:hidden',
   648→        className,
   649→      )}
   650→      {...props}
   651→    />
   652→  )

   658→}: React.ComponentProps<'li'>) {

   668→
   669→function SidebarMenuSubButton({
   670→  asChild = false,
   671→  size = 'md',
   672→  isActive = false,
   673→  className,
   674→  ...props
   675→}: React.ComponentProps<'a'> & {
   676→  asChild?: boolean
   677→  size?: 'sm' | 'md'
   678→  isActive?: boolean
   679→}) {
   680→  const Comp = asChild ? Slot : 'a'
   681→
   682→  return (
   683→    <Comp
   684→      data-slot="sidebar-menu-sub-button"
   685→      data-sidebar="menu-sub-button"
   686→      data-size={size}
   687→      data-active={isActive}
   688→      className={cn(
   689→        'text-sidebar-foreground ring-sidebar-ring hover:bg-sidebar-accent hover:text-sidebar-accent-foreground active:bg-sidebar-accent active:text-sidebar-accent-foreground [&>svg]:text-sidebar-accent-foreground flex h-7 min-w-0 -translate-x-px items-center gap-2 overflow-hidden rounded-md px-2 outline-hidden focus-visible:ring-2 disabled:pointer-events-none disabled:opacity-50 aria-disabled:pointer-events-none aria-disabled:opacity-50 [&>span:last-child]:truncate [&>svg]:size-4 [&>svg]:shrink-0',
   690→        'data-[active=true]:bg-sidebar-accent data-[active=true]:text-sidebar-accent-foreground',
   691→        size === 'sm' && 'text-xs',
   692→        size === 'md' && 'text-sm',
   693→        'group-data-[collapsible=icon]:hidden',
   694→        className,
   695→      )}
   696→      {...props}
   697→    />
   698→  )
   699→}
   700→
   701→export {
   702→  Sidebar,
   703→  SidebarContent,
   704→  SidebarFooter,

   708→  SidebarGroupLabel,

```text
     1→import type { BlockAnchor, RangeAnchor } from './types'
     2→
     3→export interface BlockInfo {
     4→  index: number
     5→  blockId: string
     6→  type: string
     7→  textContent: string
     8→  fingerprint: string
     9→}
    10→
    11→export function computeBlockFingerprint(text: string): string {
    12→  const input = text.slice(0, 200) + String(text.length)
    13→  let hash = 5381
    14→  for (let i = 0; i < input.length; i++) {
    15→    hash = ((hash << 5) + hash + (input.codePointAt(i) ?? 0)) | 0
    16→  }
    17→  return (hash >>> 0).toString(16)
    18→}
    19→
    20→function getNodeType(node: Record<string, any>): string {
    21→  return node.type as string
    22→}
    23→
    24→function getTextContent(node: Record<string, any>): string {
    25→  if (typeof node.text === 'string') return node.text
    26→  if (node.type === 'linebreak') return '\n'
    27→  if (Array.isArray(node.children)) {
    28→    return (node.children as Record<string, any>[]).map(getTextContent).join('')
    29→  }
    30→  return ''
    31→}
    32→
    33→export function extractBlockInfos(content: string): BlockInfo[] {
    34→  let parsed: Record<string, any>
    35→  try {
    36→    parsed = JSON.parse(content)
    37→  } catch {
    38→    return []
    39→  }
    40→
    41→  const rootChildren = parsed.root?.children as
    42→    | Record<string, any>[]
    43→    | undefined
    44→  if (!rootChildren) return []
    45→
    46→  return rootChildren.map((child, index) => {
    47→    const blockId = (child.$ as Record<string, any> | undefined)?.blockId as
    48→      | string
    49→      | undefined
    50→    const textContent = getTextContent(child)
    51→    return {
    52→      index,
    53→      blockId: blockId || '',
    54→      type: getNodeType(child),
    55→      textContent,
    56→      fingerprint: computeBlockFingerprint(textContent),
    57→    }
    58→  })
    59→}
    60→
    61→export function findBlockIndex(
    62→  contentEl: Element,
    63→  node: Node,
    64→): number {
    65→  const { children } = contentEl
    66→  let current: Node | null = node
    67→  while (current && current !== contentEl) {
    68→    if (current.parentNode === contentEl) {
    69→      for (let i = 0; i < children.length; i++) {
    70→        if (children[i] === current) return i
    71→      }
    72→      return -1
    73→    }
    74→    current = current.parentNode
    75→  }
    76→  return -1
    77→}
    78→
    79→export function getTextOffset(
    80→  container: Element,
    81→  targetNode: Node,
    82→  targetOffset: number,
    83→): number {
    84→  const walker = document.createTreeWalker(
    85→    container,
    86→    NodeFilter.SHOW_TEXT | NodeFilter.SHOW_ELEMENT,
    87→    {
    88→      acceptNode(node) {
    89→        if (node.nodeType === Node.TEXT_NODE) return NodeFilter.FILTER_ACCEPT
    90→        if (node instanceof HTMLBRElement) return NodeFilter.FILTER_ACCEPT
    91→        return NodeFilter.FILTER_SKIP
    92→      },
    93→    },
    94→  )
    95→  let offset = 0
    96→  let node: Node | null
    97→  while ((node = walker.nextNode())) {
    98→    if (node === targetNode) {
    99→      return offset + targetOffset
   100→    }
   101→    if (node.nodeType === Node.TEXT_NODE) {
   102→      offset += (node as Text).length
   103→    } else if (node instanceof HTMLBRElement) {
   104→      offset += 1
   105→    }
   106→  }
   107→  return offset
   108→}
   109→
   110→export function buildRangeAnchorFromSelection(
   111→  sel: Selection,
   112→  contentEl: Element,
   113→  blockInfos: BlockInfo[],
   114→): RangeAnchor | null {
   115→  const { anchorNode, anchorOffset, focusNode, focusOffset } = sel
   116→  if (!anchorNode || !focusNode) return null
   117→
   118→  const anchorBlockIdx = findBlockIndex(contentEl, anchorNode)
   119→  const focusBlockIdx = findBlockIndex(contentEl, focusNode)
   120→  if (anchorBlockIdx < 0 || focusBlockIdx < 0) return null
   121→  if (anchorBlockIdx !== focusBlockIdx) return null
   122→
   123→  const info = blockInfos[anchorBlockIdx]
   124→  if (!info?.blockId) return null
   125→
   126→  const blockEl = contentEl.children[anchorBlockIdx]
   127→  if (!blockEl) return null
   128→
   129→  let startOffset = getTextOffset(blockEl, anchorNode, anchorOffset)
   130→  let endOffset = getTextOffset(blockEl, focusNode, focusOffset)
   131→  if (startOffset > endOffset) {
   132→    ;[startOffset, endOffset] = [endOffset, startOffset]
   133→  }
   134→
   135→  const text = info.textContent
   136→  const quote = text.slice(startOffset, endOffset)
   137→  if (!quote) return null
   138→
   139→  return {
   140→    mode: 'range',
   141→    blockId: info.blockId,
   142→    blockType: info.type,
   143→    blockFingerprint: info.fingerprint,
   144→    snapshotText: text.slice(0, 300),
   145→    quote,
   146→    prefix: text.slice(Math.max(0, startOffset - 50), startOffset),
   147→    suffix: text.slice(endOffset, endOffset + 50),
   148→    startOffset,
   149→    endOffset,
   150→  }
   151→}
   152→
   153→export function buildBlockAnchorFromIndex(
   154→  blockInfos: BlockInfo[],
   155→  index: number,
   156→): BlockAnchor | null {
   157→  const info = blockInfos[index]
   158→  if (!info?.blockId) return null
   159→
   160→  return {
   161→    mode: 'block',
   162→    blockId: info.blockId,
   163→    blockType: info.type,
   164→    blockFingerprint: info.fingerprint,
   165→    snapshotText: info.textContent.slice(0, 300),
   166→  }
   167→}
   168→
```
</details></tool-use>

   214→                      </span>
   215→                    )}
   216→                    {!!isWhispers && <OcticonGistSecret />}
   217→                  </span>
   218→                </span>
   219→
   220→                <span className="shrink-0">
   221→                  <CommentPinButton comment={comment} />
   222→                </span>
   223→              </span>
   224→
   225→              {/* Content */}
   226→              {isSingleLinkContent ? (
   227→                <div className="relative inline-block">
   228→                  <BlockLinkRenderer
   229→                    href={text}

   236→                    fallback={CommentNormalContent}
   237→                  />

   242→            </div>

   244→        </m.li>
   245→
   246→        <CommentBoxHolderProvider />
   247→      </CommentHolderContext>
   248→      {comment.children && comment.children.length > 0 && (
   249→        <ul className="my-2 space-y-2">
   250→          {comment.children.map((child) => (
   251→            <Comment key={child.id} commentId={child.id} className="ml-9" />
   252→          ))}
   253→        </ul>
   254→      )}
   255→    </>
   256→  )
   257→}
   258→
   259→const CommentHolderContext = createContext(atom(null as null | HTMLDivElement))
   260→
   261→const CommentBoxHolderProvider = () => {
   262→  const ref = useRef<HTMLDivElement>(null)
   263→  const commentBoxHolderElementAtom = use(CommentHolderContext)
   264→  useLayoutEffect(() => {
   265→    jotaiStore.set(commentBoxHolderElementAtom, ref.current)
   266→
   267→    return () => {
   268→      jotaiStore.set(commentBoxHolderElementAtom, null)
   269→    }
   270→  }, [commentBoxHolderElementAtom])
   271→  return <div ref={ref} />
   272→}
   273→
   274→export const CommentBoxHolderPortal = (props: PropsWithChildren) => {
   275→  const portalElement = useAtomValue(use(CommentHolderContext))
   276→
   277→  if (!portalElement) return null
   278→
   279→  return createPortal(props.children, portalElement)
   280→}
   281→
   282→const EditedCommentFooter: FC<{
   283→  commentId: string
   284→}> = ({ commentId }) => {
   285→  const editedAt = useCommentByIdSelector(
   286→    commentId,
   287→    useCallback((comment) => comment?.editedAt, []),
   288→  )
   289→  const ref = useCommentMarkdownContainerRef()
   290→
   291→  const lastNode = useMemo(() => {
   292→    if (!ref) return null
   293→    return ref.lastChild
   294→  }, [ref])
   295→  const lastNodeIsParagraph = useMemo(() => {
   296→    if (!lastNode) return false
   297→    return lastNode.nodeName === 'P'
   298→  }, [lastNode])
   299→
   300→  if (!editedAt) return null
   301→
   302→  const InlineEl = (
   303→    <FloatPopover
   304→      type="tooltip"
   305→      triggerElement={
   306→        <span className="ml-2 text-xs text-zinc-500">(已编辑)</span>
   307→      }
   308→    >
   309→      <div>
   310→        <span>编辑于</span>
   311→        <RelativeTime date={editedAt} />
   312→      </div>
   313→    </FloatPopover>
   314→  )
   315→  if (!lastNodeIsParagraph) return <div className="[&_*]:!ml-0">{InlineEl}</div>
   316→
   317→  return createPortal(InlineEl, lastNode as HTMLDivElement)
   318→}
   319→
```

     1→import type {
     2→  CommentModel,
     3→  PaginateResult,
     4→  ReaderModel,
     5→} from '@mx-space/api-client'
     6→import type { InfiniteData } from '@tanstack/react-query'
     7→import { createContextState } from 'foxact/create-context-state'
     8→import type { PrimitiveAtom } from 'jotai'
     9→import { atom, useAtomValue } from 'jotai'
    10→import { selectAtom } from 'jotai/utils'
    11→import { useTranslations } from 'next-intl'
    12→import type { FC, ReactNode } from 'react'
    13→import {
    14→  createContext as createReactContext,
    15→  use,
    16→  useCallback,
    17→  useEffect,
    18→  useMemo,
    19→} from 'react'
    20→import { createContext, useContextSelector } from 'use-context-selector'
    21→
    22→import { NotSupport } from '~/components/common/NotSupport'
    23→import { useRefValue } from '~/hooks/common/use-ref-value'
    24→import { jotaiStore } from '~/lib/store'
    25→
    26→import { LoadMoreIndicator } from '../shared/LoadMoreIndicator'
    27→import { CommentSkeleton } from './CommentSkeleton'
    28→import { useCommentsQuery } from './hooks'
    29→
    30→const CommentReaderMapContext = createContext<Record<string, ReaderModel>>({})
    31→const CommentListContext = createReactContext<
    32→  PrimitiveAtom<Record<string, CommentModel & { new?: boolean }>>
    33→>(null!)
    34→
    35→export const [
    36→  CommentMarkdownContainerRefContext,
    37→  useCommentMarkdownContainerRef,
    38→  useCommentMarkdownContainerRefSetter,
    39→] = createContextState<HTMLDivElement | null>(null)
    40→
    41→export const CommentProvider: FC<{
    42→  refId: string
    43→  children: (
    44→    data: InfiniteData<
    45→      PaginateResult<
    46→        CommentModel & {
    47→          ref: string
    48→        }
    49→      > & {
    50→        readers: Record<string, ReaderModel>
    51→      }
    52→    >,
    53→    commentAtom: PrimitiveAtom<
    54→      Record<string, CommentModel & { new?: boolean }>
    55→    >,
    56→  ) => ReactNode
    57→}> = ({ children, refId }) => {
    58→  const t = useTranslations('comment')
    59→  const commentAtom = useRefValue(() =>
    60→    atom({} as Record<string, CommentModel & { new?: boolean }>),
    61→  )
    62→
    63→  const { data, isLoading, fetchNextPage, hasNextPage } =
    64→    useCommentsQuery(refId)
    65→
    66→  useEffect(() => {
    67→    if (!data) return
    68→    const commentsMap = Object.assign({}, jotaiStore.get(commentAtom))
    69→    function dts(comments: CommentModel[]) {
    70→      for (const comment of comments) {
    71→        commentsMap[comment.id] = comment
    72→
    73→        if (comment.children) {
    74→          dts(comment.children)
    75→        }
    76→      }
    77→    }
    78→
    79→    dts(data.pages.flatMap((page) => page.data))
    80→
    81→    jotaiStore.set(commentAtom, commentsMap)
    82→  }, [commentAtom, data])
    83→
    84→  const readers = useMemo(() => {
    85→    if (!data) return {}
    86→    return data?.pages.reduce(
    87→      (acc, curr) => ({ ...acc, ...curr.readers }),
    88→      {} as Record<string, ReaderModel>,
    89→    )
    90→  }, [data])
    91→
    92→  if (isLoading) {
    93→    return <CommentSkeleton />
    94→  }
    95→  if (!data || data.pages.length === 0 || data.pages[0].data.length === 0)
    96→    return (
    97→      <div className="center flex min-h-[400px]">
    98→        <NotSupport text={t('no_comments_yet')} />
    99→      </div>
   100→    )
   101→
   102→  return (
   103→    <CommentReaderMapContext.Provider value={readers}>
   104→      <CommentListContext value={commentAtom}>
   105→        {children(data, commentAtom)}
   106→
   107→        {hasNextPage && (
   108→          <LoadMoreIndicator onLoading={fetchNextPage}>
   109→            <CommentSkeleton />
   110→          </LoadMoreIndicator>
   111→        )}
   112→      </CommentListContext>
   113→    </CommentReaderMapContext.Provider>
   114→  )
   115→}
   116→
   117→export const useCommentReader = (readerId?: string) => {
   118→  return useContextSelector(CommentReaderMapContext, (v) =>
   119→    readerId ? v[readerId] : undefined,
   120→  )
   121→}
   122→
   123→export const useCommentByIdSelector = <T,>(
   124→  commentId: string,
   125→  selector: (comment?: CommentModel) => T,
   126→): T => {
   127→  const commentsAtom = use(CommentListContext)
   128→  return useAtomValue(
   129→    useMemo(
   130→      () => selectAtom(commentsAtom, (v) => selector(v[commentId])),
   131→      [commentsAtom, selector, commentId],
   132→    ),
   133→  )
   134→}
   135→
   136→export const useCommentById = (commentId: string) => {
   137→  const commentsAtom = use(CommentListContext)
   138→  return useAtomValue(
   139→    useMemo(
   140→      () => selectAtom(commentsAtom, (v) => v[commentId]),
   141→      [commentsAtom, commentId],
   142→    ),
   143→  )
   144→}
   145→
   146→export const useUpdateComment = () => {
   147→  const commentsAtom = use(CommentListContext)
   148→  return useCallback(
   149→    (comment: Partial<CommentModel> & { id: string }) => {
   150→      jotaiStore.set(commentsAtom, (prev) => {
   151→        const newComments = {
   152→          ...prev,
   153→          [comment.id]: {
   154→            ...prev[comment.id],
   155→            ...comment,
   156→            editedAt: new Date().toISOString(),
   157→          },
   158→        }
   159→
   160→        return newComments
   161→      })
   162→    },
   163→    [commentsAtom],
   164→  )
   165→}
   166→
```

    51→            ) : mode === CommentBoxMode.legacy ? (

    53→            ) : (

    56→          </div>

    21→  mail: atomWithStorage(`${commentStoragePrefix}mail`, ''),

    24→  avatar: atom(''),

    27→  anchor: atom<CommentAnchor | null>(null),
    28→
    29→  // settings

    31→  syncToRecently: atomWithStorage(
    32→    `${commentStoragePrefix}sync-to-recently`,
    33→    true,
    34→  ),
    35→})
    36→export const CommentBoxContext = createContext<
    37→  ReturnType<typeof createInitialValue>
    38→>(null!)
    39→
    40→export const CommentBoxLifeCycleContext = createContext<{
    41→  afterSubmit?: () => void
    42→}>(null!)
    43→
    44→export const CommentBoxProvider = (
    45→  props: PropsWithChildren & {
    46→    refId: string

    50→  },

    56→      ...createInitialValue(),
    57→      refId: atom(refId),
    58→    }),
    59→    [refId],
    60→  )
    61→  useBeforeMounted(() => {
    62→    if (initialValue) {
    63→      jotaiStore.set(ctxValue.text, initialValue)
    64→    }
    65→    if (anchor) {
    66→      jotaiStore.set(ctxValue.anchor, anchor)
    67→    }
    68→  })
    69→  return (
    70→    <CommentBoxContext key={refId} value={ctxValue}>
    71→      <CommentBoxLifeCycleContext
    72→        value={useMemo(() => ({ afterSubmit }), [afterSubmit])}
    73→      >
    74→        {children}
    75→      </CommentBoxLifeCycleContext>
    76→    </CommentBoxContext>
    77→  )
    78→}

    28→import {
    29→  CommentBoxContext,
    30→  CommentBoxLifeCycleContext,
    31→  CommentCompletedCallbackContext,
    32→  CommentIsReplyContext,
    33→  CommentOriginalRefIdContext,
    34→} from './providers'
    35→
    36→export const useUseCommentReply = () => use(CommentIsReplyContext)
    37→
    38→export const useCommentOriginalRefId = () => {
    39→  const fallbackRefId = useAtomValue(use(CommentBoxContext).refId)
    40→  return use(CommentOriginalRefIdContext) || fallbackRefId
    41→}
    42→
    43→export const useCommentCompletedCallback = () =>
    44→  use(CommentCompletedCallbackContext)
    45→
    46→export const useCommentBoxTextValue = () =>
    47→  useAtomValue(use(CommentBoxContext).text)
    48→
    49→export const useCommentBoxRefIdValue = () =>
    50→  useAtomValue(use(CommentBoxContext).refId)
    51→
    52→export const useGetCommentBoxAtomValues = () => use(CommentBoxContext)
    53→export const useCommentBoxLifeCycle = () => use(CommentBoxLifeCycleContext)
    54→
    55→// ReactNode 导致 tsx 无法推断，过于复杂
    56→const commentActionLeftSlotAtom = atom(null as PropsWithChildren['children'])
    57→export const useCommentActionLeftSlot = () =>
    58→  useAtomValue(commentActionLeftSlotAtom)
    59→
    60→export const setCommentActionLeftSlot = (slot: PropsWithChildren['children']) =>
    61→  jotaiStore.set(commentActionLeftSlotAtom, slot)
    62→
    63→export const useCommentBoxHasText = () =>
    64→  useAtomValue(
    65→    selectAtom(
    66→      use(CommentBoxContext).text,
    67→      useCallback((v) => v.length > 0, []),
    68→    ),
    69→  )
    70→
    71→export const useCommentBoxTextIsOversize = () =>
    72→  useAtomValue(
    73→    selectAtom(
    74→      use(CommentBoxContext).text,
    75→      useCallback((v) => v.length > MAX_COMMENT_TEXT_LENGTH, []),
    76→    ),
    77→  )
    78→type CommentContextValue = ReturnType<typeof createInitialValue>
    79→
    80→export const useSetCommentBoxValues = <
    81→  T extends keyof CommentContextValue,
    82→>() => {
    83→  const ctx = use(CommentBoxContext)
    84→  return useCallback(
    85→    (key: T, value: ExtractAtomValue<CommentContextValue[T]>) => {
    86→      const atom = ctx[key]
    87→      if (!atom) throw new Error(`atom ${key} not found`)
    88→      jotaiStore.set(atom as any, value)
    89→    },
    90→    [ctx],
    91→  )
    92→}
    93→
    94→// Comment Mode
    95→
    96→export const enum CommentBoxMode {
    97→  'legacy',
    98→  'with-auth',
    99→}
   100→
   101→const commentModeAtom = atomWithStorage(
   102→  'comment-mode',
   103→  CommentBoxMode['with-auth'],
   104→)
   105→
   106→export const useCommentMode = () => useAtomValue(commentModeAtom)
   107→export const setCommentMode = (mode: CommentBoxMode) =>
   108→  jotaiStore.set(commentModeAtom, mode)
   109→
   110→export const useSendComment = () => {
   111→  const commentRefId = useCommentBoxRefIdValue()
   112→  const {
   113→    text: textAtom,
   114→    author: authorAtom,
   115→    mail: mailAtom,
   116→    url: urlAtom,
   117→
   118→    source: sourceAtom,
   119→    avatar: avatarAtom,
   120→
   121→    anchor: anchorAtom,
   122→
   123→    isWhisper: isWhisperAtom,
   124→    syncToRecently: syncToRecentlyAtom,
   125→  } = useGetCommentBoxAtomValues()
   126→  const { afterSubmit } = useCommentBoxLifeCycle()
   127→  const isLogged = useIsOwnerLogged()
   128→  const queryClient = useQueryClient()
   129→  const isReply = useUseCommentReply()
   130→  const originalRefId = useCommentOriginalRefId()
   131→  const completedCallback = useCommentCompletedCallback()
   132→
   133→  const wrappedCompletedCallback = <T extends CommentModel>(data: T): T => {
   134→    completedCallback?.(data)
   135→    return data
   136→  }
   137→
   138→  const { mutate, isPending } = useMutation({
   139→    mutationFn: async (refId: string) => {
   140→      const text = jotaiStore.get(textAtom)
   141→      const author = jotaiStore.get(authorAtom)
   142→      const mail = jotaiStore.get(mailAtom)
   143→      const avatar = jotaiStore.get(avatarAtom)
   144→      const source = jotaiStore.get(sourceAtom) as any
   145→      const url = jotaiStore.get(urlAtom)
   146→      const anchor = jotaiStore.get(anchorAtom)
   147→
   148→      const commentDto: CommentDto & { anchor?: CommentAnchor } = { text, author, mail, avatar, source, url }
   149→      if (anchor) commentDto.anchor = anchor
   150→
   151→      if (isLogged) {
   152→        delete commentDto.avatar
   153→      }
   154→
   155→      // Omit empty string key
   156→      Object.keys(commentDto).forEach((key) => {
   157→        // @ts-expect-error
   158→        if (commentDto[key] === '') delete commentDto[key]
   159→      })
   160→
   161→      // Reply Comment
   162→      if (isReply) {
   163→        if (isLogged) {
   164→          return apiClient.comment.proxy.owner
   165→            .reply(refId)
   166→            .post<CommentModel>({
   167→              data: {
   168→                text,
   169→                source,
   170→              },
   171→            })
   172→            .then(wrappedCompletedCallback)
   173→        } else {
   174→          return apiClient.comment
   175→            .reply(refId, commentDto)
   176→            .then(wrappedCompletedCallback)
   177→        }
   178→      }
   179→
   180→      // Normal Comment
   181→      const isWhisper = jotaiStore.get(isWhisperAtom)
   182→      const syncToRecently = jotaiStore.get(syncToRecentlyAtom)
   183→
   184→      if (isLogged) {
   185→        return apiClient.comment.proxy.owner
   186→          .comment(refId)
   187→          .post<CommentModel>({
   188→            data: { text, source, ...(anchor ? { anchor } : {}) },
   189→          })
   190→          .then(async (res) => {
   191→            if (syncToRecently)
   192→              apiClient.recently.proxy
   193→                .post({
   194→                  data: {
   195→                    content: text,
   196→                    ref: refId,
   197→                  },
   198→                })
   199→                .then(() => {
   200→                  toast.success('已同步到碎碎念')
   201→                })
   202→
   203→            return res
   204→          })
   205→          .then(wrappedCompletedCallback)
   206→      }
   207→      // @ts-ignore
   208→      commentDto.isWhispers = isWhisper
   209→      return apiClient.comment
   210→        .comment(refId, commentDto)
   211→        .then(wrappedCompletedCallback)
   212→    },
   213→    mutationKey: [commentRefId, 'comment'],
   214→    onError(error: RequestError) {
   215→      toast.error(getErrorMessageFromRequestError(error))
   216→    },
   217→    onSuccess(data) {
   218→      afterSubmit?.()
   219→
   220→      const toastCopy = isLogged
   221→        ? '发表成功啦~'
   222→        : isReply
   223→          ? '感谢你的回复！'
   224→          : '感谢你的评论！'
   225→
   226→      const commentListQueryKey = buildCommentsQueryKey(originalRefId)
   227→
   228→      toast.success(toastCopy)
   229→      jotaiStore.set(textAtom, '')
   230→      jotaiStore.set(anchorAtom, null)
   231→
   232→      queryClient.setQueryData<
   233→        InfiniteData<
   234→          PaginateResult<
   235→            CommentModel & {
   236→              ref: string
   237→            }
   238→          >
   239→        >
   240→      >(commentListQueryKey, (oldData) => {
   241→        if (!oldData) return oldData
   242→        if (isReply) {
   243→          // find the reply refed comment
   244→
   245→          return produce(oldData, (draft) => {
   246→            const dfs = (
   247→              data: CommentModel,
   248→              commentRefId: string,
   249→              newData: CommentModel & { new?: boolean },
   250→            ) => {
   251→              if (data.id === commentRefId) {
   252→                if (!data.children) {
   253→                  data.children = []
   254→                }
   255→                ;(data.children as (CommentModel & { new: boolean })[]).push({
   256→                  ...newData,
   257→                  new: true,
   258→                })
   259→                return true
   260→              }
   261→              if (!data.children) {
   262→                return
   263→              }
   264→              for (const child of data.children) {
   265→                if (dfs(child, commentRefId, newData)) {
   266→                  return true
   267→                }
   268→              }
   269→              return false
   270→            }
   271→
   272→            const dataToAdd = {
   273→              ...data,
   274→              new: true,
   275→            }
   276→
   277→            for (const page of draft.pages) {
   278→              for (const item of page.data) {
   279→                if (dfs(item, commentRefId, dataToAdd)) {
   280→                  break
   281→                }
   282→              }
   283→            }
   284→          })
   285→        }
   286→
   287→        return produce(oldData, (draft) => {
   288→          draft.pages[0].data.unshift({
   289→            ...data,
   290→            // @ts-ignore
   291→            new: true,
   292→          })
   293→        })
   294→      })
   295→    },
   296→  })
   297→
   298→  return [
   299→    useCallback(() => mutate(commentRefId), [commentRefId, mutate]),
   300→    isPending,
   301→  ] as const
   302→}
   303→
```
</details></tool-use>

     8→import { useIsDark } from '~/hooks/common/use-is-dark'
