```text
    10→import { clsxm } from '~/lib/helper'
    11→
    12→import { FlexText } from '../text'
    13→
    14→interface AvatarProps {
    15→  url?: string
    16→  imageUrl?: string
    17→  size?: number
    18→
    19→  wrapperProps?: JSX.IntrinsicElements['div']
    20→
    21→  shadow?: boolean
    22→  text?: string
    23→  randomColor?: boolean
    24→  radius?: number | 'full'
    25→
    26→  lazy?: boolean
    27→}
    28→
    29→const noop = {} as any
    30→
    31→export const Avatar: FC<
    32→  AvatarProps &
    33→    DetailedHTMLProps<ImgHTMLAttributes<HTMLImageElement>, HTMLImageElement>
    34→> = (props) => {
    35→  const {
    36→    shadow = true,
    37→    lazy = true,
    38→    wrapperProps = noop,
    39→    size,
    40→    imageUrl,
    41→    text,
    42→    url,
    43→    randomColor,
    44→    radius,
    45→    ...imageProps
    46→  } = props
    47→  const avatarRef = useRef<HTMLDivElement>(null)
    48→
    49→  const [loaded, setLoaded] = useState(!lazy)
    50→  const [loadError, setLoadError] = useState(false)
    51→
    52→  const { className, ...restProps } = wrapperProps
    53→  const colors = useMemo(
    54→    () =>
    55→      (text || imageUrl) &&
    56→      randomColor &&
    57→      (getColorScheme(stringToHue(text || imageUrl!)) as any),
    58→    [text, imageUrl, randomColor],
    59→  )
    60→  const isDark = useIsDark()
    61→  const bgColor = isDark ? colors?.dark.background : colors?.light.background
    62→
    63→  return (
    64→    <div
    65→      className={clsxm(
    66→        'backface-hidden box-border',
    67→        shadow && 'shadow-xs',
    68→        className,
    69→      )}
    70→      ref={avatarRef}
    71→      style={{
    72→        ...(size
    73→          ? { height: `${size || 80}px`, width: `${size || 80}px` }
    74→          : undefined),
    75→        ...(bgColor ? { backgroundColor: bgColor } : undefined),
    76→        ...(radius
    77→          ? { borderRadius: radius === 'full' ? '100%' : `${radius}px` }
    78→          : undefined),
    79→      }}
    80→      {...restProps}
    81→    >
    82→      {createElement(
    83→        url ? 'a' : 'div',
    84→        {
    85→          className: 'relative inline-block h-full w-full',
    86→
    87→          ...(url
    88→            ? {
    89→                href: url,
    90→                target: '_blank',
    91→                rel: 'noreferrer',
    92→              }
    93→            : {}),
    94→        },
    95→        imageUrl && !loadError ? (
    96→          <div
    97→            className={clsxm(
    98→              'bg-cover bg-center bg-no-repeat transition-opacity duration-300',
    99→              className,
   100→            )}
   101→            style={{
   102→              borderRadius: radius === 'full' ? '100%' : `${radius}px`,
   103→            }}
   104→          >
   105→            <RadixAvatar.Root>
   106→              <RadixAvatar.Image
   107→                src={imageUrl}
   108→                style={{
   109→                  opacity: loaded ? 1 : 0,
   110→                  ...(radius
   111→                    ? {
   112→                        borderRadius:
   113→                          radius === 'full' ? '100%' : `${radius}px`,
   114→                      }
   115→                    : undefined),
   116→                }}
   117→                height={size}
   118→                width={size}
   119→                onLoad={() => setLoaded(true)}
   120→                onError={() => setLoadError(true)}
   121→                loading={lazy ? 'lazy' : 'eager'}
   122→                {...imageProps}
   123→                className={clsxm(
   124→                  'aspect-square duration-200',
   125→                  imageProps.className,
   126→                )}
   127→              />
   128→              <RadixAvatar.Fallback
   129→                delayMs={600}
   130→                style={{
   131→                  height: `${size}px`,
   132→                  width: `${size}px`,
   133→                  borderRadius: radius === 'full' ? '100%' : `${radius}px`,
   134→                }}
   135→                className={clsxm(
   136→                  'size-full block shrink-0',
   137→                  imageProps.className,
   138→                )}
   139→              />
   140→            </RadixAvatar.Root>
   141→          </div>
   142→        ) : text ? (
   143→          <div
   144→            className="relative flex size-full grow select-none items-center justify-center"
   145→            style={{
   146→              backgroundColor: bgColor,
   147→              ...(radius
   148→                ? { borderRadius: radius === 'full' ? '100%' : `${radius}px` }
   149→                : undefined),
   150→            }}
   151→          >
   152→            <FlexText scale={0.5} text={text} />
   153→          </div>
   154→        ) : null,
   155→      )}
   156→    </div>
   157→  )
   158→}
```

```text
   176→                />
   177→              </article>
   178→            </MarkdownSelection>
   179→          </PostMarkdownImageRecordProvider>
   180→
   181→          <LayoutRightSidePortal>
   182→            <PostActionAside />
   183→          </LayoutRightSidePortal>
   184→        </WrappedElementProvider>
   185→      </div>
   186→      <ClientOnly>
   187→        <PostRelated />
   188→        <PostCopyright />
   189→
   190→        {/* <SubscribeBell defaultType="post_c" /> */}
   191→        <PostBottomBarAction />
   192→      </ClientOnly>
   193→    </div>
   194→  )
   195→}
   196→
   197→export default definePrerenderPage<PageParams>()<PostDataResult>({
   198→  fetcher(params) {
   199→    return getData(params)
   200→  },
   201→
   202→  Component: async (props) => {
   203→    const { data: fetchedData, params, fetchedAt } = props
   204→    const { post: data } = fetchedData
   205→
   206→    const fullPath = `/posts/${data.category.slug}/${data.slug}`
   207→    const currentPath = `/posts/${params.category}/${params.slug}`
   208→
   209→    const jsonLd: WithContext<Article> = {
   210→      '@context': 'https://schema.org',
   211→      '@type': 'BlogPosting',
   212→      headline: data.title,
   213→      image: data.meta?.cover ? [data.meta.cover] : undefined,
   214→      description: data.summary || (data.text ?? '').slice(0, 200),
   215→      datePublished: data.created,
   216→      dateModified: data.modified || undefined,
   217→    }
   218→
   219→    return (
   220→      <TocHeadingStrategyProvider
   221→        contentFormat={data.contentFormat}
   222→        content={data.content}
   223→      >
   224→        {currentPath !== fullPath && <SlugReplacer to={fullPath} />}
   225→        <LdJsonWithAuthor baseLdJson={jsonLd} />
   226→
   227→        <PageColorGradient seed={data.title + data.category.name} />
   228→        <CurrentPostDataProvider data={data} />
   229→        <PostDataReValidate fetchedAt={fetchedAt} />
   230→        <div
   231→          data-server-fetched-at={fetchedAt}
   232→          className="relative flex min-h-[120px] grid-cols-[auto_200px] lg:grid"
   233→        >
   234→          <BottomToUpTransitionView lcpOptimization className="min-w-0">
   235→            <RoomProvider roomName={buildRoomName(data.id)}>
   236→              <PostPage data={data} />
   237→            </RoomProvider>
   238→
   239→            <BottomToUpSoftScaleTransitionView delay={500}>
   240→              <CommentAreaRootLazy
   241→                refId={data.id}
   242→                allowComment={data.allowComment}
   243→              />
   244→            </BottomToUpSoftScaleTransitionView>
   245→          </BottomToUpTransitionView>
   246→
   247→          <LayoutRightSideProvider className="relative hidden lg:block" />
   248→        </div>
   249→
   250→        <OnlyMobile>
   251→          <TocFAB />
   252→        </OnlyMobile>
   253→      </TocHeadingStrategyProvider>
   254→    )
   255→  },
   256→})
   257→
```

```text
    24→
    25→const linkCardFetchContext: LinkCardFetchContext = {
    26→  adapters: {
    27→    github: {
    28→      request: fetchGitHubApi,
    29→    },
    30→    tmdb: {
    31→      request: (url) => {
    32→        const u = new URL(url)
    33→        const path = u.pathname.replace(/^\/3\//, '')
    34→        return fetch(`/api/tmdb/${path}${u.search}`).then((r) => r.json())
    35→      },
    36→    },
    37→    bangumi: {
    38→      request: (url) => {
    39→        const u = new URL(url)

    41→        return fetch(`/api/bangumi/${path}`).then((r) => r.json())
    42→      },
    43→    },
    44→    leetcode: {

    48→    },
    49→    'netease-music': {
    50→      request: (url) => {
    51→        const songId = new URL(url).pathname.split('/').pop()
    52→        return fetch('/api/music/netease', {
    53→          method: 'POST',
    54→          headers: { 'Content-Type': 'application/json' },
    55→          body: JSON.stringify({ songId }),
    56→        }).then((r) => r.json())
    57→      },
    58→    },

    67→      },

    75→}
    76→
    77→export interface LexicalContentProps {

    82→
    83→export function LexicalContent({

   104→      }) as React.CSSProperties,
   105→    [],
   106→  )
   107→
   108→  const editorOverrideStyle = useMemo(
   109→    () =>
   110→      createThemeStyle({
   111→        color: {
   112→          accent: 'var(--color-accent, var(--color-primary, #33a6b8))',
   113→          link: 'var(--color-accent, var(--color-primary, #33a6b8))',
   114→          accentLight:
   115→            'color-mix(in srgb, var(--color-accent, var(--color-primary, #33a6b8)) 20%, transparent)',
   116→          quoteBorder: 'var(--color-accent, var(--color-primary, #33a6b8))',
   117→        },
   118→        layout: { maxWidth: '100%' },
   119→        typography: {
   120→          fontFamily:
   121→            variant === 'note'
   122→              ? `var(--note-font-override, ${fallbackSerifFont})`
   123→              : fallbackSansFont,
   124→          fontFamilySerif: fallbackSerifFont,
   125→          fontMono: fallbackMonoFont,
   126→        },
   127→      }),
   128→    [variant],
   129→  )
   130→
   131→  if (!editorState) return null
   132→
   133→  return (
   134→    <LinkCardFetchProvider value={linkCardFetchContext}>
   135→      <ShiroRenderer
   136→        value={editorState}
   137→        variant={variant}
   138→        theme={isDark ? 'dark' : 'light'}
   139→        className={clsx(className, 'bg-transparent!')}
   140→        style={{ ...baseVarStyle, ...editorOverrideStyle }}
   141→      />
   142→    </LinkCardFetchProvider>
   143→  )
   144→}
```

```text
   221→                <div className="contents" onClick={stopPropagation}>

   223→                </div>
   224→              </div>
   225→            </Dialog.Content>
   226→          </Dialog.Portal>
   227→        </Dialog.Root>
   228→      </Wrapper>
   229→    )
   230→  }
   231→  return (
   232→    <Wrapper>
   233→      <Dialog.Root open onOpenChange={onClose}>
   234→        <Dialog.Portal>
   235→          <Dialog.Content asChild>
   236→            <div
   237→              ref={edgeElementRef}
   238→              className={clsxm(
   239→                'center fixed inset-0 z-20 flex',
   240→                currentIsClosing
   241→                  ? 'pointer-events-none!'
   242→                  : 'pointer-events-auto',
   243→                modalContainerClassName,
   244→              )}
   245→              style={zIndexStyle}
   246→              onClick={clickOutsideToDismiss ? dismiss : noticeModal}
   247→            >
   248→              <m.div
   249→                style={zIndexStyle}
   250→                ref={setModalContentRef}
   251→                {...modalMontionConfig}
   252→                animate={animateController}
   253→                className={clsxm(
   254→                  'relative flex flex-col overflow-hidden rounded-lg',
   255→                  'bg-zinc-50/90 dark:bg-neutral-900/90',
   256→                  'p-2 shadow-2xl shadow-stone-300 backdrop-blur-xs dark:shadow-stone-800',
   257→                  max
   258→                    ? 'h-[90vh] w-[90vw]'
   259→                    : 'max-h-[70vh] min-w-[300px] max-w-[90vw] lg:max-h-[calc(100vh-20rem)] lg:max-w-[70vw]',
   260→
   261→                  'border border-slate-200 dark:border-neutral-800',
   262→                  modalClassName,
   263→                )}
   264→                onClick={stopPropagation}
   265→                drag
   266→                dragControls={dragController}
   267→                dragListener={false}
   268→                dragElastic={0}
   269→                dragMomentum={false}
   270→                dragConstraints={edgeElementRef}
   271→                whileDrag={{
   272→                  cursor: 'grabbing',
   273→                }}
   274→              >
   275→                <div
   276→                  className="relative flex items-center"
   277→                  onPointerDown={(e) => dragController.start(e)}
   278→                >
   279→                  <Dialog.Title className="shrink-0 grow items-center px-4 py-1 text-lg font-medium">
   280→                    {title}
   281→                  </Dialog.Title>
   282→                  <Dialog.DialogClose className="p-2" onClick={close}>
   283→                    <CloseIcon />
   284→                  </Dialog.DialogClose>
   285→                </div>
   286→                <Divider className="my-2 shrink-0 border-slate-200 opacity-80 dark:border-neutral-800" />
   287→
   288→                <div className="min-h-0 shrink grow overflow-auto px-4 py-2">
   289→                  {finalChildren}
   290→                </div>
   291→              </m.div>
   292→            </div>
   293→          </Dialog.Content>
   294→        </Dialog.Portal>
   295→      </Dialog.Root>
   296→    </Wrapper>
   297→  )
   298→})
   299→
```

```text
     1→import { AnimatePresence } from 'motion/react'
     2→import type { FC, ReactNode } from 'react'
     3→import * as React from 'react'
     4→import { useId, useMemo } from 'react'
     5→
     6→import { clsxm } from '~/lib/helper'
     7→import { jotaiStore } from '~/lib/store'
     8→
     9→import { modalStackAtom } from './context'
    10→import { ModalInternal } from './modal'
    11→import type { ModalProps } from './types'
    12→
    13→export interface DeclarativeModalProps extends Omit<ModalProps, 'content'> {
    14→  open?: boolean
    15→  onOpenChange?: (open: boolean) => void
    16→  children?: ReactNode
    17→
    18→  id?: string
    19→}
    20→
    21→const Noop = () => null
    22→const DeclarativeModalImpl: FC<DeclarativeModalProps> = ({
    23→  open,
    24→  onOpenChange,
    25→  children,
    26→  ...rest
    27→}) => {
    28→  const index = useMemo(() => jotaiStore.get(modalStackAtom).length, [])
    29→
    30→  const id = useId()
    31→  const item = useMemo(
    32→    () => ({
    33→      ...rest,
    34→      content: Noop,
    35→      id,
    36→    }),
    37→    [id, rest],
    38→  )
    39→  return (
    40→    <AnimatePresence>
    41→      {open && (
    42→        <ModalInternal isTop onClose={onOpenChange} index={index} item={item}>
    43→          {children}
    44→        </ModalInternal>
    45→      )}
    46→    </AnimatePresence>
    47→  )
    48→}
    49→
    50→const FooterAction: Component = ({ children, className }) => (
    51→  <div className={clsxm('mt-4 flex items-center justify-end gap-2', className)}>
    52→    {children}
    53→  </div>
    54→)
    55→
    56→export const DeclarativeModal = Object.assign(DeclarativeModalImpl, {
    57→  FooterAction,
    58→})
    59→
```
</details></tool-use>

```text
     4→import * as React from 'react'

     8→import { useIsClient } from '~/hooks/common/use-is-client'
     9→
    10→const rightSideElementAtom = atom<null | HTMLDivElement>(null)
    11→export const LayoutRightSideProvider: Component = ({ className }) => {
    12→  const setElement = useSetAtom(rightSideElementAtom)
    13→  const divRef = React.useRef<HTMLDivElement>(null)
    14→  useLayoutEffect(() => {
    15→    setElement(divRef.current)
    16→    return () => {
    17→      // GC
    18→      setElement(null)
    19→    }
    20→  }, [])
    21→
    22→  return <div ref={divRef} className={className} />
    23→}
    24→
    25→export const LayoutRightSidePortal: Component = ({ children }) => {
    26→  const rightSideElement = useAtomValue(rightSideElementAtom)
    27→
    28→  const isClient = useIsClient()
    29→  if (!isClient) return null
    30→
    31→  if (!rightSideElement) return null
    32→
    33→  return createPortal(children, rightSideElement)
    34→}
    35→
```

```text
   259→const CommentHolderContext = createContext(atom(null as null | HTMLDivElement))
   260→
   261→const CommentBoxHolderProvider = () => {
   262→  const ref = useRef<HTMLDivElement>(null)
   263→  const commentBoxHolderElementAtom = use(CommentHolderContext)
   264→  useLayoutEffect(() => {
   265→    jotaiStore.set(commentBoxHolderElementAtom, ref.current)
   266→
   267→    return () => {
   268→      jotaiStore.set(commentBoxHolderElementAtom, null)
   269→    }
   270→  }, [commentBoxHolderElementAtom])
   271→  return <div ref={ref} />
   272→}

   274→export const CommentBoxHolderPortal = (props: PropsWithChildren) => {
   275→  const portalElement = useAtomValue(use(CommentHolderContext))
   276→
   277→  if (!portalElement) return null
   278→
   279→  return createPortal(props.children, portalElement)
   280→}
   281→
   282→const EditedCommentFooter: FC<{
   283→  commentId: string
   284→}> = ({ commentId }) => {
   285→  const editedAt = useCommentByIdSelector(
   286→    commentId,
   287→    useCallback((comment) => comment?.editedAt, []),
   288→  )
   289→  const ref = useCommentMarkdownContainerRef()
   290→
   291→  const lastNode = useMemo(() => {
   292→    if (!ref) return null
   293→    return ref.lastChild
   294→  }, [ref])
   295→  const lastNodeIsParagraph = useMemo(() => {
   296→    if (!lastNode) return false
   297→    return lastNode.nodeName === 'P'
   298→  }, [lastNode])
   299→
   300→  if (!editedAt) return null
   301→
   302→  const InlineEl = (
   303→    <FloatPopover
   304→      type="tooltip"
   305→      triggerElement={
   306→        <span className="ml-2 text-xs text-zinc-500">(已编辑)</span>
   307→      }
   308→    >
   309→      <div>
   310→        <span>编辑于</span>
   311→        <RelativeTime date={editedAt} />
   312→      </div>
   313→    </FloatPopover>
   314→  )
   315→  if (!lastNodeIsParagraph) return <div className="[&_*]:!ml-0">{InlineEl}</div>
   316→
   317→  return createPortal(InlineEl, lastNode as HTMLDivElement)
   318→}
```

 `./apps/web/src/components/ui/modal/stacked/provider.tsx`

```text
     1→import { useAtomValue } from 'jotai'
     2→import { AnimatePresence } from 'motion/react'
     3→import type { FC, PropsWithChildren } from 'react'
     4→import { useCallback, useId, useRef } from 'react'
     5→
     6→import { useIsMobile } from '~/atoms/hooks/viewport'
     7→import { jotaiStore } from '~/lib/store'
     8→
     9→import { MODAL_STACK_Z_INDEX } from './constants'
    10→import { modalIdToPropsMap, modalStackAtom } from './context'
    11→import { ModalInternal } from './modal'
    12→import { ModalOverlay } from './overlay'
    13→import type { ModalProps } from './types'
    14→
    15→interface ModalStackOptions {
    16→  wrapper?: FC
    17→}
    18→
    19→export const useModalStack = (options?: ModalStackOptions) => {
    20→  const id = useId()
    21→  const currentCount = useRef(0)
    22→  const { wrapper } = options || {}
    23→  return {
    24→    present: useCallback(
    25→      (props: ModalProps & { id?: string }) => {
    26→        const fallbackModelId = `${id}-${++currentCount.current}`
    27→        const modalId = props.id ?? fallbackModelId
    28→
    29→        const currentStack = jotaiStore.get(modalStackAtom)
    30→
    31→        const existingModal = currentStack.find((item) => item.id === modalId)
    32→        if (existingModal) {
    33→          // Move to top
    34→          jotaiStore.set(modalStackAtom, (p) => {
    35→            const index = p.indexOf(existingModal)
    36→            return [...p.slice(0, index), ...p.slice(index + 1), existingModal]
    37→          })
    38→        } else {
    39→          jotaiStore.set(modalStackAtom, (p) => {
    40→            const modalProps = {
    41→              ...props,
    42→              id: modalId,
    43→              wrapper,
    44→            }
    45→            modalIdToPropsMap[modalProps.id] = modalProps
    46→            return p.concat(modalProps)
    47→          })
    48→        }
    49→
    50→        return () => {
    51→          jotaiStore.set(modalStackAtom, (p) =>
    52→            p.filter((item) => item.id !== modalId),
    53→          )
    54→        }
    55→      },
    56→      [id],
    57→    ),
    58→
    59→    ...actions,
    60→  }
    61→}
    62→
    63→const actions = {
    64→  dismiss(id: string) {
    65→    jotaiStore.set(modalStackAtom, (p) => p.filter((item) => item.id !== id))
    66→  },
    67→  dismissTop() {
    68→    jotaiStore.set(modalStackAtom, (p) => p.slice(0, -1))
    69→  },
    70→  dismissAll() {
    71→    jotaiStore.set(modalStackAtom, [])
    72→  },
    73→}
    74→export const ModalStackProvider: FC<PropsWithChildren> = ({ children }) => (
    75→  <>
    76→    {children}
    77→    <ModalStack />
    78→  </>
    79→)
    80→
    81→const ModalStack = () => {
    82→  const stack = useAtomValue(modalStackAtom)
    83→
    84→  const forceOverlay = stack.some((item) => item.overlay)
    85→
    86→  const isMobile = useIsMobile()
    87→  return (
    88→    <AnimatePresence mode="popLayout">
    89→      {stack.map((item, index) => (
    90→        <ModalInternal
    91→          key={item.id}
    92→          item={item}
    93→          index={index}
    94→          isTop={index === stack.length - 1}
    95→        />
    96→      ))}
    97→      {stack.length > 0 && forceOverlay && !isMobile && (
    98→        <ModalOverlay zIndex={MODAL_STACK_Z_INDEX + stack.length - 1} />
    99→      )}
   100→    </AnimatePresence>
   101→  )
   102→}
   103→
```
</details></tool-use>

## Component Directory Analysis

Here's a complete breakdown of the visual/UI components available at `<TMP_DIR>/b_ENCfwcHOEnE-1772209167696/components`:

---

### **Comment-Specific Components**

#### 1. **CommentThread** (`comment-thread.tsx`)
- **Purpose**: Displays threaded comments with reply capability
- **Props**: 
  - `comments: Comment[]` - Array of existing comments
  - `currentUser: User` - Current user info
  - `onAddComment: (content: string) => void` - Handler for new comments
- **Visual Elements**:
  - ScrollArea container with max-height (max-h-72)
  - Avatar (size-7) for each commenter with fallback initials
  - Comment metadata: user name (font-semibold, 13px), timestamp in muted color (11px)
  - Comment content (13px, leading-relaxed, 80% opacity)
  - Textarea input (min-h-60px, resize-none)
  - Keyboard hint badge (`Cmd+Enter` to send)
  - Send button with icon
  - Border separator between existing comments and new comment area
  - Width constraint: w-80

#### 2. **InlineCommentMark** (`inline-comment-mark.tsx`)
- **Purpose**: Highlights selected text with inline comments
- **Props**:
  - `inlineComment: InlineComment` - Comment data for the text span
  - `currentUser: User` - Current user
  - `onAddReply: (inlineCommentId, content) => void` - Reply handler
  - `children: ReactNode` - The highlighted text
- **Visual Elements**:
  - Dashed underline with primary color (decoration-dashed, primary/60 → primary on hover)
  - Hover background (primary/10)
  - Popover with quoted text display
  - Curly quotes around selected text ("…")
  - Border-top separator in popover

#### 3. **SelectionToolbar** (`selection-toolbar.tsx`)
- **Purpose**: Context toolbar appearing when text is selected
- **Props**:
  - `currentUser: User`
  - `onAddInlineComment: (blockId, selectedText, startOffset, endOffset, content) => void`
  - `containerRef: React.RefObject<HTMLElement>`
- **Visual Elements**:
  - Floating toolbar (absolute positioned, z-50)
  - Pill button with MessageSquareQuote icon
  - Popover with selected text preview
  - Positioned above selection with arrow
  - Shadow-lg for depth

#### 4. **EditorBlock** (`editor-block.tsx`)
- **Purpose**: Single document block with comment gutter
- **Props**:
  - `block: Block` - Document content block
  - `inlineComments: InlineComment[]`
  - `currentUser: User`
  - `onAddComment: (blockId, content) => void`
  - `onAddInlineReply: (inlineCommentId, content) => void`
- **Visual Elements**:
  - Main content area (flex-1, rounded-md px-2 py-1.5)
  - Right gutter (w-16) for comment indicators
  - Avatar stack showing comment authors (size-6, overlapping -space-x-1.5)
  - Comment count badge (11px text)
  - MessageSquarePlus icon button (appears on hover if no comments, opacity-0 → opacity-100)
  - Background highlight on block when open (comment-highlight class)
  - Supports multiple block types: h1, h2, h3, paragraph, quote, code, list-item, divider
  - Popover on right side (side="right", align="start")

#### 5. **DocumentViewer** (`document-viewer.tsx`)
- **Purpose**: Full document interface with all comments
- **Props**: None (uses internal state)
- **Visual Elements**:
  - Sticky header (top-0, z-20, border-b)
  - Document icon + title (FileText icon, size-8)
  - Lock icon with "Read only" status
  - Collaborator avatars stack (overlapping -space-x-2, ring-2 ring-card)
  - +N indicator for additional users
  - Main content area with blocks
  - Uses ScrollArea, Tooltip, Avatar primitives

---

### **UI Primitive Components**

#### **Avatar** (`ui/avatar.tsx`)
- **Composition**: Root, Image, Fallback (from @radix-ui/react-avatar)
- **Base styles**: `size-8 rounded-full overflow-hidden`
- **Common sizes**: size-7, size-6 (used in comments)
- **Fallback**: `bg-muted` or `bg-accent`/`bg-primary` for styling

#### **Popover** (`ui/popover.tsx`)
- **Composition**: Root, Trigger, Content, Anchor (from @radix-ui/react-popover)
- **Content styles**: 
  - `w-72` default width (overridden with `w-auto` for comments)
  - Animations: fade-in-0, zoom-in-95
  - Border, rounded-md, shadow-md
  - Portal rendering (z-50)
- **Positioning**: side (top, bottom, right, left), align (start, center, end), sideOffset

#### **Button** (`ui/button.tsx`)
- **Variants**: default (primary), destructive, outline, secondary, ghost, link
- **Sizes**: default (h-9), sm (h-8), lg (h-10), icon variants
- **Features**: 
  - SVG icon sizing (size-4 default, respects explicit sizes)
  - Disabled state handling
  - Focus-visible ring (3px)
  - Supports asChild (Slot composition)

#### **Textarea** (`ui/textarea.tsx`)
- **Base**: Native textarea with styled wrapper
- **Styles**: 
  - Border, rounded-md, px-3 py-2
  - Focus-visible ring, transitions
  - field-sizing-content for auto-expansion
  - min-h-16 default

#### **ScrollArea** (`ui/scroll-area.tsx`)
- **Composition**: Root, Viewport, ScrollBar, Corner (from @radix-ui/react-scroll-area)
- **ScrollBar**: Vertical/horizontal, thumb with bg-border, smooth transitions
- **Features**: Custom scrollbar styling, optional orientation

#### **Tooltip** (`ui/tooltip.tsx`)
- **Composition**: Provider, Root, Trigger, Content (from @radix-ui/react-tooltip)
- **Content styles**: bg-foreground text-background, 3px arrow, rounded-md
- **Positioning**: side (top, bottom, left, right), configurable sideOffset

#### **Card** (`ui/card.tsx`)
- **Composition**: Card, CardHeader, CardTitle, CardDescription, CardAction, CardContent, CardFooter
- **Styles**: bg-card, rounded-xl, border, shadow-sm, px-6 py-6
- **Container queries**: @container/card-header for responsive header

#### **Badge** (`ui/badge.tsx`)
- **Variants**: default (primary), secondary, destructive, outline
- **Sizes**: Uniform inline-flex with text-xs font-medium
- **Features**: w-fit whitespace-nowrap, gap-1 for icons, borderless variants

#### **Separator** (`ui/separator.tsx`)
- **Props**: orientation (horizontal/vertical), decorative
- **Styles**: bg-border, 1px thickness, h-px or w-px

#### **Label** (`ui/label.tsx`)
- **Base**: From @radix-ui/react-label
- **Styles**: flex items-center gap-2, text-sm, font-medium, select-none
- **Disabled state**: opacity-50 with pointer-events-none

#### **Sidebar** (`ui/sidebar.tsx`) - Complex layout system
- **Composition**: SidebarProvider, Sidebar, SidebarContent, SidebarHeader, SidebarFooter, SidebarGroup, SidebarMenu, SidebarMenuItem, SidebarMenuButton, SidebarMenuAction, SidebarMenuBadge, SidebarMenuSkeleton, SidebarMenuSub, SidebarMenuSubButton
- **Features**:
  - Collapsible modes: offcanvas, icon, none
  - Mobile-responsive (Sheet on mobile, fixed sidebar on desktop)
  - Cookie-based state persistence
  - Keyboard shortcut (Ctrl/Cmd+B)
  - Width variables: --sidebar-width (16rem), --sidebar-width-icon (3rem)
  - Variants: sidebar, floating, inset
  - Side positioning: left, right
- **Menu items**: Active state styling, tooltips on collapsed state, hover actions
- **Badge support**: Positioned absolutely on menu items

---

### **Styling Patterns**

**Color System**:
- Foreground/background contrast pairs (foreground, background, card, sidebar)
- Primary/secondary color variants
- Accent colors for highlights
- Muted variants (muted-foreground, muted background)
- Destructive for danger actions

**Spacing**:
- Base unit: ~0.25rem (4px)
- Common gaps: gap-2, gap-2.5, gap-3
- Padding: px-2, px-3, px-4, py-1.5, py-2.5
- Negative spacing for overlaps: -space-x-1.5, -space-x-2

**Typography**:
- Comment text: 13px (text-[13px])
- Metadata: 11px (text-[11px]), 12px (text-[12px])
- Leading: leading-relaxed (1.625em), leading-tight, leading-snug
- Opacity: /80 (text-foreground/80), /70, /30

**Animations**:
- Slide-in transitions (slide-in-from-*)
- Fade-in/out (fade-in-0, fade-out-0)
- Zoom effects (zoom-in-95, zoom-out-95)
- Color/shadow transitions (transition-[color,box-shadow])
- Hover bg transitions (duration-150)

---

### **Key Design Decisions for Comment Sidebar**

1. **Compact sizing**: All comment UI uses small text (11px-13px) and compact spacing
2. **Avatar-centric**: Shows commenters via small avatar stacks with tooltips
3. **Contextual popovers**: Comments open in popovers anchored to content (right for blocks, bottom for inline)
4. **Subtle highlights**: Uses primary/10 opacity for hover states, primary/60 for decorative elements
5. **Keyboard-first input**: Sends with Cmd/Ctrl+Enter
6. **Scrollable overflow**: Long comment threads use ScrollArea with max-height
7. **State indicators**: Active comments show visual feedback (highlight background)
8. **Progressive disclosure**: Hidden comment button appears on hover

These patterns suggest a reference design suited for building a comment sidebar that maintains consistency with the existing system through popover-based interactions, compact typography, and avatar-driven presence indicators.

```text
     4→import type { FC } from 'react'
     5→import { memo, useEffect } from 'react'
     6→
     7→import { ErrorBoundary } from '~/components/common/ErrorBoundary'
     8→import { BottomToUpSoftScaleTransitionView } from '~/components/ui/transition'
     9→import { useTypeScriptHappyCallback } from '~/hooks/common/use-callback'
    10→import { WsEvent } from '~/socket/util'
    11→
    12→import { Comment } from './Comment'
    13→import { CommentBoxProvider } from './CommentBox/providers'
    14→import { CommentProvider, useUpdateComment } from './CommentProvider'
    15→import type { CommentBaseProps } from './types'
    16→
    17→export const Comments: FC<CommentBaseProps> = ({ refId }) => {
    18→  return (
    19→    <ErrorBoundary>
    20→      <CommentProvider refId={refId}>
    21→        {useTypeScriptHappyCallback(
    22→          (data) => {
    23→            // sort by pin
    24→            const comments = data?.pages.flatMap((data) => data.data)
    25→
    26→            return (
    27→              <ul className="min-h-[400px] list-none space-y-4">
    28→                {comments.map((comment) => (
    29→                  <BottomToUpSoftScaleTransitionView key={comment.id}>
    30→                    <CommentListItem commentId={comment.id} refId={refId} />
    31→                  </BottomToUpSoftScaleTransitionView>
    32→                ))}
    33→                <CommentEventHandler refId={refId} />
    34→              </ul>
    35→            )
    36→          },
    37→          [refId],
    38→        )}
    39→      </CommentProvider>
    40→    </ErrorBoundary>
    41→  )
    42→}
    43→
    44→const CommentListItem: FC<{ commentId: string; refId: string }> = memo(
    45→  function CommentListItem({ commentId, refId }) {
    46→    return (
    47→      <CommentBoxProvider refId={refId}>
    48→        <Comment commentId={commentId} />
    49→      </CommentBoxProvider>
    50→    )
    51→  },
    52→)
    53→
    54→const CommentEventHandler = ({ refId }: { refId: string }) => {
    55→  useEffect(() => {
    56→    const currentTitle = document.title
    57→
    58→    // 当标签页回复前台状态时，将标题重置
    59→    const onVisibilityChange = () => {
    60→      if (document.visibilityState === 'visible') {
    61→        document.title = currentTitle
    62→      }
    63→    }
    64→    document.addEventListener('visibilitychange', onVisibilityChange)
    65→
    66→    const cleaner = WsEvent.on(BusinessEvents.COMMENT_CREATE, (data) => {
    67→      if (
    68→        data.ref === refId && // 如果标签页在后台
    69→        document.visibilityState === 'hidden'
    70→      ) {
    71→        document.title = `新评论！${currentTitle}`
    72→      }
    73→    })
    74→    return () => {
    75→      cleaner()
    76→      document.removeEventListener('visibilitychange', onVisibilityChange)
    77→    }
    78→  }, [refId])
    79→  const updateCommentUI = useUpdateComment()
    80→  useEffect(() => {
    81→    const cleaner = WsEvent.on(BusinessEvents.COMMENT_UPDATE, (data) => {
    82→      updateCommentUI({
    83→        id: data.id,
    84→        text: data.text,
    85→      })
    86→    })
    87→    return () => {
    88→      cleaner()
    89→    }
    90→  }, [updateCommentUI])
    91→  return null
    92→}
    93→
```

```text
    11→
    12→export function CommentBlockButton({
    13→  containerRef,
    14→  blockInfos,
    15→  refId,
    16→  title,
    17→}: {
    18→  containerRef: React.RefObject<HTMLElement | null>
    19→  blockInfos: BlockInfo[]
    20→  refId: string
    21→  title: string
    22→}) {
    23→  const [hoverIndex, setHoverIndex] = useState(-1)
    24→  const [btnPos, setBtnPos] = useState({ top: 0, right: 0 })
    25→  const btnRef = useRef<HTMLButtonElement>(null)
    26→  const { present } = useModalStack()
    27→  const t = useTranslations('common')
    28→
    29→  const handleMouseMove = useCallback(
    30→    (e: MouseEvent) => {
    31→      const container = containerRef.current
    32→      if (!container) return
    33→
    34→      const contentEl = container.querySelector('.rich-content')
    35→      if (!contentEl) return
    36→
    37→      const { children } = contentEl
    38→      const containerRect = container.getBoundingClientRect()
    39→
    40→      for (let i = 0; i < children.length; i++) {
    41→        const child = children[i] as HTMLElement
    42→        const rect = child.getBoundingClientRect()
    43→        if (e.clientY >= rect.top && e.clientY <= rect.bottom) {
    44→          setHoverIndex(i)
    45→          setBtnPos({
    46→            top: rect.top - containerRect.top + 4,
    47→            right: 0,
    48→          })
    49→          return
    50→        }
    51→      }
    52→      setHoverIndex(-1)
    53→    },
    54→    [containerRef],
    55→  )
    56→
    57→  const handleMouseLeave = useCallback(() => {
    58→    setHoverIndex(-1)
    59→  }, [])
    60→
    61→  useEffect(() => {
    62→    const container = containerRef.current
    63→    if (!container) return
    64→
    65→    container.addEventListener('mousemove', handleMouseMove)
    66→    container.addEventListener('mouseleave', handleMouseLeave)
    67→    return () => {
    68→      container.removeEventListener('mousemove', handleMouseMove)
    69→      container.removeEventListener('mouseleave', handleMouseLeave)
    70→    }
    71→  }, [containerRef, handleMouseMove, handleMouseLeave])
    72→
    73→  if (hoverIndex < 0) return null
    74→
    75→  return (
    76→    <button
    77→      ref={btnRef}
    78→      type="button"
    79→      className="absolute z-10 flex size-6 items-center justify-center rounded-full bg-zinc-200/80 text-zinc-500 opacity-0 transition-opacity hover:bg-accent/20 hover:text-accent group-hover/comment-block:opacity-100 dark:bg-zinc-700/80 dark:text-zinc-400"
    80→      style={{
    81→        top: btnPos.top,
    82→        right: btnPos.right,
    83→      }}
    84→      onClick={() => {
    85→        const anchor = buildBlockAnchorFromIndex(blockInfos, hoverIndex)
    86→        present({
    87→          title: t('selection_comment'),
    88→          content: (rest) => (
    89→            <CommentModal
    90→              refId={refId}
    91→              title={title}
    92→              anchor={anchor}
    93→              {...rest}
    94→            />
    95→          ),
    96→        })
    97→      }}
    98→    >
    99→      <i className="icon-[mingcute--comment-line] text-sm" />
   100→    </button>
   101→  )
   102→}
   103→
```

```text
     1→'use client'
     2→
     3→import type { CommentModel, PaginateResult } from '@mx-space/api-client'
     4→import type { InfiniteData } from '@tanstack/react-query'
     5→import { useQuery, useQueryClient } from '@tanstack/react-query'
     6→import type { PropsWithChildren } from 'react'
     7→import { useMemo, useRef, useSyncExternalStore } from 'react'
     8→
     9→import { apiClient } from '~/lib/request'
    10→import { buildCommentsQueryKey } from '~/queries/keys'
    11→
    12→import type { BlockInfo } from './anchor-utils'
    13→import { extractBlockInfos } from './anchor-utils'
    14→import { CommentAnchorHighlight } from './CommentAnchorHighlight'
    15→import { CommentBlockButton } from './CommentBlockButton'
    16→import type { CommentAnchor } from './types'
    17→
    18→type CommentWithAnchor = CommentModel & { anchor?: CommentAnchor }
    19→type CommentsQueryData = InfiniteData<
    20→  PaginateResult<CommentWithAnchor & { ref: string }>
    21→>
    22→
    23→function useAnchorCommentsQuery(refId: string): CommentWithAnchor[] {
    24→  const { data } = useQuery({
    25→    queryKey: ['comments', refId, 'anchors'],
    26→    queryFn: async () => {
    27→      const data = await apiClient.comment.proxy
    28→        .ref(refId)
    29→        .get<PaginateResult<CommentWithAnchor & { ref: string }>>({
    30→          params: { hasAnchor: 'true', size: 50 },
    31→        })
    32→
    33→      console.log('data', data)
    34→      return data
    35→    },
    36→  })
    37→
    38→  console.log('data', data)
    39→
    40→  return useMemo(() => {
    41→    if (!data) return []
    42→    return data.data
    43→  }, [data])
    44→}
    45→
    46→function useCachedCommentsData(refId: string): CommentWithAnchor[] {
    47→  const queryClient = useQueryClient()
    48→  const queryKey = useMemo(() => buildCommentsQueryKey(refId), [refId])
    49→  const queryCache = queryClient.getQueryCache()
    50→
    51→  const data = useSyncExternalStore(
    52→    (onStoreChange) => {
    53→      const unsubscribe = queryCache.subscribe((event) => {
    54→        if (
    55→          event.type === 'updated' &&
    56→          event.query.queryHash === JSON.stringify(queryKey)
    57→        ) {
    58→          onStoreChange()
    59→        }
    60→      })
    61→      return unsubscribe
    62→    },
    63→    () => queryClient.getQueryData<CommentsQueryData>(queryKey),
    64→    () => null as CommentsQueryData | null,
    65→  )
    66→
    67→  return useMemo(() => {
    68→    if (!data) return []
    69→    return data.pages.flatMap((page) => page.data)
    70→  }, [data])
    71→}
    72→
    73→function useMergedAnchorComments(refId: string): CommentWithAnchor[] {
    74→  const eagerComments = useAnchorCommentsQuery(refId)
    75→  const cachedComments = useCachedCommentsData(refId)
    76→
    77→  return useMemo(() => {
    78→    const map = new Map<string, CommentWithAnchor>()
    79→    for (const c of eagerComments) map.set(c.id, c)
    80→    for (const c of cachedComments) {
    81→      if ((c as CommentWithAnchor).anchor) map.set(c.id, c)
    82→    }
    83→    return [...map.values()]
    84→  }, [eagerComments, cachedComments])
    85→}
    86→
    87→export function LexicalCommentWrapper({
    88→  content,
    89→  refId,
    90→  title,
    91→  children,
    92→}: PropsWithChildren<{
    93→  content: string
    94→  refId: string
    95→  title: string
    96→}>) {
    97→  const containerRef = useRef<HTMLDivElement>(null)
    98→  const blockInfos = useMemo<BlockInfo[]>(
    99→    () => extractBlockInfos(content),
   100→    [content],
   101→  )
   102→
   103→  const comments = useMergedAnchorComments(refId)
   104→
   105→  return (
   106→    <div ref={containerRef} className="group/comment-block relative">
   107→      {children}
   108→      <CommentBlockButton
   109→        containerRef={containerRef}
   110→        blockInfos={blockInfos}
   111→        refId={refId}
   112→        title={title}
   113→      />
   114→      <CommentAnchorHighlight
   115→        containerRef={containerRef}
   116→        blockInfos={blockInfos}
   117→        comments={comments}
   118→      />
   119→    </div>
   120→  )
   121→}
   122→
```

```text
     1→'use client'
     2→
     3→import type { CommentModel } from '@mx-space/api-client'
     4→import { useEffect } from 'react'
     5→
     6→import type { BlockInfo } from './anchor-utils'
     7→import type { CommentAnchor, RangeAnchor } from './types'
     8→
     9→type CommentWithAnchor = CommentModel & { anchor?: CommentAnchor }
    10→
    11→function collectRangeAnchors(comments: CommentWithAnchor[]): RangeAnchor[] {
    12→  const result: RangeAnchor[] = []
    13→  for (const c of comments) {
    14→    if (c.anchor?.mode === 'range') result.push(c.anchor)
    15→    if (c.children) {
    16→      result.push(...collectRangeAnchors(c.children as CommentWithAnchor[]))
    17→    }
    18→  }
    19→  return result
    20→}
    21→
    22→function findBlockElement(
    23→  contentEl: Element,
    24→  blockInfos: BlockInfo[],
    25→  blockId: string,
    26→): Element | null {
    27→  const idx = blockInfos.findIndex((b) => b.blockId === blockId)
    28→  if (idx === -1) return null
    29→  return contentEl.children[idx] ?? null
    30→}
    31→
    32→function createDomRange(
    33→  blockEl: Element,
    34→  startOffset: number,
    35→  endOffset: number,
    36→): Range | null {
    37→  const walker = document.createTreeWalker(
    38→    blockEl,
    39→    NodeFilter.SHOW_TEXT | NodeFilter.SHOW_ELEMENT,
    40→    {
    41→      acceptNode(node) {
    42→        if (node.nodeType === Node.TEXT_NODE) return NodeFilter.FILTER_ACCEPT
    43→        if (node instanceof HTMLBRElement) return NodeFilter.FILTER_ACCEPT
    44→        return NodeFilter.FILTER_SKIP
    45→      },
    46→    },
    47→  )
    48→  let offset = 0
    49→  let startNode: Text | null = null
    50→  let startNodeOffset = 0
    51→  let endNode: Text | null = null
    52→  let endNodeOffset = 0
    53→  let node: Node | null
    54→
    55→  while ((node = walker.nextNode())) {
    56→    const len = node.nodeType === Node.TEXT_NODE ? (node as Text).length : 1
    57→
    58→    if (!startNode && node.nodeType === Node.TEXT_NODE && offset + len >= startOffset) {
    59→      startNode = node as Text
    60→      startNodeOffset = startOffset - offset
    61→    }
    62→    if (node.nodeType === Node.TEXT_NODE && offset + len >= endOffset) {
    63→      endNode = node as Text
    64→      endNodeOffset = endOffset - offset
    65→      break
    66→    }
    67→    offset += len
    68→  }
    69→
    70→  if (!startNode || !endNode) return null
    71→
    72→  try {
    73→    const range = document.createRange()
    74→    range.setStart(startNode, startNodeOffset)
    75→    range.setEnd(endNode, endNodeOffset)
    76→    return range
    77→  } catch {
    78→    return null
    79→  }
    80→}
    81→
    82→const HIGHLIGHT_STYLE_ID = 'comment-anchor-highlight-style'
    83→
    84→function ensureHighlightStyle() {
    85→  if (document.getElementById(HIGHLIGHT_STYLE_ID)) return
    86→  const style = document.createElement('style')
    87→  style.id = HIGHLIGHT_STYLE_ID
    88→  style.textContent = [
    89→    '::highlight(comment-highlight) {',
    90→    '  background: color-mix(in srgb, var(--color-accent, #33a6b8) 15%, transparent);',
    91→    '  text-decoration: underline;',
    92→    '  text-decoration-color: color-mix(in srgb, var(--color-accent, #33a6b8) 50%, transparent);',
    93→    '  text-underline-offset: 2px;',
    94→    '}',
    95→  ].join('\n')
    96→  document.head.append(style)
    97→}
    98→
    99→export function CommentAnchorHighlight({
   100→  containerRef,
   101→  blockInfos,
   102→  comments,
   103→}: {
   104→  containerRef: React.RefObject<HTMLElement | null>
   105→  blockInfos: BlockInfo[]
   106→  comments: CommentWithAnchor[]
   107→}) {
   108→  useEffect(() => {
   109→    if (
   110→      typeof CSS === 'undefined' ||
   111→      !('highlights' in CSS) ||
   112→      typeof (window as any).Highlight !== 'function'
   113→    )
   114→      return
   115→    if (!containerRef.current) return
   116→
   117→    const contentEl = containerRef.current.querySelector('.rich-content')
   118→    if (!contentEl) return
   119→
   120→    const rangeAnchors = collectRangeAnchors(comments)
   121→    if (rangeAnchors.length === 0) {
   122→      ;(CSS as any).highlights.delete('comment-highlight')
   123→      return
   124→    }
   125→
   126→    ensureHighlightStyle()
   127→
   128→    const ranges: Range[] = []
   129→    for (const anchor of rangeAnchors) {
   130→      const blockEl = findBlockElement(contentEl, blockInfos, anchor.blockId)
   131→      if (!blockEl) continue
   132→
   133→      const range = createDomRange(blockEl, anchor.startOffset, anchor.endOffset)
   134→      if (range) ranges.push(range)
   135→    }
   136→
   137→    if (ranges.length > 0) {
   138→      const highlight = new (window as any).Highlight(...ranges)
   139→      ;(CSS as any).highlights.set('comment-highlight', highlight)
   140→    } else {
   141→      ;(CSS as any).highlights.delete('comment-highlight')
   142→    }
   143→
   144→    return () => {
   145→      ;(CSS as any).highlights.delete('comment-highlight')
   146→    }
   147→  }, [containerRef, blockInfos, comments])
   148→
   149→  return null
   150→}
   151→
```
</details></tool-use>

```text
   162→
   163→type NoteDetailPageParams = LocaleParams & {
   164→  id: string
   165→  password?: string
   166→}
   167→export const generateMetadata = async (props: {
   168→  params: Promise<NoteDetailPageParams>
   169→  searchParams?: Promise<{
   170→    password?: string | string[]
   171→    lang?: string
   172→  }>
   173→}): Promise<Metadata> => {
   174→  const params = await props.params
   175→  const searchParams = (await props.searchParams) ?? {}
   176→  const password = Array.isArray(searchParams.password)
   177→    ? searchParams.password[0]
   178→    : searchParams.password
   179→  try {
   180→    const { note: res } = await getData({
   181→      ...params,
   182→      password,
   183→      lang: searchParams.lang,
   184→    })
   185→
   186→    const { data } = res
   187→    const description = getSummaryFromMd(data.text ?? '')
   188→
   189→    const ogUrl = await getOgUrl(
   190→      'note',
   191→      {
   192→        nid: params.id,
   193→      },
   194→      params.locale,
   195→    )
   196→
   197→    const canonicalPathNoLocale = `/notes/${params.id}`
   198→    const canonicalPath = buildLocalePrefixedPath(
   199→      params.locale as any,
   200→      canonicalPathNoLocale,
   201→    )
   202→    const supportedLocales = getSupportedLocalesFromTranslations({
   203→      sourceLang: (data as any).translationMeta?.sourceLang,
   204→      availableTranslations: (data as any).availableTranslations,
   205→    })
   206→
   207→    return {
   208→      title: data.title,
   209→      description,
   210→      openGraph: {
   211→        title: data.title,
   212→        description,
   213→        images: ogUrl,
   214→        type: 'article',
   215→      },
   216→      twitter: {
   217→        images: ogUrl,
   218→        title: data.title,
   219→        description,
   220→        card: 'summary_large_image',
   221→      },
   222→      alternates: {
   223→        canonical: canonicalPath,
   224→        languages: {
   225→          ...buildLanguageAlternates(canonicalPathNoLocale, supportedLocales),
   226→          'x-default': canonicalPathNoLocale,
   227→        },
   228→      },
   229→    } satisfies Metadata
   230→  } catch {
   231→    return {}
   232→  }
   233→}
   234→
   235→export default definePrerenderPage<NoteDetailPageParams>()<NoteDataResult>({
   236→  fetcher: getData,
   237→  requestErrorRenderer(_error, parsed, { id }) {
   238→    const { status } = parsed
   239→
   240→    if (status === 403) {
   241→      return (
   242→        <Paper>
   243→          <NotePasswordForm />
   244→          <CurrentNoteNidProvider nid={id} />
   245→        </Paper>
   246→      )
   247→    }
   248→  },
   249→  async Component({
   250→    data: fetchedData,
   251→    params: { id: nid, locale },
   252→    fetchedAt,
   253→  }) {
   254→    const { note: data } = fetchedData
   255→    const t = await getTranslations({
   256→      namespace: 'note',
   257→      locale,
   258→    })
   259→
   260→    return (
   261→      <TocHeadingStrategyProvider
   262→        contentFormat={data.data.contentFormat}
   263→        content={data.data.content}
   264→      >
   265→        <CurrentNoteNidProvider nid={nid} />
   266→        <CurrentNoteDataProvider data={data} />
   267→        <NoteDataReValidate fetchedAt={fetchedAt} />
   268→        <SyncNoteDataAfterLoggedIn />
   269→        <RoomProvider roomName={buildRoomName(data.data.id)}>
   270→          <Transition className="min-w-0" lcpOptimization>
   271→            <Paper key={nid} as={NoteMainContainer}>
   272→              <PageInner
   273→                data={data.data}
   274→                privateLoginOnlyMessage={t('private_login_only')}
   275→              />
   276→            </Paper>
   277→            <BottomToUpSoftScaleTransitionView delay={500}>
   278→              <CommentAreaRootLazy
   279→                refId={data.data.id}
   280→                allowComment={data.data.allowComment}
   281→              />
   282→            </BottomToUpSoftScaleTransitionView>
   283→          </Transition>
   284→        </RoomProvider>
   285→
   286→        <NoteFontSettingFab />
   287→
   288→        <OnlyMobile>
   289→          <TocFAB />
   290→        </OnlyMobile>
   291→      </TocHeadingStrategyProvider>
   292→    )
   293→  },
   294→})
   295→
```

Perfect! Now I have comprehensive understanding. Let me create a detailed summary document:

## Comment Data Flow and Types - Complete Exploration

Based on my thorough exploration of the codebase, here's the complete picture of the comment system:

### 1. **Comment Anchor Types** (`/apps/web/src/components/modules/comment/types.ts`)

```typescript
// Exported from @haklex/rich-editor
export type BlockAnchor = {
  mode: 'block'
  blockId: string
  blockType: string
  blockFingerprint: string
  snapshotText: string
}

export type RangeAnchor = {
  mode: 'range'
  blockId: string
  blockType: string
  blockFingerprint: string
  snapshotText: string
  quote: string
  prefix: string
  suffix: string
  startOffset: number
  endOffset: number
}

export type CommentAnchor = BlockAnchor | RangeAnchor
```

### 2. **Block Information and Anchor Utilities** (`/apps/web/src/components/modules/comment/anchor-utils.ts`)

**BlockInfo structure**: Maps DOM elements to metadata
```typescript
interface BlockInfo {
  index: number              // Position in content.root.children
  blockId: string           // From node.$.blockId in JSON
  type: string              // Node type (paragraph, heading, etc.)
  textContent: string       // Extracted text
  fingerprint: string       // Hash of first 200 chars + length
}
```

**Key functions**:
- `extractBlockInfos(content)` - Parses Lexical JSON, returns `BlockInfo[]` for each root child
- `findBlockIndex(contentEl, node)` - Maps DOM node to block index within container
- `getTextOffset(container, node, offset)` - Calculates text position including line breaks
- `buildRangeAnchorFromSelection(sel, contentEl, blockInfos)` - Creates `RangeAnchor` from user selection
- `buildBlockAnchorFromIndex(blockInfos, index)` - Creates `BlockAnchor` for whole block
- `computeBlockFingerprint(text)` - DJB2 hash for content verification

### 3. **Comment Data Structure** (from `@mx-space/api-client`)

```typescript
interface CommentModel {
  id: string
  text: string
  author: string
  mail: string
  avatar?: string
  url?: string
  source?: AuthSocialProviders  // github, twitter, etc
  created: string                 // ISO date
  editedAt?: string
  location?: string
  isWhispers?: boolean
  key?: string
  
  // Relationships
  parent?: string | CommentModel
  children?: CommentModel[]
  readerId?: string               // Links to ReaderModel
  
  // New in updated system
  anchor?: CommentAnchor | null   // Points to content block
}

interface ReaderModel {
  name: string
  image?: string
  handle?: string                 // For social providers
  // Other profile fields
}
```

**How comments relate to blocks via anchor**:
- `anchor.blockId` matches `BlockInfo.blockId`
- DOM block element = `contentEl.children[blockInfos.findIndex(b => b.blockId === anchor.blockId)]`
- Comments are pinned to specific content blocks via this anchor

### 4. **Individual Comment Rendering** (`/apps/web/src/components/modules/comment/Comment.tsx`)

**Comment exposes**:
```typescript
{
  avatar:    reader?.image || comment.avatar
  author:    reader?.name || comment.author
  authorUrl: comment.url || (source==='github' ? github.com/reader.handle)
  created:   comment.created
  text:      comment.text
  anchor:    comment.anchor  // BlockAnchor | RangeAnchor | null
  source:    comment.source  // Auth strategy
  key:       comment.key     // Metadata
  location:  comment.location
  isWhispers: comment.isWhispers
}
```

**Rendering**:
- Shows quote preview if `anchor.mode === 'range'` (quoted text)
- Shows block reference if `anchor.mode === 'block'` (block comment)
- Renders as nested tree: parent → children[] (threaded replies)
- Portal for comment action slots via `CommentBoxHolderPortal`

### 5. **Comment Data Flow** (`/apps/web/src/components/modules/comment/CommentProvider.tsx`)

```typescript
// Data structure
const CommentListContext = PrimitiveAtom<Record<string, CommentModel>>

const CommentReaderMapContext = Record<string, ReaderModel>

// Provider setup
<CommentProvider refId={refId}>
  {children(data, commentAtom)}
</CommentProvider>

// Data organization
- Flattens all comments (including nested children) into a single map by ID
- Maintains separate map of readers by readerId
- Updates via infinite query pagination
```

**Key hooks**:
- `useCommentById(commentId)` - Get single comment
- `useCommentByIdSelector(commentId, selector)` - Get derived value from comment
- `useCommentReader(readerId)` - Get reader profile
- `useUpdateComment(comment)` - Optimistic update

### 6. **Comment Box System** (`/apps/web/src/components/modules/comment/CommentBox/Root.tsx`)

```typescript
export const CommentBoxRoot: Component<CommentBaseProps> = (props) => {
  // Props
  refId: string                    // What to comment on
  anchor?: CommentAnchor | null   // Which block/range
  initialValue?: string
  afterSubmit?: () => void
  autoFocus?: boolean
}
```

**State management** (`/apps/web/src/components/modules/comment/CommentBox/providers.tsx`):
```typescript
const CommentBoxContext = {
  refId: atom(refId)
  text: atom('')
  author: atomWithStorage('comment-author', '')
  mail: atomWithStorage('comment-mail', '')
  url: atomWithStorage('comment-url', '')
  avatar: atom('')
  source: atom('')
  anchor: atom<CommentAnchor | null>(null)
  isWhisper: atomWithStorage('comment-is-whisper', false)
  syncToRecently: atomWithStorage('comment-sync-to-recently', true)
}
```

**Modes**:
- `'legacy'` - Anonymous form
- `'with-auth'` - Authenticated user (OAuth/passwordless)

### 7. **Comment Modal System** (`/apps/web/src/components/modules/shared/CommentModal.tsx`)

```typescript
interface CommentModalProps {
  title: string          // Article/block title
  refId: string         // Comment target
  anchor?: CommentAnchor | null
  initialValue?: string
}

// Usage pattern
const { present } = useModalStack()
present({
  title: 'Your modal title',
  content: (rest) => <CommentModal {...props} {...rest} />
})
```

**Modal content**:
- Shows anchor context (quote or block title)
- Embeds `CommentBoxRoot` for input
- Shows `CommentsLazy` for existing comments
- Auto-closes after successful submission (1s delay)

### 8. **Modal/Panel Stack System** (`/apps/web/src/components/ui/modal/stacked/`)

```typescript
// Provider setup
<ModalStackProvider>
  {children}
</ModalStackProvider>

// Usage hook
const { present, dismiss, dismissTop, dismissAll } = useModalStack()

// Open modal
present({
  title: ReactNode
  content: ModalContentComponent  // FC<{ dismiss: () => void }>
  clickOutsideToDismiss?: boolean
  modalClassName?: string
  max?: boolean                    // Full screen (90vh/90vw)
})
// Returns: cleanup function

// Managed by Jotai atom
modalStackAtom = PrimitiveAtom<(ModalProps & { id: string })[]>
```

**Features**:
- Stacked modals with z-index management
- Mobile: renders as sheets/drawers
- Desktop: draggable centered dialogs
- Motion animations with scale/y transitions
- Proper pointer events management for nested modals

### 9. **How to Group Comments by BlockId**

From `LexicalCommentWrapper`:
```typescript
// 1. Get comments with anchors
const comments = useMergedAnchorComments(refId)
// Returns: CommentModel[] with anchor field

// 2. Group by blockId
const commentsByBlock = new Map<string, CommentModel[]>()
for (const comment of comments) {
  const blockId = comment.anchor?.blockId
  if (blockId) {
    if (!commentsByBlock.has(blockId)) {
      commentsByBlock.set(blockId, [])
    }
    commentsByBlock.get(blockId)!.push(comment)
  }
}
```

### 10. **Opening Comment Panel for Specific Block**

Pattern from `CommentBlockButton.tsx`:
```typescript
const { present } = useModalStack()

// When clicking comment button on hover
const anchor = buildBlockAnchorFromIndex(blockInfos, hoverIndex)
present({
  title: t('selection_comment'),
  content: (rest) => (
    <CommentModal
      refId={refId}
      title={title}
      anchor={anchor}  // Anchors to specific block
      {...rest}
    />
  ),
})
```

### 11. **Complete Data Fetch Path**

1. **Comment list**: `useCommentsQuery(refId)` → TanStack Query with infinite pagination
2. **Comments with anchors**: `useAnchorCommentsQuery(refId)` → Dedicated query with `hasAnchor=true`
3. **Merge from cache**: `useCachedCommentsData(refId)` → Watch query cache for updates
4. **Final result**: `useMergedAnchorComments()` → Deduped Map of comments with anchors

### Key Files Summary

| File | Purpose |
|------|---------|
| `types.ts` | Type definitions for anchors |
| `anchor-utils.ts` | Block extraction, anchor creation, DOM mapping |
| `Comment.tsx` | Individual comment rendering with avatar/author |
| `CommentProvider.tsx` | Data flow, comment map, reader profiles |
| `CommentBox/Root.tsx` | Input form component |
| `CommentBox/providers.tsx` | State atoms and context |
| `CommentBox/hooks.tsx` | Mutation hooks, state accessors |
| `CommentModal.tsx` | Modal wrapper for commenting on blocks |
| `CommentBlockButton.tsx` | Hover button to open modal, opens via `useModalStack` |
| `LexicalCommentWrapper.tsx` | Block extraction, anchor highlighting, comment highlighting |
| `CommentAnchorHighlight.tsx` | CSS Highlight API for visual feedback |
| `ui/modal/stacked/provider.tsx` | Modal stack implementation, `useModalStack` hook |

## 注释系统架构及布局分析报告

### 1. CommentBlockButton 组件（悬停按钮）

**位置：** `<REPO_ROOT>/apps/web/src/components/modules/comment/CommentBlockButton.tsx`

**核心特性：**
- 在内容容器上监听 `mousemove` 事件（行62-70）
- 遍历 `.rich-content` 子元素，按Y轴判断当前悬停的块级元素
- 计算按钮位置：相对于容器的 `top`，`right` 默认为0
- 样式：`absolute z-10 size-6 rounded-full` 圆形按钮
- 状态：通过 `group-hover/comment-block:opacity-100` 实现悬停显示
- 点击时调用 `buildBlockAnchorFromIndex()` 构建块级注释锚点

### 2. LexicalCommentWrapper 编排器

**位置：** `<REPO_ROOT>/apps/web/src/components/modules/comment/LexicalCommentWrapper.tsx`

**三层结构：**
```
LexicalCommentWrapper (ref=containerRef)
├─ {children} (MainLexicalContent)
├─ CommentBlockButton (悬停按钮)
└─ CommentAnchorHighlight (范围高亮)
```

**功能：**
- 提取内容的块信息 `extractBlockInfos()` (行98-101)
- 获取有锚点的注释 `useMergedAnchorComments()` (行103) 
- 管理 `.group/comment-block` 容器，触发按钮可见性

### 3. CommentAnchorHighlight 高亮系统

**位置：** `<REPO_ROOT>/apps/web/src/components/modules/comment/CommentAnchorHighlight.tsx`

**原理：**
- 使用 CSS Highlights API（现代浏览器）
- 收集所有范围锚点 (mode='range')
- 构建DOM Range对象，映射到实际文本节点
- 注入 CSS 样式（ID: `comment-anchor-highlight-style`，行82-97）
- 样式：15% 背景色混合 + 下划线装饰

**注意：** 高亮为**只读**功能，不参与可交互面

### 4. 文章内容和布局约束

**Post 页面（/posts/[category]/[slug]）：**

```
page.tsx (line 232)：
<div className="relative flex min-h-[120px] grid-cols-[auto_200px] lg:grid">
  <BottomToUpTransitionView lcpOptimization>
    <PostPage data={data}>
      <article>
        <PostContent contentFormat>
          <LexicalCommentWrapper>
            <MainLexicalContent className="min-w-0 w-full" />
          </LexicalCommentWrapper>
      </article>
    </PostPage>
  </BottomToUpTransitionView>
  
  <LayoutRightSideProvider className="relative hidden lg:block" />  <!-- 200px宽 -->
</div>
```

**关键约束：**
- 网格布局：`grid-cols-[auto_200px]` 仅在 `lg:` 显示
- 内容区宽度：`min-w-0` + `w-full`，自动伸缩
- 右侧固定宽200px（对应layout的grid列）
- 注释区域在文章下方（CommentAreaRootLazy，line 240-243）

**Note 页面（/notes/[id]）：**

```
notes/layout.tsx (line 8-23)：
<div className="relative mx-auto grid min-h-[calc(100vh-6.5rem-10rem)] max-w-[60rem]
      gap-4 md:grid-cols-1 xl:max-w-[calc(60rem+400px)] 
      xl:grid-cols-[1fr_minmax(auto,60rem)_1fr]">
  <NoteLeftSidebar /> (隐藏在md以下)
  {children}
  <LayoutRightSideProvider className="relative hidden xl:block" /> (400px区域)
</div>
```

**关键约束：**
- 内容最大宽60rem（960px）
- 高宽布局：`xl:grid-cols-[1fr_minmax(auto,60rem)_1fr]`（左侧动态、中间60rem、右侧400px）

### 5. 右侧布局系统（LayoutRightSideProvider）

**Portal 架构：**

```tsx
// 提供者（固定div容器）
const LayoutRightSideProvider = (props) => {
  const [element] = useState()  // Jotai atom
  return <div ref={divRef} className={className} />
}

// 入口（使用Portal渲染到右侧）
const LayoutRightSidePortal = (children) => {
  return createPortal(children, rightSideElement)
}
```

**用法：**

- Note: `<LayoutRightSidePortal><NoteActionAside /></LayoutRightSidePortal>`

```tsx
  <TocAside /> (目录树，绝对定位)
  {children && (
    /* 动作按钮通过transform偏移到下方 */
    translate-y-[calc(100%+24px)]
  )}
</aside>
```

**特点：**
- 粘性定位（sticky）
- TOC占据上部
- 内容（LikeButton、ShareButton等）通过 `translate-y` 偏移到下方
- 高度限制：`calc(100vh - 6rem - 4.5rem - 150px - 120px)` ≈ 视口高 - 280.5px

```tsx
  className="size-6 select-none rounded-full"  // mobile
  // md:size-9 for desktop
/>
```

**可配置：**

- `text`：fallback文字初字
- `randomColor`：自动着色
- `radius`：圆角（full / 数值）
- `lazy`：懒加载（默认true）
- RadixUI Avatar 基础

### 8. Comment 树形结构（Comment.tsx）

**布局设计：**
```tsx
<m.li className="relative my-2">
  <div className="group flex w-full items-stretch gap-4">
    <Avatar className="size-6 ... absolute top-2" />  // 绝对定位
    <div className="flex flex-1 flex-col min-w-0">
      <Header /> (作者名、时间、location)
      <ContentBox className="rounded-xl bg-zinc-600/5" />
      <Actions />
    </div>

      <Comment /> (递归子注释，ml-9左缩进)
    </ul>
  )}
</m.li>
```

**注释显示：**
- 范围锚点：显示引用文本 + 边框
- 块级锚点：显示"评论了「...」"标签
- 单链接内容：使用BlockLinkRenderer（card展示）

### 9. WithArticleSelectionAction（文本选中菜单）

**位置：** `<REPO_ROOT>/apps/web/src/components/modules/shared/WithArticleSelectionAction.tsx`

**工作流：**
1. 在 `onMouseUp` 时检测 `window.getSelection()`
2. 计算菜单位置：`e.clientX - left + 10`, `e.clientY - top + 10`
3. 菜单显示 "复制" + "引用评论" 按钮
4. 调用 `buildRangeAnchorFromSelection()` 构建范围锚点
5. 仅在非移动设备上启用（line 81）

### 10. 注释块信息提取（anchor-utils.ts）

**数据结构：**
```typescript
interface BlockInfo {
  index: number
  blockId: string         // Lexical 块ID
  type: string            // 块类型（paragraph等）
  textContent: string     // 块的文本内容
  fingerprint: string     // 简易hash用于验证
}
```

**锚点类型：**
- **BlockAnchor**：仅记录块ID、类型、快照（非精确范围）
- **RangeAnchor**：精确范围（startOffset/endOffset）+ 前后文 + 引用文本

---

## 布局空间分析

| 页面 | 响应式阈值 | 右侧宽度 | 可用空间 | 约束 |
|------|----------|---------|--------|------|
| **Post** | `lg:` (1024px+) | 200px | 自动减少 | grid-cols-[auto_200px] |
| **Note** | `xl:` (1280px+) | 400px | 60rem固定 | 中间内容严格限制 |
| **Page** | 类似Post | 动态 | 自动 | 右侧绝对定位 |
| **Mobile** | < lg | 隐藏 | 全宽 | 底部条形bar替代 |

---

## 关键发现

1. **右侧空间策略**
   - Post：利用 `grid-cols-[auto_200px]` 的 `auto` 列自动适配左侧内容
   - Note：严格 `xl:max-w-[calc(60rem+400px)]` 限制整体宽度，右侧固定400px
   - 评论栏与右侧 Portal 容器共存不冲突（不同区域）

2. **注释的三种交互入口**
   - 悬停按钮（CommentBlockButton）- 块级注释
   - 文本选中菜单（WithArticleSelectionAction）- 范围注释
   - 底部注释区（CommentAreaRoot）- 完整注释树

3. **高亮机制**
   - 使用 CSS Highlights API，不占用DOM
   - 仅对 mode='range' 的锚点高亮，block模式无视觉反馈（需依靠CommentBlockButton或菜单）

4. **响应式分割**
   - `lg:` 触点决定了Post右侧出现
   - `xl:` 触点决定了Note完整三栏布局
   - 移动端退化为底部bar + 全屏注释区

---

## 可扩展的右侧评论侧栏设计空间

基于上述分析，右侧评论侧栏可以：

1. **Post 页面**：插入 LayoutRightSidePortal，并列于 PostActionAside（共享200px宽）
2. **Note 页面**：利用 ArticleRightAside 的下方空间（translate-y 区域）或替代TocAside
3. **实时性**：使用 pendingCommentAnchorAtom 追踪当前锚点，动态过滤/排序注释列表

君如需进一步深入实现细节，吾可继续阐述。

```text
    39→
    40→  return useMemo(() => {
    41→    if (!data) return []
    42→    return data.data
    43→  }, [data])
    44→}
    45→
    46→function useCachedCommentsData(refId: string): CommentWithAnchor[] {
    47→  const queryClient = useQueryClient()
    48→  const queryKey = useMemo(() => buildCommentsQueryKey(refId), [refId])
    49→  const queryCache = queryClient.getQueryCache()
    50→
    51→  const data = useSyncExternalStore(
    52→    (onStoreChange) => {
    53→      const unsubscribe = queryCache.subscribe((event) => {
    54→        if (
    55→          event.type === 'updated' &&
    56→          event.query.queryHash === JSON.stringify(queryKey)
    57→        ) {
    58→          onStoreChange()
    59→        }
    60→      })
    61→      return unsubscribe
    62→    },
    63→    () => queryClient.getQueryData<CommentsQueryData>(queryKey),
    64→    () => null as CommentsQueryData | null,
    65→  )
    66→
    67→  return useMemo(() => {
    68→    if (!data) return []
    69→    return data.pages.flatMap((page) => page.data)
    70→  }, [data])
    71→}
    72→
    73→function useMergedAnchorComments(refId: string): CommentWithAnchor[] {
    74→  const eagerComments = useAnchorCommentsQuery(refId)
    75→  const cachedComments = useCachedCommentsData(refId)
    76→
    77→  return useMemo(() => {
    78→    const map = new Map<string, CommentWithAnchor>()
    79→    for (const c of eagerComments) map.set(c.id, c)
    80→    for (const c of cachedComments) {
    81→      if ((c as CommentWithAnchor).anchor) map.set(c.id, c)
    82→    }
    83→    return [...map.values()]
    84→  }, [eagerComments, cachedComments])
    85→}
    86→
    87→export function LexicalCommentWrapper({
    88→  content,
    89→  refId,
    90→  title,
    91→  children,
    92→}: PropsWithChildren<{
    93→  content: string
    94→  refId: string
    95→  title: string
    96→}>) {
    97→  const containerRef = useRef<HTMLDivElement>(null)
    98→  const blockInfos = useMemo<BlockInfo[]>(
    99→    () => extractBlockInfos(content),
   100→    [content],
   101→  )
   102→
   103→  const comments = useMergedAnchorComments(refId)
   104→
   105→  return (
   106→    <div ref={containerRef} className="group/comment-block relative">
   107→      {children}
   108→      <CommentBlockButton
   109→        containerRef={containerRef}
   110→        blockInfos={blockInfos}
   111→        refId={refId}
   112→        title={title}
   113→      />
   114→      <CommentAnchorHighlight
   115→        containerRef={containerRef}
   116→        blockInfos={blockInfos}
   117→        comments={comments}
   118→      />
   119→    </div>
   120→  )
   121→}
   122→
```
</details></tool-use>

```text
    13→interface EditorBlockProps {
    14→  block: Block
    15→  inlineComments: InlineComment[]
    16→  currentUser: User
    17→  onAddComment: (blockId: string, content: string) => void
    18→  onAddInlineReply: (inlineCommentId: string, content: string) => void
    19→}
    20→
    21→/**
    22→ * Renders text content with inline comment marks (dashed underlines).
    23→ * Splits the text into segments: plain text and highlighted ranges.
    24→ */
    25→function renderTextWithHighlights(
    26→  text: string,
    27→  inlineComments: InlineComment[],
    28→  currentUser: User,
    29→  onAddInlineReply: (inlineCommentId: string, content: string) => void
    30→): ReactNode {
    31→  if (inlineComments.length === 0) return text
    32→
    33→  // Sort by startOffset to process left to right
    34→  const sorted = [...inlineComments].sort(
    35→    (a, b) => a.startOffset - b.startOffset
    36→  )
    37→
    38→  const segments: ReactNode[] = []
    39→  let cursor = 0
    40→
    41→  for (const ic of sorted) {
    42→    // Skip if overlapping or out of bounds
    43→    if (ic.startOffset < cursor || ic.endOffset > text.length) continue
    44→
    45→    // Plain text before this highlight
    46→    if (ic.startOffset > cursor) {
    47→      segments.push(text.slice(cursor, ic.startOffset))
    48→    }
    49→
    50→    // Highlighted segment
    51→    const highlightedText = text.slice(ic.startOffset, ic.endOffset)
    52→    segments.push(
    53→      <InlineCommentMark
    54→        key={ic.id}
    55→        inlineComment={ic}
    56→        currentUser={currentUser}
    57→        onAddReply={onAddInlineReply}
    58→      >
    59→        {highlightedText}
    60→      </InlineCommentMark>
    61→    )
    62→
    63→    cursor = ic.endOffset
    64→  }
    65→
    66→  // Remaining text after last highlight
    67→  if (cursor < text.length) {
    68→    segments.push(text.slice(cursor))
    69→  }
    70→
    71→  return <>{segments}</>
    72→}
    73→
```

```text
    12→function formatTime(date: Date) {
    13→  const now = new Date()
    14→  const diff = now.getTime() - date.getTime()
    15→  const minutes = Math.floor(diff / 60000)
    16→  const hours = Math.floor(minutes / 60)
    17→  const days = Math.floor(hours / 24)
    18→
    19→  if (days > 0) return `${days}d ago`
    20→  if (hours > 0) return `${hours}h ago`
    21→  if (minutes > 0) return `${minutes}m ago`
    22→  return "Just now"
    23→}
    24→
    25→interface CommentThreadProps {
    26→  comments: Comment[]
    27→  currentUser: User
    28→  onAddComment: (content: string) => void
    29→}
    30→
    31→export function CommentThread({ comments, currentUser, onAddComment }: CommentThreadProps) {
    32→  const [newComment, setNewComment] = useState("")
    33→
    34→  function handleSubmit() {
    35→    if (!newComment.trim()) return
    36→    onAddComment(newComment.trim())
    37→    setNewComment("")
    38→  }
    39→
    40→  function handleKeyDown(e: React.KeyboardEvent) {
    41→    if (e.key === "Enter" && (e.metaKey || e.ctrlKey)) {
    42→      e.preventDefault()
    43→      handleSubmit()
    44→    }
    45→  }
    46→
    47→  return (
    48→    <div className="flex w-80 flex-col">
    49→      {comments.length > 0 && (
    50→        <ScrollArea className="max-h-72">
    51→          <div className="flex flex-col gap-3 p-4 pb-2">
    52→            {comments.map((comment) => (
    53→              <div key={comment.id} className="flex gap-2.5">
    54→                <Avatar className="size-7 shrink-0">
    55→                  <AvatarImage src={comment.user.avatar} alt={comment.user.name} />
    56→                  <AvatarFallback className="text-[10px] bg-accent text-accent-foreground font-medium">
    57→                    {comment.user.initials}
    58→                  </AvatarFallback>
    59→                </Avatar>
    60→                <div className="flex min-w-0 flex-1 flex-col gap-0.5">
    61→                  <div className="flex items-baseline gap-2">
    62→                    <span className="text-[13px] font-semibold text-foreground leading-tight">
    63→                      {comment.user.name}
    64→                    </span>
    65→                    <span className="text-[11px] text-muted-foreground shrink-0">
    66→                      {formatTime(comment.createdAt)}
    67→                    </span>
    68→                  </div>
    69→                  <p className="text-[13px] leading-relaxed text-foreground/80">
    70→                    {comment.content}
    71→                  </p>
    72→                </div>
    73→              </div>
    74→            ))}
    75→          </div>
    76→        </ScrollArea>
    77→      )}
    78→
    79→      <div className={cn("flex gap-2.5 p-4", comments.length > 0 && "border-t border-border pt-3")}>
    80→        <Avatar className="size-7 shrink-0">
    81→          <AvatarImage src={currentUser.avatar} alt={currentUser.name} />
    82→          <AvatarFallback className="text-[10px] bg-primary text-primary-foreground font-medium">
    83→            {currentUser.initials}
    84→          </AvatarFallback>
    85→        </Avatar>
    86→        <div className="flex flex-1 flex-col gap-2">
    87→          <Textarea
    88→            placeholder="Write a comment..."
    89→            value={newComment}
    90→            onChange={(e) => setNewComment(e.target.value)}
    91→            onKeyDown={handleKeyDown}
    92→            className="min-h-[60px] resize-none text-[13px] leading-relaxed"
    93→          />
    94→          <div className="flex items-center justify-between">
    95→            <span className="text-[11px] text-muted-foreground">
    96→              {"Press "}
    97→              <kbd className="rounded border border-border bg-muted px-1 py-0.5 text-[10px] font-mono">
    98→                {"Cmd+Enter"}
    99→              </kbd>
   100→              {" to send"}
   101→            </span>
   102→            <Button
   103→              size="sm"
   104→              onClick={handleSubmit}
   105→              disabled={!newComment.trim()}
   106→              className="h-7 gap-1 px-2.5 text-xs"
   107→            >
   108→              <Send className="size-3" />
   109→              Send
   110→            </Button>
   111→          </div>
   112→        </div>
   113→      </div>
   114→    </div>
   115→  )
   116→}
```

Key decisions:
1. **Layout approach**: The reference UI shows a right-side gutter alongside each block. In the current Shiroi codebase, `LexicalCommentWrapper` wraps the content with `position: relative`. The comment indicators need to be positioned to the right of the content area, aligned with each block.

2. **Component architecture**: Replace the current `CommentBlockButton` (simple hover button) with a new `CommentBlockGutter` component that:
   - Shows avatar stacks + count for blocks with comments
   - Shows a ghost "+" button on hover for blocks without comments
   - Clicking either opens a popover/panel with the comment thread

3. **Data flow**: Group the already-fetched anchor comments by `blockId` to know which blocks have comments.

4. **Popover vs Modal**: The reference uses popovers (side="right"). The current implementation uses modal stack. I should switch to popovers for a more inline experience matching the reference.

I'll write out the implementation plan now since I have the context I need.
